1.word_prompt: A small street-level retail shop with a glass storefront and open entrance. The shop displays various products on shelves visible through the window. A handwritten sign hangs above the door with the store name. Colorful goods are stacked neatly inside and spill onto an outdoor display rack. A shopkeeper stands near the counter. The sidewalk in front has a small awning overhead. Shopping baskets are stacked by the entrance.
sentences: A compact fruit and vegetable shop with wooden crates of apples, oranges, bananas, and grapes arranged in a colorful outdoor display on the sidewalk. Bundles of vegetables hang from hooks at the shop entrance. A shopkeeper stands inside behind the counter. Price tags are clipped to each crate. Customers browse the produce display on a bright day.

A small neighborhood shop situated directly across from a school building with a large iron gate. Students in uniforms pass by on the sidewalk. The shop sells stationery and snacks visible through the window. A sign in the store window faces the school. Parents and children walk past on the street between the shop and school gate.

A person in casual clothing carrying a reusable shopping bag walks along a sidewalk toward a small neighborhood store. The store ahead has a milk refrigerator visible through the glass door. The street is quiet with residential buildings in the background. The person's stride is purposeful, heading directly toward the shop entrance.

A shopkeeper in an apron unlocks the front rolling shutter of a small store early in the morning. A clock on the wall inside shows 9:00 AM. The street outside is still quiet. The owner pulls the metal shutter up and props open the glass door. Display shelves are being arranged inside. Morning light falls across the shop entrance.

A corner street with a brightly lit convenience store on one side, the familiar layout of refrigerated shelves and snack displays visible through large windows. A person on the sidewalk looks around, scanning the street. The store sign glows and the entrance is clearly visible. Adjacent buildings line the street. The person stands nearby with a questioning look.

A person exits a clothing boutique through a glass door, carrying two branded paper shopping bags. Clothes are displayed on mannequins and hanging racks just inside the store. The person looks satisfied, holding the bags in both hands. The shop facade shows clothing displays in the window. The sidewalk outside is visible.

Two people stand together on the sidewalk outside a small food shop or restaurant. One person gestures enthusiastically toward the shop while the other listens attentively. The shop window shows dishes or a menu board inside. A chalkboard menu is posted near the entrance. Both people face the shop front during the conversation.

A small store with the metal rolling shutter pulled down all the way to the ground, the shop completely closed. A handwritten paper sign is taped to the shutter. The sidewalk in front is empty. The neighboring shops on either side are open with their lights on. The closed shop looks dark and quiet compared to its surroundings.

A middle-aged woman in an apron stands behind the counter of a small neighborhood shop, arranging products on shelves. The shop interior is compact with a cash register, product shelves along the walls, and a display case. A few customers browse inside. The woman has a calm, businesslike expression. The shop is modest in size but tidy and well-stocked.

Two adjacent storefronts side by side on a commercial street. One is a pharmacy with a green cross sign and medicine displays in the window. Immediately next to it is a bakery with a glass case showing bread, pastries, and cakes. Both shops have clearly distinguishable signage. Customers are visible entering the bakery. The two stores share a dividing wall.

2.word_prompt: A rectangular paper price tag attached to a product by a string, showing a number in large bold digits. Nearby, a sales receipt sits on a counter next to coins and a banknote. A shelf behind holds multiple products with individual price labels on each. A calculator lies on the counter. A store price display board hangs on the wall with multiple items and their costs listed. A barcode sticker is visible on one of the products.
sentences: A customer inside a handbag shop holds up a medium-sized bag and looks at the sales associate with a questioning expression. The associate stands behind the counter. The bag has a price tag dangling from the handle. Other bags are displayed on shelves in the background. The customer's gesture and expression clearly indicate a question about the price.

A person stands in a clothing store holding a garment on a hanger, staring wide-eyed at the price tag. The tag shows a large number. The person's eyebrows are raised and mouth slightly open in surprise or dismay. Other clothing items hang on nearby racks with their price tags visible. The store lighting illuminates the tag clearly.

A store display showing two versions of the same item — one with the original high price crossed out in red and the new lower price written beside it in large numbers. A bold sale sign hangs above. Multiple discounted items fill the shelf. A percentage discount badge is visible on some price tags. The overall scene communicates a significant price reduction event.

A customer at an outdoor market stall leans slightly toward the vendor across a table of goods. The customer holds up fingers or gestures while speaking. The vendor, standing behind the stall, listens and shakes their head or considers. Produce or small goods are laid out on the stall. The body language shows negotiation in progress.

A person sits at a desk in front of an open laptop. Multiple browser tabs are visible on the screen showing the same product listed at different prices on different websites. The person has a notepad beside them with figures written down. One hand rests on the keyboard and the other holds a pen. The screen displays price comparison information clearly.

A customer sits at a table inside a restaurant, looking at an open menu. The menu shows several items listed with prices. The customer has a pleased, relaxed expression. Other diners are seated at nearby tables. A chalkboard on the wall also lists daily specials with prices. The overall scene is an affordable, casual dining establishment.

A customer at a supermarket vegetable section looks at a price sign above a pile of vegetables with a startled or concerned expression. The price placard shows a notably higher number. Other shoppers nearby also look at the prices. The vegetable display is full but the prominent price sign catches attention. The customer holds a basket and pauses mid-reach.

A person stands at a gift shop counter holding a neatly wrapped gift box, smiling contentedly. A receipt on the counter shows the price paid. The person looks pleased, suggesting the price was good for the item. Gift items and decorative wrapping supplies are visible in the background. The wrapped gift appears high quality despite the reasonable price.

A person stands in a store holding up a clothing item, staring with an exaggerated shocked expression at the small price tag hanging from it. Their eyes are wide and their free hand is raised toward their face. The price tag is prominent and legible. Other shoppers browse nearby, unaware of the person's reaction.

A customer stands at a cafe counter looking up at the menu board mounted on the wall above the barista. The board lists various coffee drinks and beverages with prices beside each item. The customer has a thoughtful expression, considering the options. The barista stands ready behind the counter. Coffee-making equipment is visible in the background.

3.word_prompt: A furnished living room showing a wooden sofa with cushions, a rectangular coffee table in the center, a tall bookshelf along the wall filled with books, and a floor lamp in the corner. A dining table with four chairs is partially visible through a doorway. Each piece of furniture is a distinct item with clean edges and visible material texture. The room is orderly and the furniture arrangement defines the living space.
sentences: An empty apartment interior with bare white walls and a plain floor. Newly purchased flat-pack furniture boxes are stacked near the wall. Some pieces are already assembled — a simple bed frame, a small table, and a basic chair. The space still feels sparse. A person stands in the middle of the room looking around, planning the arrangement.

A person stands in the center of a furnished bedroom, hands on hips, looking around with an approving and satisfied expression. A wooden wardrobe, bed with a headboard, and matching nightstand are placed in the room. The furniture style coordinates well with the paint color and curtains. The person nods approvingly at how everything looks together.

A person is in the process of sliding a wooden dresser into position beside a large window. Both hands grip the sides of the dresser as they carefully push it flush against the wall. Curtains hang on the window. Daylight comes in through the glass. The room is partially furnished and the dresser is the item being placed.

Inside a furniture showroom, a customer walks slowly along a row of sofas displayed on a raised platform. Each sofa is a different style and color. The customer pauses and sits on one, testing its comfort. Price tags hang from the armrests. A sales associate stands nearby. Spotlights illuminate each furniture piece in the large retail space.

A residential street scene showing a moving truck parked outside an apartment building. Two movers carry a large wardrobe through the building entrance on a dolly. Boxes are stacked on the sidewalk. A person supervises the move, pointing and directing. More furniture is still in the truck. The scene is busy with moving-day activity.

A living room with multiple pieces of furniture filling the space: a three-seat sofa, armchair, coffee table, display cabinet, bookshelf, and a TV console. Family photos sit on the shelves. Cushions are arranged on the sofa. The room has a lived-in quality with various objects on surfaces. The overall impression is a fully furnished, occupied home.

A person kneels beside a wooden coffee table, polishing the surface with a folded white cloth. A spray bottle and cleaning cloth sit on the floor nearby. The furniture surface shows the difference between the cleaned area and a dustier section not yet wiped. Sunlight from a nearby window highlights the wood grain. The person's focus is entirely on the task.

Inside a furniture store, a person stands in front of a display of white bedroom furniture — a white bed frame, white dresser, and white nightstand all coordinated together. The person has both hands clasped together and tilts their head appreciatively, clearly pleased by the look. The white furniture stands out against the neutral showroom backdrop.

Inside a furniture showroom, a person examines a display of sofas and chairs. They crouch slightly to inspect the fabric of a comfortable-looking armchair, running a hand over the material. A small notepad is in their other hand. They appear to be selecting a piece thoughtfully, imagining it in their parents' home. Other furniture displays are visible in the background.

A split scene showing two pieces of furniture side by side. On the left, a worn, scratched, and faded wooden chair with a broken leg propped against a wall. On the right, a brand-new, clean, modern chair with smooth surfaces and intact legs, still bearing a store tag. The contrast between the old battered furniture and the new replacement is clear.

4.word_prompt: A simple neighborhood map or bird's-eye view showing two buildings very close together on the same street — a house and another landmark building with only a short distance of road between them. A dotted line or arrow indicates the short path connecting the two locations. The scale of the distance is visibly small. Street trees and a footpath are visible between the two close-together buildings.
sentences: A residential street with a house on one side and a school building with a front gate directly visible from the house window. The two structures are on the same short block with only a narrow strip of sidewalk between them. A child could be seen walking from the house directly to the school gate in just a few steps.

A person stands on a sidewalk and looks around with a slightly lost expression. They are facing a passerby and appear to be asking a question. Just a short distance behind the passerby, the entrance to a subway station is clearly visible — the stairway going underground and the station sign overhead. The proximity of the station is obvious.

A top-down view or street-level view showing a residential house with its front garden directly adjacent to a public park entrance. The park gate or green space begins immediately at the edge of the house's property. Trees from the park are visible just beyond the fence. The house and park share a boundary with no other buildings or roads between them.

A person sits at a table with a folded road map spread open. Their finger traces along routes near their current location, circling destinations within a short radius. A pencil marks nearby towns or nature spots. The map shows a modest geographic area suggesting the person is looking for a short journey, not a long one.

Two young people walk side by side on a tree-lined street, their shoulders nearly touching. One has their arm linked with the other's. Both are smiling and laughing. Their body language and close physical proximity convey a deep, comfortable friendship. They walk in perfect sync, entirely at ease with each other's company.

A person stands at an intersection looking in both directions, appearing uncertain. They hold up their phone showing a map. A passerby points helpfully down the street. In the near background, a hospital building with a red cross sign is visible just a short distance away. The hospital is clearly nearby but the person needed directions to confirm.

A person carries two heavy grocery bags, one in each hand, walking toward an apartment building entrance. The entrance is just steps away — they are almost at the door. A supermarket sign is visible just across the street or around the corner behind them, indicating the store is extremely close to home. The person looks relieved to be nearly there.

A person in office attire walks along a short stretch of sidewalk from an apartment building entrance toward an office building. Both buildings are visible in the same frame, only a very brief walking distance apart. The person carries a work bag and walks casually, suggesting the commute is effortlessly short — almost no distance at all.

An office building exterior with a cafe located directly next door, sharing a wall. A person leans out from the office entrance and points to the cafe beside it while speaking to a colleague. Both buildings are visible in the same frame. The cafe has visible chairs through the window and its entrance is just steps from the office door.

Two adjacent apartment doors on the same corridor, very close together. A resident at one door smiles and waves at their neighbor who stands at the other door holding a small dish of food they are sharing. The doors are so close that both residents can interact without moving far. The hallway is narrow and both neighbors stand comfortably within conversation distance.

5.word_prompt: A person sitting in a relaxed position in their living room occasionally engaged in a leisure activity. A wall calendar beside them has scattered dates circled in marker rather than every day, visually representing infrequent occurrence. A second calendar on the desk shows just a few highlighted days per month. The person has a content, unhurried expression. The overall scene communicates occasional, not regular, activity — the spaced-out circled dates are the key visual.
sentences: A person reclines on a sofa in a living room with a large bowl of popcorn balanced on their lap. The room lights are dimmed. A television screen in front of them shows a movie scene with dramatic lighting. The person holds the remote in one hand and has a relaxed, entertained expression. A blanket is loosely draped over their legs.

A person sits alone at a fast food restaurant table with a tray of food — a burger, fries, and a drink. The restaurant has the characteristic look of a fast food chain with numbered menu boards on the wall. The person takes a bite of the burger with a slightly guilty but enjoying expression. Other customers are visible in the background.

A person in athletic clothing runs along a paved path in a park. Morning light filters through the trees, casting long shadows across the path. The person's posture and stride show a moderate jogging pace. Birds sit on nearby branches. A few other morning walkers are in the distance. The scene has a fresh, early-morning quality.

A person sits at a kitchen table, leaning back in their chair with a mobile phone held to one ear. Their free hand gestures as they talk, and they have a warm, happy smile. The conversation is clearly with someone they care about. A cup of tea sits on the table in front of them. The room behind them is quiet.

A small public park with cherry blossom trees in bloom, petals falling through the air. A person walks along the park path holding a transparent umbrella as light rain falls. The umbrella is dotted with rain droplets. Pink blossoms cover the ground around the path. The scene captures spring weather with both blossoms and gentle rainfall simultaneously.

Inside a public library, a person sits at a reading table with an open book in front of them. Tall bookshelves line the walls. The table has a small desk lamp. The person reads quietly, fully absorbed. Other library visitors are visible seated or browsing shelves nearby. The atmosphere is quiet and still.

A person in hiking boots and a light backpack walks up a mountain trail surrounded by trees. Sunlight filters through the canopy above. The trail is clearly well-traveled with marked posts along the way. The person moves at a leisurely pace and looks around, taking in the scenery. A view of lower hills is glimpsed through a gap in the trees.

A person sits at a desk with both hands pressed gently against their temples, eyes closed. They have a mildly pained expression. A half-drunk glass of water and a small pill bottle sit on the desk nearby. Papers and a laptop are also on the desk, suggesting they were working. The expression is discomfort rather than serious distress.

A person stands at a kitchen counter cutting vegetables on a chopping board. Pots are on the stove, one with steam rising from it. Cooking ingredients are laid out on the counter. The person has an apron on and looks focused on the task. A recipe card or phone screen with a recipe is propped up near the cutting board.

A person stands in a busy train station concourse with a travel backpack on their back and a rolling suitcase beside them. They hold a paper or digital train ticket, looking up at the departure board. The station has other travelers walking past. The person is clearly alone — no companion is beside them. A platform entrance is visible ahead.

6.word_prompt: A person in motion, mid-stride on a sidewalk, moving forward with purpose. Their body leans slightly in the direction of travel. A destination — a building entrance — is visible ahead in the background. The person carries a bag suited to their purpose: a school backpack, work bag, or shopping tote. Their footsteps leave no trace but their direction is unmistakably forward. A path or road stretches ahead toward the visible destination.
sentences: A student wearing a school uniform and carrying a backpack walks toward a school building. The school gate is ahead with other students streaming through it. The morning sky is bright. The student's stride is confident and routine. School grounds and the main building are visible through the open gate. Trees line the path to the entrance.

A person stands on a train platform beside a large rolling suitcase. They hold a train ticket in one hand and check the departure board. The train on the platform has a destination display visible. The person is dressed for travel and appears ready to board. Other passengers are also on the platform. The station has a large arched ceiling.

Two friends walk side by side along a paved path leading toward a park entrance. The park gate or greenery is visible ahead. Both people have a relaxed, happy posture and appear to be chatting as they walk. Trees and a park lawn are visible beyond the entrance. The sky is clear and the atmosphere is casual and unhurried.

An office worker in business attire carries a work bag and walks out of an office building entrance. The building lobby is visible behind them through the glass door. The sky outside is a deep evening orange and purple. The person looks slightly tired but moves steadily down the steps. Street lights are starting to come on outside.

A person with slightly hunched posture and a pallid complexion walks toward the entrance of a hospital building. The hospital sign and the automatic sliding doors are visible. The person holds their stomach or rubs their neck, indicating they are feeling unwell. They approach the entrance slowly, other visitors and medical staff moving around them.

A group of office workers walks together along a busy commercial street at midday. They are headed toward a restaurant with a visible sign and menu board outside. The sun is high and workers from nearby buildings fill the sidewalk. The group walks purposefully toward the restaurant entrance, some already looking at the menu posted outside.

A person walks along a paved park path in the early evening. The sky is orange and pink from the setting sun. Trees line both sides of the path. The person has a relaxed, peaceful expression and walks at a leisurely pace. A few other evening walkers are in the distance. Park benches are placed at intervals along the path.

A person walks down a suburban street in the afternoon carrying a canvas tote shopping bag. Ahead, a large supermarket building is clearly visible with its sign and parking area. The sun is at a mid-afternoon angle. The person walks with intention toward the store entrance. The street is lightly busy with other pedestrians and parked cars nearby.

A person in formal business clothing stands at a transportation hub — a train station or airport concourse. They carry a rolling briefcase and a work bag. A departure board overhead shows routes to Seoul. The person moves through the terminal with a brisk, purposeful pace. Other business travelers and commuters fill the space around them.

Two people sit across from each other at a small table in a coffee shop. One leans forward with an enthusiastic expression and gestures toward the window or the street, appearing to suggest a plan. The other person considers, tilting their head with interest. A phone on the table shows a calendar app. Both have coffee cups in front of them.

7.word_prompt: A teacher stands at the front of a classroom facing several students seated at desks. The teacher points at a large blackboard or whiteboard covered in written content — numbers, letters, or diagrams. The teacher holds a piece of chalk or marker. Students look attentively at the board, some taking notes. The classroom has windows along one wall and educational posters on the other. A teacher's desk sits at the front corner of the room.
sentences: A teacher stands at a large blackboard covered in mathematical equations and number problems. They point to one equation with a long pointer stick. Students sit in rows of desks, each with an open textbook and notebook. Several students raise their hands to answer questions. A ruler and compass rest on the teacher's desk at the front.

Two people sit at a small table, both leaning over a book showing the Korean alphabet — Hangul characters are visible on the open pages. One person points at a character while the other practices writing it in a notebook. A pencil and eraser lie nearby. Both people face each other across the table in a relaxed learning setting.

A mother and child stand together at a kitchen counter. The mother guides the child's hands over a mixing bowl, showing how to stir ingredients. Flour, eggs, and measuring cups are on the counter. A recipe book is open nearby. Both face the counter and the child watches the mother's hand movements closely, learning the technique.

A music teacher sits on a chair beside a student who is seated at an upright piano. The teacher points at the sheet music on the music stand, indicating a specific note or passage. The student positions their hands on the keys, about to play. The piano keys are clearly visible. Sheet music is open on the stand above the keyboard.

A parent sits beside a young child at a small table. The parent holds up a large illustrated flashcard showing a letter of the alphabet. The child looks at the flashcard with focused concentration, finger pointing at the letter. A stack of flashcards sits on the table. An open illustrated alphabet book is also on the table beside them.

At the edge of a swimming pool, a coach crouches at poolside, demonstrating an arm stroke motion with their own arms. A student in a swimsuit and goggles stands waist-deep in the water below, watching the coach's demonstration. Lane markers are visible in the pool. Other swimmers are in lanes in the background.

A classroom with English language learning materials on the wall — an alphabet poster, vocabulary charts, and an English sentence example board. A young teacher stands at the front, writing a word on the board. Students, likely older children or teenagers, sit at desks looking at the board. English workbooks are open on the desks.

Inside an open-plan office, a senior employee in formal attire stands beside a junior colleague at a workstation. The senior person points at something on the computer monitor while explaining. The junior person leans forward, watching the screen attentively and takes notes in a notebook. Office furniture and other workstations are visible in the background.

A father sits in the passenger seat of a car, door open, leaning in to speak to a teenager who grips the steering wheel. They are in a large empty parking lot with no other cars. The father gestures at the steering wheel and dashboard, explaining controls. The teenager looks at the dashboard and nods carefully.

A volunteer teacher sits at a low table surrounded by several young children, all looking at large sheets of drawing paper. The volunteer demonstrates how to draw a simple shape — pointing at their own drawing and then at the child's paper. Each child holds a crayon or colored pencil. Completed drawings are visible in front of other children around the table.

8.word_prompt: A school backpack placed on a flat surface, shown from a three-quarter angle. The bag is unzipped and open, with the main compartment visible inside. Several textbooks are stacked inside the opening. A water bottle is tucked in the side pocket. Pencils and a ruler protrude from a front zipper pocket. The bag's straps and buckles are visible. The exterior fabric shows a solid color and the bag has a practical, everyday appearance.
sentences: A student stands at a desk holding an open backpack with one hand while pushing a large textbook into the main compartment with the other. Additional books are already inside, and a pencil case is visible in the front pocket. The desk has a few more books and school supplies waiting to be packed. The student's school uniform is visible.

A person stands at a store display counter looking at a stylish new handbag. They hold the bag by its handles, examining it closely. A price tag still attached to the handle is visible. The sales counter has more bags displayed on hooks and on a glass shelf. The person has a pleased, appreciative expression.

A person stands at a bus stop, arms slightly outstretched in distress, watching a bus pull away from the stop. Through the bus window, a bag is visible sitting on the seat where the person was seated. The person's expression is panicked and helpless. The bus recedes down the road. The bus stop sign is clearly visible.

A person sits on the floor next to an open travel suitcase. Folded clothes, toiletry items, chargers, and a rolled-up jacket are arranged around the open bag. The person holds a folded shirt and is deciding whether to pack it. A checklist on a phone or notepad lies beside them. The suitcase is partially but not yet fully packed.

Inside a bag store, a person stands before a display wall of bags in various colors. They look closely at a black bag hanging at eye level, touching the material gently. Other bags in different colors hang beside it. The display lighting highlights the black bag. The person's expression shows clear preference for the black one.

A person sits in a living room surrounded by birthday decorations — balloons and streamers on the wall. They hold a half-opened gift box wrapped in colorful paper. The item inside is clearly a handbag — the handles are visible emerging from the tissue paper. The person has an expression of delight and surprise. A birthday cake is visible on the table nearby.

A person stands on a sidewalk hunched forward under the weight of an overstuffed backpack. The bag is bulging at the seams, clearly overloaded. Both straps dig into their shoulders. The person grips the straps and has a strained expression. Their posture is bent slightly under the excessive weight. Other people walk past normally.

A person stands in a room looking around frantically. They look under a table, lift cushions from a sofa, and check behind a door. Their expression is worried and searching. The room shows signs of a hurried search — cushions displaced, drawer slightly open. No bag is visible anywhere in the scene, indicating it is missing.

A professional person in business clothing stands near their front door, fully dressed for work. They carry a structured work bag over one shoulder and hold their keys in hand. The front door is open behind them. The work bag is neatly organized and professional in appearance. The person looks ready and composed for the workday.

A woman's tote bag lies open on a table. Looking into the open top, a leather bifold wallet is visible inside, along with a set of keys on a keyring, a small cosmetic pouch, a mobile phone, and a folded receipt. The bag's interior lining is visible. Each item inside is distinct and recognizable. The bag appears to belong to someone organized.

9.word_prompt: A feather floats gently in the air beside a small object — a bag, a shoe, or a cardboard box — indicating extremely light weight. The object is shown being lifted easily with just two fingers of one hand, defying the expectation of effort. A set of old-fashioned balance scales tips entirely to the lighter side. The floating feather and the effortlessly lifted object together communicate the concept of lightness. The scale imbalance exaggerates the weight difference visually.
sentences: A person stands in a room holding a small travel backpack up with one hand, arm extended at shoulder height. Their eyes are wide with pleasant surprise and their mouth is slightly open. The bag appears small and compact. They hold it by a single strap with minimal effort. The effortless lift and their surprised expression communicate that the bag weighs almost nothing.

A person stands in a warm, bright outdoor setting dressed in thin linen shorts, a sleeveless top, and sandals. A light breeze causes the loose fabric to flutter slightly. The person's posture is relaxed and airy. They have their arms slightly out to the sides, the fabric of their clothing visibly thin and sheer. The overall impression is minimal, breathable clothing.

A person sits at a kitchen table with a simple bowl of salad — leafy greens, cucumber slices, and cherry tomatoes — and a small bowl of clear soup. The table setting is minimal. The person eats with a relaxed, satisfied expression. The meal looks fresh and light. Natural light comes through a nearby window. No heavy foods are visible on the table.

A person stands at a desk or table holding a thin, compact laptop with just one hand beneath it, supporting it on a single palm. The other hand is free. They have a slightly surprised, impressed expression. The laptop is visibly slim in profile. A bag or laptop sleeve sits on the desk nearby. The single-handed hold emphasizes the laptop's minimal weight.

A person is in a park performing light stretching — arms raised overhead, back gently arched, or doing a slow side stretch. Their clothing is casual athletic wear. Expression is relaxed and calm. Nearby, a park bench and trees are visible. No heavy exercise equipment is present. The movements are clearly gentle and low-impact.

A person sits on a stool inside a shoe store, trying on a pair of lightweight sneakers. They have just slipped them on and lift one foot, testing the shoe's weight. Their expression is visibly pleased and comfortable. A shoe box sits open on the floor nearby. The store shelves in the background hold more shoes.

A person carries a medium-sized cardboard box down a hallway, holding it with just one hand extended from their side. The box is sealed and labeled. Their posture is upright and relaxed — no strain. The ease with which they carry it suggests the box is much lighter than expected for its size. A doorway and empty hallway are visible.

A person stands outside in a sunny open space with arms stretched wide to the sides and face tilted slightly upward. Their expression is bright and energetic. They look healthy — clear skin, upright posture, and a wide smile. Their clothing fits loosely. The stance and expression convey a physical sense of feeling light, free, and full of energy.

A person stands at an airline check-in counter or at their front door, next to a remarkably small and compact travel bag — a single slim backpack. No large suitcase is present. The minimal luggage looks almost comically small for travel. The person has a relaxed, unburdened expression. Their hands are free and posture is straight. A travel tag hangs from the bag.

Inside a bicycle shop, a person stands over a sleek bicycle and lifts the front wheel with both hands, testing its weight. The wheel rises easily. The person has an approving expression and nods. Other bicycles are displayed on wall mounts and floor stands behind them. The shop has bicycle accessories hanging on display panels. The bicycle being tested looks slim and modern.

10.word_prompt: A singer stands at center stage under a bright spotlight, holding a microphone up to their mouth. They face a large indoor concert audience. Stage lighting beams cut through the air above the stage in multiple directions. The stage has speaker stacks on either side and a backdrop screen behind the performer. The singer wears a distinctive stage outfit. The audience in front is a dense crowd with raised hands and glowing light sticks.
sentences: A large indoor concert arena packed with an audience. On the stage, a Korean pop singer performs under dramatic colored stage lights. Fans in the audience wave green and white glowing light sticks. The stage has a large LED backdrop screen showing visuals. The singer holds a microphone and faces the crowd with energy. The overall scene captures a large-scale K-pop concert.

A child sits on their bed in a bedroom covered with colorful singer posters taped to the walls. The child holds a hairbrush up to their mouth as a pretend microphone and sings enthusiastically with eyes closed. A small portable speaker on the dresser plays music. The child is fully absorbed in their imagined performance.

A person sits in a comfortable chair, eyes closed, with over-ear headphones on. A subtle, blissful smile is on their face. Their hands rest loosely in their lap. A music player or phone rests on the armrest beside them. The room is quiet and nothing else competes for attention. The person is completely immersed in the music they are listening to.

A person sits on a sofa in a living room watching a television. The TV screen shows a music broadcast program — a performer on a professional stage with cameras and studio lighting. The person leans forward slightly, watching with interest. A remote control is on the sofa cushion beside them. The TV screen is the focal point of the scene.

A young person holds a newly purchased physical music album — a glossy case with a singer's photo on the cover — in both hands, examining it with a big smile. A K-pop style album jacket photo is visible on the cover. The person is clearly a fan. A music store or the inside of their bedroom is visible in the background.

A well-dressed, confident person stands in a well-lit public setting — a red carpet event or an awards ceremony backdrop. They hold a small trophy or pose for photographers. A spotlight is on them. They have a composed, professional presence. A press backdrop with logos is visible behind them. Other formally dressed people are in the background.

Two friends sit side by side on a park bench, both leaning over one person's smartphone. The phone screen shows a music streaming playlist. One friend points at a song title and the other looks thoughtfully. Both have earbuds in from the same phone. The conversation is clearly about music preferences. Trees and the park path are visible nearby.

A group of three or four people exits a large concert venue at night through wide exit doors. They all wear tour merchandise — printed t-shirts and some hold concert light sticks. Their faces show happiness and excitement. Concert posters are on the wall of the venue exterior behind them. The street outside has other concert-goers milling about.

The scene introduces the family composition clearly.

20.word_prompt: A detailed close-up of a tree branch extending from a sturdy trunk. The branch has smaller twigs and leaves growing from it. The bark texture is rough and clearly visible. A few leaves are in various stages — some green, some turning color. A bird perches on one of the smaller twigs. The branch stretches horizontally against a backdrop of sky and other trees. The overall image focuses on the structure and natural beauty of a single tree branch.
sentences: A small songbird perches on a tree branch, gripping the bark with tiny claws. The branch extends horizontally from a large tree trunk. Green leaves surround the bird. The bird tilts its head, looking alertly at the viewer. Other branches are visible in the background. Sunlight filters through the canopy above. The scene is a peaceful, natural moment of a bird resting on a branch.

A fruit tree in spring with branches covered in delicate pink and white blossoms. Each branch holds clusters of small flowers. Petals drift gently through the air. Bees hover near the blossoms. The sky behind is bright blue. The tree trunk is sturdy and the blossoming branches fan outward gracefully. The scene captures the beauty of flowers blooming on branches in springtime.

A tree stands in a strong wind, its branches bending and swaying dramatically. Leaves are blown sideways and some detach from the branches. The sky is overcast and windy. Grass below the tree also bends in the wind. The branches flex but do not break, showing resilience. The movement of the swaying branches is the central action of the scene.

A person in outdoor clothing bends down on a park path, picking up a fallen tree branch from the ground. The branch is broken and leafy, lying across the walkway. The person lifts it and carries it to the side of the path. A small pile of cleared debris is nearby. The park path is otherwise clean. The scene shows tidying up a fallen branch.

A tree in late autumn with branches bearing bright red and orange leaves. The leaves cling to the branches in clusters. A few are in the process of detaching and floating downward. The background shows a blue sky. Other trees nearby have already lost most leaves. The vivid red leaves hanging on the branches create a striking visual against the autumn sky.

A tall tree with a bird's nest visible on one of its highest branches. The nest is made of twigs and grass, and two small eggs are visible inside. The branch supporting the nest is thick and stable. The parent bird approaches from the sky. The tree canopy surrounds the nest with protective foliage. The height of the branch and the nest's position are clearly shown.

A scene after a severe storm. A large tree branch lies broken on the ground near a tree with a visible fresh scar where the branch detached. Leaves and smaller twigs are scattered around the fallen branch. The sky shows clearing clouds after the storm. Other trees nearby have lost minor branches too. The broken branch is the focal point of the storm's aftermath.

A large tree with wide, spreading branches creating a broad area of shade on the ground below. People sit on the grass underneath the shady canopy. The sunlight is blocked by the dense foliage on the branches above. Beyond the shade, the ground is bright with direct sunlight. The scene clearly shows the branches and leaves working together to create a cool, shaded resting spot.

A winter scene with tree branches covered in a layer of fresh white snow. Each branch holds a ridge of snow along its length. Icicles hang from some twigs. The sky is pale grey. The snow-laden branches create an elegant, serene pattern against the winter sky. A person in the distance admires the scene. The beauty of snow on bare branches is the focus.

A person in gardening clothes stands beside a tree holding long-handled pruning shears. They reach up and clip an overgrown branch that extends too far. The cut branch falls to the ground. A pile of previously pruned branches lies nearby. The tree has some branches already trimmed back to a tidy shape. The gardening activity of cutting long branches is clearly depicted.

21.word_prompt: A person stands confidently with their arms wide, surrounded by visual representations of things they possess — a small dog at their feet, a car key in one hand, a diploma or certificate in the other, and a house silhouette behind them. Each item symbolizes ownership or possession. The person's expression is proud and content. The arrangement radiates outward from the person, showing multiple possessions and qualities they hold.
sentences: A person sits on a living room floor with a small, happy dog on their lap. The person scratches behind the dog's ears and the dog wags its tail. A dog bed, food bowl, and leash are visible nearby. Framed photos of the person and dog together hang on the wall. The bond between owner and pet is warm and clear. The scene conveys having and caring for a pet.

A person stands in front of a whiteboard during a professional presentation, confidently explaining a complex chart. Colleagues watch with impressed expressions. The presenter gestures fluidly and makes eye contact with the audience. Awards or certificates hang on the office wall behind. The person's poise and the audience's admiration convey someone who possesses great ability and competence.

A person lies in bed at night, eyes closed with a peaceful smile. Above their head, a thought bubble shows an idyllic scene — standing on a stage, traveling the world, or achieving a personal goal. Soft moonlight comes through the window. The bedsheets are cozy. The dreamy expression and thought bubble convey wanting to have good dreams and aspirations.

A person stands on a sidewalk looking at a car dealership through the window. Inside, a shiny new car is displayed on a showroom floor. The person's expression is wistful and longing, hands in pockets. A price tag is visible on the car. The window reflection shows the person gazing. The scene conveys the desire to own a car someday in the future.

A person with long, flowing hair stands in a natural setting, the wind gently blowing their hair behind them. The hair is prominently visible — thick, well-kept, and reaching past their shoulders. The person runs their fingers through it casually. A mirror or reflective window nearby shows their profile. The scene focuses on the physical characteristic of having long hair.

A person sits in a group conversation, laughing openly with a wide smile. Their posture is open and animated — hands gesturing, eyes bright, leaning toward others. The people around them also laugh and engage. The bright, energetic body language radiates positivity. A subtle glow or warm light surrounds the cheerful person. The scene conveys someone who has a bright, outgoing personality.

A person sits at a desk with a notebook and pen, writing a list under a heading that translates to goals or plans. A calendar on the wall has future months with dates circled. A vision board nearby shows images of career achievements, travel, and learning. The person writes deliberately with a focused expression. The scene conveys having and organizing plans for the future.

A person stands in a gym wearing athletic clothing, flexing their arm and looking at their reflection in a full-length mirror. Their physique looks fit and strong. A water bottle and towel sit on a bench nearby. Exercise equipment fills the background. The person's expression mixes determination with aspiration. A thought bubble shows an even fitter version of themselves. The scene conveys wanting a healthy body.

A person stands at the edge of a high diving board or at the start of a race, fists clenched at their sides, jaw set with determination. Their posture is upright and resolute. A challenging course or height is visible ahead. The person takes a deep breath and steps forward. Other competitors or onlookers watch. The scene conveys facing a challenge with courage and determination.

A person sits at a table in an art studio surrounded by sketches, canvases, and paintbrushes. They lean forward, examining a half-finished painting with intense interest. Art books are open around them. The walls display their previous artworks. Paint is on their fingers. Their deep focus and the abundant art supplies convey having a strong passion and interest in drawing and art.

22.word_prompt: A grid of individual items arranged in neat, separate rows — each item is distinct and different from its neighbors. Labels or small identifier cards sit beside each item. The layout emphasizes individuality within a collection: each element has its own space, its own characteristics, and its own label. The items could be bottles, books, or boxes, each unique in color or shape. The overall composition communicates the concept of 'each one' being separate and distinct.
sentences: A world map on a wall with small illustrated icons representing different cultures next to different countries — a pagoda near one region, pyramids near another, a windmill near a third, and so on. Each country has its own distinct cultural symbol. A person stands beside the map, pointing at different regions. The diversity and uniqueness of each country's culture is visually emphasized.

A classroom scene where students stand one at a time at the front of the class, giving individual presentations. One student currently stands at the podium holding note cards while classmates sit at desks listening. A list on the board shows each student's name with a checkmark next to those who have already presented. The sequential, individual nature of each student's turn is clear.

An office workspace divided into distinct team areas, each marked with a different colored banner or label. Each team cluster shows people working on visibly different tasks — one team reviews blueprints, another types at computers, a third discusses around a whiteboard. The separate activities of each team are clearly distinguishable. The dividers and labels emphasize each team doing different work.

A kitchen counter with separate small bowls, each containing a different cooking ingredient — one with diced onions, one with minced garlic, one with sliced carrots, one with measured spices. Each bowl has a small label beside it. A person stands behind the counter with a satisfied expression, having prepared each ingredient individually. A recipe card is propped up nearby.

A travel display showing three or four city postcards or posters side by side — one of a coastal city with beaches, one of a mountainous city with snow peaks, one of a historical city with old architecture. Each postcard has distinctive landmarks. A person examines them, comparing the unique features. The arrangement emphasizes each city having its own distinct character.

An office scene where multiple workers sit at individual desks, each engaged in a different task — one person types a report, another makes a phone call, a third organizes files, a fourth reads documents. Each person is focused on their own specific work. Desk name plates are visible. The parallel independent activity of each person at their own station is the focus.

A restaurant menu board showing multiple dishes listed vertically, each with a different price written beside it. The prices vary noticeably from item to item. A customer stands at the counter looking up at the board, finger moving down the list comparing prices. Each menu item's distinct price is clearly visible. The varied pricing for each dish is the key visual element.

A school hallway wall displays a class schedule grid. Each row represents a different class period — language, math, science, art — and each shows a duration of 50 minutes. A clock icon beside each entry shows the same 50-minute block. A student looks at the schedule, checking their next class. The uniform duration applied to each individual class is clearly displayed.

A hotel corridor with numbered doors on both sides. Through each open doorway, the interior is partially visible — and each room contains a neatly made bed. The beds are identical in each room. A hotel worker checks rooms one by one with a clipboard. The repetition of a bed in each separate room is the visual theme, conveying the same feature present in every individual room.

An artist's palette with separate dollops of paint — red, blue, yellow, green, purple, orange — each occupying its own distinct space on the palette. Beside the palette, a color theory chart shows each color linked to a different symbolic meaning or emotion. A painter examines the chart thoughtfully, brush in hand. Each color's unique identity and meaning is visually distinct.

23.word_prompt: A horizontal timeline bar stretching across the center of the scene, with two activity icons at either end and a highlighted segment in the middle representing a period of time between or during events. A clock sits above the timeline showing time passing. Two overlapping activity scenes — one main task and one interruption or simultaneous action — appear along the bar. The visual conveys the concept of a time interval or a period during which something occurs simultaneously.
sentences: A person sits at a dining table with a bowl of rice and side dishes, chopsticks in one hand and a spoonful of food raised to their mouth. Their phone on the table suddenly rings, the screen lighting up with an incoming call notification. The person pauses mid-bite and looks at the phone with mild surprise. The meal is clearly interrupted by the phone call arriving while eating.

A classroom scene during a break between lessons. Students are at their desks — some stretch, some chat, and one student rests their head on folded arms for a quick nap. A clock on the wall shows a time between class periods. The teacher's desk is temporarily empty. Textbooks are open but paused. The scene conveys taking a brief rest during the class period.

A person sits on a bench in a waiting area — a bus stop or a doctor's office — holding an open book, reading intently. A clock on the wall or their watch is visible. Other people sit nearby, some checking phones. The person is absorbed in their book to pass time while waiting. The scene clearly shows reading as an activity done during a waiting interval.

A person stands at a kitchen stove stirring a pot. Suddenly their attention shifts to a phone on the counter which has lit up with an incoming call. The person holds the stirring spoon in one hand and reaches for the phone with the other. Steam rises from the pot. The scene captures a phone call interrupting someone who is in the middle of cooking.

A person sits on a bus looking out the window with earbuds in, listening to music. The phone screen in their lap shows a music player app. Other passengers sit nearby. A person at a gym pauses between exercises, standing beside a weight bench. They pick up a water bottle and take a long drink. Sweat is visible on their forehead and workout clothes. A student sits at a study desk with textbooks and notebooks open. They lean back in their chair, stretching their arms above their head and yawning. A timer or clock on the desk shows they have been studying for a while. A cup of tea sits nearby. The brief stretch is a momentary break during an ongoing study session. The books remain open.

A person sits at an office desk with a computer monitor, papers, and files spread around. They push back from the desk slightly and unwrap a sandwich or open a lunch container. A clock shows midday. A person walks through a shopping mall carrying several shopping bags. They pause at a cafe counter in the mall and order a coffee. A person walks along a scenic coastal path or through a historic town during a vacation, holding a camera. They stop frequently to photograph buildings, landscapes, and interesting details. 24.word_prompt: A kitchen counter with just three or four basic ingredients laid out — an egg, a slice of bread, and butter — beside a finished dish that looks clean and minimal. sentences: A person stands at a kitchen counter with a few simple ingredients — eggs, vegetables, and rice. A completed dish sits on a plate nearby, looking appetizing despite minimal preparation steps. A recipe card propped up beside the stove shows only three short steps. The person gestures at the easy recipe with a confident smile. The scene conveys a dish that is simple to prepare.

A person sits at a table with a small appliance — a coffee maker or blender — and a simple instruction manual open to one page showing just a few steps with clear diagrams. The person presses a single button on the machine and it operates immediately. Their relaxed expression shows no confusion or difficulty. A student sits at a desk looking at a homework sheet. The problems on the page appear short and uncomplicated. The student writes answers quickly with a relaxed, almost bored expression. A person sits at a small kitchen table eating a minimal breakfast — a piece of toast, a boiled egg, and a glass of juice. A person stands at a whiteboard during a presentation. Instead of complex charts, the whiteboard shows a simple diagram with just a few boxes and arrows clearly connecting ideas. A person stands in a park demonstrating a simple stretching exercise — arms raised overhead in a basic stretch. A person holds a smartphone with an app open on the screen. The app interface is clean and minimal — large buttons, clear icons, and an intuitive layout. A person sits at an administrative office counter filling out a short form. The form has only a few fields — name, date, and one checkbox. The clerk behind the counter smiles reassuringly. Two people sit on a couch, one explaining the rules of a board game to the other. The game board on the coffee table is straightforward with a clear path and simple pieces. A person sits at a cafe table with a small plate containing a simple sandwich — just bread, lettuce, and a single filling — alongside a cup of soup. The meal is modest in portion and presentation. A person sits at a cafe table with a simple plate — a sandwich cut in half and a small cup of soup. They eat quickly, checking their watch. The meal is modest and consumed efficiently. A person stands at a podium addressing a small group, holding up one finger as if making a single clear point. A person stands beside an open suitcase that contains only a few essential items — one change of clothes, a toiletry bag, and a phone charger. The suitcase is mostly empty and very light. A person stands in front of a small group in a casual meeting setting, one hand raised as they speak a few brief sentences about themselves. A name tag is visible on their shirt. A person sits at a computer desk, typing a short email visible on the screen. The email body contains only three or four lines of text. A send button is about to be clicked. A person sits at a desk with a math or logic problem written on paper. They work through it quickly, writing just a few steps to reach the answer. A pencil moves decisively across the page. A person stands at a kitchen counter with just a few items — bread, butter, and a piece of fruit. They quickly assemble a simple plate of food in just a minute or two. A person stands before a group of seated colleagues in a meeting room, pointing at a brief chart on a screen that shows a simple bar graph with clear results. A person moves quickly through a small apartment with a spray bottle and cloth, wiping down surfaces rapidly — the kitchen counter, a table top, a window sill. A child enters through a front door wearing a school backpack, dropping it on a chair. A person stands at a kitchen counter with a bowl of seasoned vegetables. Beside the bowl are two bottles — one of soy sauce and one of sesame oil. The person pours a measured amount of soy sauce over the vegetable dish, then adds a drizzle of sesame oil. The vegetables glisten with the added seasonings. Tongs or chopsticks mix the dish.

A person stands at a stove tasting soup from a ladle with a thoughtful expression. The soup in the pot looks like it needs more flavor. A person prepares raw meat in a large bowl for marinating. They pour soy sauce over the sliced meat, along with garlic and sugar. The marinating process with soy sauce as the key ingredient is the focus.

A plate with a sunny-side-up fried egg sits on a table. A person picks up a bottle of soy sauce and drizzles a small amount over the egg. A person opens a refrigerator door and looks inside. The shelf where soy sauce usually sits is empty — only a faint ring mark remains. The person holds the empty bottle in their hand and examines it with a disappointed expression. A grocery list notepad on the fridge door gets a new item written on it. A bottle of soy sauce sits prominently in the center of the counter, and traces of the dark sauce are visible in each dish being prepared. A chart hangs at the foot of the bed. A clock on the wall shows early morning. The room has medical monitors and an IV stand. The nurse records the temperature reading on the chart.

A woman in a nurse's uniform stands at the entrance of a hospital building, smiling and holding a medical folder. Behind her, the hospital interior is visible — reception desk, waiting area, and medical staff moving about. A name badge and stethoscope confirm her role. A younger person beside her points at the nurse proudly, introducing her as a family member who works there.

A nurse in a clinical setting gently holds a patient's arm, preparing to give an injection. The patient sits in a chair with their sleeve rolled up. A hospital room scene where a patient lies in bed and presses the call button on a bedside panel. A nurse enters through the doorway, approaching the bed with a concerned and attentive expression. The patient gestures and explains their need. The nurse listens carefully, holding a notepad. The interaction shows a patient summoning a nurse for assistance.

A young person sits at a study desk surrounded by medical textbooks, anatomy charts, and nursing study guides. On the wall, a poster shows a nurse in a hospital setting. The student looks at the poster with a determined, aspirational expression. A university brochure for a nursing program lies open on the desk. A nurse stands beside a seated patient in an examination room, wrapping a blood pressure cuff around the patient's upper arm. The nurse pumps the cuff and watches the gauge carefully. The patient inside the room is sitting up in bed, waiting. The nurse presents the medication tray with a kind smile. The scene conveys a nurse bringing medicine to a recovering patient.

A person in nursing attire with a stethoscope around their neck stands in a hospital break room, holding a coffee mug. A calendar on the wall has three years marked since their start date.
