A person rides a bicycle along a dedicated bike path that runs parallel to a wide river. The path is smooth and flat. The river stretches out to the left, and a city skyline is visible across the water. Other cyclists ride ahead. The person pedals at a comfortable pace, the scene bright and breezy.

A family of four sits on a large blanket spread on the grassy bank of a river. A picnic basket is open with sandwiches, fruit, and drinks arranged on the blanket. The river flows calmly just meters away. Children play near the water's edge. The parents sit relaxed, watching the river and the children. The sky is clear.

A winter scene of a river completely frozen over. The ice surface is thick and opaque white. Snow dusts the frozen river and the banks. A person stands at the river's edge looking out at the frozen expanse. Bare trees line both banks. The sky is gray and cold. The stillness of the frozen river contrasts with its usual flow.

A person stands on a riverbank holding a camera to their eye, photographing the river scenery. The river reflects a colorful sunset in orange and pink hues. A bridge in the distance is silhouetted against the sky. The photographer is absorbed in capturing the scene. The composition is scenic and picturesque.

A dramatic scene of a swollen river after heavy rain. Brown, turbid water rushes past well above the normal waterline. Riverside walkways and benches are partially submerged. Warning signs or barriers are placed along the bank. Rain continues to fall. The contrast with the usually calm river is stark and alarming.

48.word_prompt: A small, fluffy puppy sits on a grassy lawn, head tilted to one side with bright, curious eyes. Its tail wags energetically. A red collar with a small tag hangs around its neck. A chew toy lies on the grass beside it. The puppy's fur is soft and well-groomed. The background shows a backyard with a fence and a garden path. The scene is warm and endearing, capturing the playful innocence of a young dog.
sentences: A family living room with a small puppy curled up on a cushion near the sofa. A food bowl and water dish sit on the floor nearby. A child sits on the carpet beside the puppy, gently stroking its back. Family photos and home decor fill the background. The puppy looks content and comfortable in its home environment.

A person walks a small puppy on a leash through a sunny park. The puppy trots eagerly ahead, ears flopping and tail wagging. The park has green grass, a pathway, and trees. Other park visitors walk or sit on benches in the background. The person holds the leash with one hand and smiles watching the puppy explore.

A close-up of a tiny puppy looking directly at the viewer with large, round eyes and a small pink tongue slightly visible. Its ears are floppy and its fur is fluffy and soft. The puppy sits on a person's lap. The person's hands gently cradle the puppy. The background is soft-focused and warm-toned.

A person kneels on the ground and gently strokes a small puppy behind the ears. The puppy leans into the touch, eyes half-closed in enjoyment. The person's expression is tender and affectionate. A park or backyard setting with grass and a fence is visible. A leash is coiled on the ground nearby.

A person crouches at a kitchen floor, placing a bowl of dog food in front of a small, eager puppy. The puppy's nose is close to the bowl, tail wagging rapidly. A bag of dog food sits on the counter above. A water bowl is already in place beside the food bowl. The kitchen floor is clean and the scene is domestic.

A person carries a small puppy wrapped in a blanket through the entrance of a veterinary clinic. The clinic has a reception desk, chairs, and animal care posters on the wall. The puppy looks listless, head drooping. The person has a worried, concerned expression. A vet or receptionist looks up from the desk.

A person kneels beside a bathtub where a small, wet puppy stands in a few inches of soapy water. The person lathers the puppy's fur with dog shampoo, suds covering the puppy's back. The puppy has a resigned but patient expression. Towels and a brush sit on the bathroom floor. Water droplets splash around the tub.

A front door opens and a person steps inside. On the floor just inside the entrance, a small puppy jumps excitedly, front paws up, tail a blur of wagging. The person sets down their bag and crouches to greet the puppy with open arms and a big smile. The entryway has shoes and a coat rack visible.

Inside a pet store, a person stands before a glass enclosure where several puppies of different breeds sit and play. The person leans close to the glass, watching one particular puppy with a delighted, cooing expression. The pet store has shelves of pet supplies and accessories visible in the background. Small name cards are on each enclosure.

A person sits cross-legged on a grassy lawn, rolling a small rubber ball across the ground toward a puppy. The puppy chases the ball with clumsy, bounding steps, ears bouncing. The person laughs and reaches out to catch the puppy. The backyard has a fence and a garden. The scene is playful and energetic.

49.word_prompt: A classroom or seminar room set up for a course or lecture. A podium or instructor's desk is at the front with a projector screen displaying educational content — charts, diagrams, or lesson titles. Several students sit at desks or tables with notebooks and laptops open. A whiteboard behind the podium has an outline or agenda written on it. Course materials — printed handouts and textbooks — are stacked on the desks. The atmosphere is focused and educational.
sentences: A person sits at a kitchen counter in an apron, following along with a cooking class. An instructor at the front of a teaching kitchen demonstrates knife skills on a cutting board. Other students at their own stations watch and replicate the cuts. Ingredients and utensils are arranged neatly at each station. A recipe sheet sits propped up at each station.

A person sits at a desk at home with a laptop open, watching an online lecture. The laptop screen shows a teacher presenting slides on a virtual whiteboard. The person takes notes in a notebook beside the laptop. Headphones are on their ears. A cup of coffee sits on the desk. The home office is quiet and organized.

A library interior with a group of adults seated in a semicircle around an instructor who stands beside a flip chart. The flip chart has vocabulary words and grammar points written on it. The students hold textbooks and some take notes. Bookshelves line the walls behind the group. The session has a structured, educational atmosphere.

A community cultural center room with a person seated at a table, drawing on a large sketch pad with colored pencils. An art instructor walks among several students, leaning over one shoulder to provide guidance. Easels and art supplies are distributed throughout the room. Completed artwork hangs on the walls for inspiration.

A person sits in a music studio holding an acoustic guitar, looking at a music stand with sheet music. An instructor beside them demonstrates a chord position on their own guitar. The student mirrors the hand position. Music equipment — amplifiers and microphones — is in the background. The room is acoustically treated with foam panels on walls.

A student sits in a classroom at a cram school or tutoring academy. A teacher at the whiteboard writes mathematical equations. The student focuses on the board, copying problems into a workbook. Other students sit in adjacent seats with similar workbooks. The classroom is compact with fluorescent lighting and educational charts on the walls.

A group of people on yoga mats in a bright, airy studio. An instructor at the front demonstrates a yoga pose — arms extended, one leg raised. Participants follow the pose with varying degrees of accuracy. The studio has large windows, mirrors, and a wooden floor. A calm, focused energy permeates the scene.

A bulletin board or schedule posted on a wall lists various courses with their times and days. A person stands in front of it, finger tracing along the rows, checking the time for a specific course. The schedule shows different subjects in a grid format. The setting is a community center or school hallway.

A person sits at an information desk speaking with a staff member. A brochure showing various courses and their monthly fees is spread open on the counter between them. The person points at one listing and appears to ask a question. The staff member looks at the brochure and responds helpfully. Posters for courses are visible on the walls.

A classroom setting where a beginner-friendly course is in session. The instructor writes basic concepts on a whiteboard with large, clear handwriting. Students of varying ages sit attentively, some nodding along. The materials on the desks are introductory level. The overall atmosphere is welcoming and accessible, designed for newcomers.

50.word_prompt: A person holds an object securely in both hands — a book, a phone, or a bag — close to their body, conveying possession and ownership. Their grip is firm but comfortable. Behind them, a shelf or table displays more personal items: a wallet, keys, and a notebook. The person's posture is upright and their expression is calm and assured. The scene emphasizes the concept of having and holding something in one's possession.
sentences: A person sits at a desk in a modern home office with an open laptop in front of them. Their hands rest on the keyboard. A phone and a mug are beside the laptop. The desk is organized with personal items — pens, a notepad, and a lamp. The person appears comfortable and settled, clearly owning and using the device.

A person stands at a doorway, about to step outside. One hand reaches for an umbrella standing in a rack by the door. Through the window beside the door, a cloudy, overcast sky is visible. The person pulls the umbrella from the rack decisively. A coat and shoes are already on. Rain gear is ready.

A person sits at a table browsing art books and music albums. They hold a record album cover up and examine it with an engaged, interested expression. Headphones hang around their neck. Musical instruments or art prints are visible in the background. The person's body language suggests deep personal interest and passion for the subject.

Two people face each other in a classroom or office. One person holds up a pen and asks a question, gesturing toward the other. The other person checks their pockets and bag, then holds up a pen of their own, nodding. The exchange is simple and direct. Stationery items are visible on the desk between them.

A person sits on a park bench with a thoughtful expression, chin resting on their hand. They gaze into the distance at a professional office building. A thought bubble or dreamy haze suggests they are imagining themselves working in such a place. A briefcase or professional bag sits beside them on the bench. The aspiration is clear in their expression.

A person extends a glass of water toward another person who sits at a table. The seated person reaches out to take the glass with both hands. The interaction is a simple act of bringing something requested. A kitchen counter and sink are visible in the background. The exchange is warm and helpful.

A person stands at their front door, holding a passport and a printed boarding pass, checking both carefully. An open suitcase sits in the hallway behind them, fully packed. A checklist on the wall has items checked off. The person's focused expression suggests they are making sure they have everything essential for their trip.

A child sits at a piano, playing with natural ease and focus. Their fingers move across the keys confidently. A parent or teacher stands behind them, nodding proudly. Sheet music is open on the piano stand. The child's posture and expression suggest natural ability. A trophy or certificate sits on the piano top.

A person frantically searches through a bag, then checks a table and shelves with a worried expression. They hold up their empty hands to show someone else in the room. The other person picks up a phone from a sofa cushion and holds it up, having found it. Relief washes over the searcher's face.

A person walks carefully along a busy street, hands in jacket pockets, shoulders slightly hunched, eyes scanning the surroundings attentively. Their posture and expression convey caution and alertness. The street is crowded with pedestrians and shops. A crosswalk and traffic are visible. The person moves with deliberate, mindful awareness.

51.word_prompt: Two identical objects placed side by side on a clean surface — two matching coffee mugs, two identical books, or two identical shoes. A visual equals sign or mirror effect emphasizes their sameness. The objects share the exact same color, shape, and size. A ruler or measuring tape between them confirms their equal dimensions. The background is neutral and uncluttered, drawing attention to the perfect match between the two items.
sentences: Two handbags are placed side by side on a store counter. They are identical in design, shape, and material, but a closer look reveals they are also the same color. A person points at both bags, noting their identical shade. The store lighting highlights the matching colors clearly. Price tags hang from both bags.

Two people who look remarkably alike — same hairstyle, similar facial features, and matching outfits — stand side by side facing the viewer. They could be twins. Their posture and expressions mirror each other. A person nearby does a double take, looking back and forth between them with a surprised, amused expression.

A person sits at a restaurant table with a plate of food in front of them. They take a bite and pause, eyes looking upward in thought, clearly comparing the taste to a memory. A thought bubble or faint overlay shows the same dish from the day before. The person's expression indicates the taste is identical to what they remember.

A teacher stands at a whiteboard with an opinion written on it. A student raises their hand and nods vigorously in agreement. Both the teacher and student point at the same statement on the board. Their expressions and body language clearly indicate shared agreement — they think the same way about the topic.

A person stands in a store aisle, holding their phone with a price comparison page open. They look at a price tag on the shelf, then at their phone, then back at the tag. Both prices are visibly the same number. The person's expression shows mild surprise or confirmation. The store aisle and products are clearly visible.

Two people of similar build stand back to back while a third person holds a flat board or ruler across the tops of their heads to compare height. The ruler is perfectly level, showing they are the exact same height. Both people smile and look at each other over their shoulders. A door frame or wall marks the spot.

A person stands outside looking at the sky, dressed in the same lightweight jacket they wore the day before. The sky looks identically overcast both today and in a small photo they hold showing yesterday's weather. Trees and the street are the same in both the photo and the live scene. The weather conditions are clearly unchanged.

Two students sit side by side at a desk, each looking at their class schedule or timetable printed on paper. They point at the same time slot on each schedule, discovering that their classes start at the exact same time. Their expressions show pleasant surprise. The classroom clock matches the time shown on the schedules.

Two friends sit across from each other at a table, each holding hobby-related items — both have sketchbooks, drawing pencils, or both hold gaming controllers. They look at each other with knowing grins, recognizing they share the same interest. The matching items are prominently displayed. The setting is casual, a living room or cafe.

A teacher calls roll in a classroom and two students both raise their hands at the same time when one name is called. The teacher pauses, looking between the two students with a clipboard in hand. Both students look at each other and smile. Other students turn to look at the pair. The classroom setting is typical with desks and a blackboard.

52.word_prompt: Two people walk side by side along a tree-lined path, their strides perfectly synchronized. One person gestures animatedly while the other listens and laughs. Their shoulders nearly touch, conveying closeness and companionship. The path stretches ahead through dappled sunlight. The scene radiates warmth and togetherness. Both carry matching elements — similar backpacks, drinks, or books — reinforcing the sense of doing something jointly.
sentences: Two friends sit across from each other at a restaurant table, each with a tray of lunch in front of them — bowls of soup, rice, and side dishes. They clink their water glasses together, smiling. The restaurant is a casual lunch spot with other diners visible. Both friends have relaxed, happy expressions as they eat together.

Two students in school uniforms walk side by side along a sidewalk toward a school building visible ahead. Their backpacks bounce as they walk. They chat and gesture, matching each other's pace. Other students walk along the same route. The morning light is soft and the school gate is open in the background.

Two people sit at a library table across from each other, each with an open textbook and a notebook. One person leans over to point at something in the other's book. Both have pens in hand and look focused. The library is quiet with tall bookshelves visible. A shared stack of reference books sits between them.

Two friends sit in a darkened movie theater, sharing a large bucket of popcorn between them. The screen ahead glows with a film scene. Both look at the screen with engaged, entertained expressions. One reaches for popcorn while the other sips a drink. The theater seats stretch into rows behind them.

Two people walk through an outdoor market, each carrying a shopping bag. They stop at a stall and one points at an item while the other considers it. The market stalls are colorful with produce, clothing, and goods displayed. Both people examine the products together, making a joint decision. The market is bustling.

Two people in athletic clothing jog side by side on a park path in the early morning. Mist hangs over the grass. Both have similar running postures and pace. They exchange a glance and a smile mid-stride. Trees line the path and the sun is low on the horizon. The scene is fresh and energetic.

A group of friends stands close together, arms around each other's shoulders, posing for a photo. One person holds a selfie stick or a phone extended in front of the group. Everyone smiles broadly. A scenic background — a landmark, a park, or a beach — is visible behind them. The composition captures a group photo moment.

Two coworkers or friends walk side by side out of an office building at the end of the day. Both carry work bags. The sky shows evening colors. They walk in sync toward a parking lot or train station, chatting casually. The building entrance and other departing workers are visible behind them.

A person walks a dog on a leash along a riverside path. The dog trots happily beside the person, matching their pace. Trees and the river are visible to one side. The person looks down at the dog and smiles. Both are in motion together, walking in the same direction. The path curves ahead into the park.

A group of friends stands around a karaoke machine or microphone stand in a private room. Two of them hold microphones and sing enthusiastically, mouths open wide. Others clap along and wave light sticks. A colorful screen shows lyrics. The room is decorated with party lighting. Everyone is participating and having fun together.

53.word_prompt: A medium-sized dog sits attentively on a grassy area, ears perked up and tongue slightly out. Beside the dog on the grass, a set of small round objects — apples, balls, or blocks — are arranged in a counted group, each one distinct and countable. A leash is coiled on the ground nearby. The dog and the countable items together represent both meanings: a dog as an animal, and the counting unit for objects. The background is a simple park or yard setting.
sentences: A living room scene with a medium-sized dog lying on a pet bed near a sofa. A food and water bowl sit on the floor nearby. A family member sits on the sofa, reaching down to pet the dog. The room has home furnishings and a rug. The dog wears a collar with a tag. The scene is domestic and comfortable.

A person stands at a fruit stand in a market, placing three shiny red apples into a paper bag. Three apples are clearly visible — one already in the bag and two being placed. The fruit stand has rows of other fruits. A scale and price signs are visible. The person counts the apples as they bag them.

A large, fluffy dog stands behind a fence at a zoo or animal park, looking out at visitors. Children point at the dog excitedly. The dog is large and impressive with a thick coat. A small informational sign on the fence describes the breed. The zoo path and other enclosures are visible in the background.

A person holds up a handful of pencils fanned out, counting them. Their other hand points at each pencil individually. A pencil case and an open notebook sit on the desk. The person's lips appear to be counting silently. The desk has a school-supply setup — ruler, eraser, and sharpener. The scene is a study desk at home or school.

A nighttime suburban scene with a dog behind a fence, barking with head raised and mouth open wide. Sound wave lines emanate from the dog's mouth indicating loud barking. A neighbor's window is illuminated, and a person inside presses a pillow over their ears with a frustrated expression. The contrast between the loud dog and the sleepless neighbor is clear.

A person stands at a table distributing snacks — crackers or small pastries — to a group of children seated around the table. The person places exactly two items in front of each child. Each child's portion is clearly countable. The children watch eagerly. The setting is a classroom or a party table with plates and napkins.

A person walks a dog on a leash along a quiet morning street. The dog trots ahead, sniffing the ground. The person holds the leash in one hand and a plastic bag in the other. Trees line the residential street. The morning light is soft. The routine walk is clearly a daily occurrence, the person relaxed and comfortable.

A person stands in a grocery store aisle, looking at a carton of eggs. They open the carton to count ten eggs arranged in rows. Their finger points at each egg as they count. The dairy section refrigerators are visible behind them. A shopping basket hangs from their other arm.

A child sits on the living room floor, face pressed against a dog that lies beside them, hugging it gently. An adult stands nearby with arms crossed, listening to the child who appears to be asking or pleading. The dog looks up with expectant eyes. A pet adoption pamphlet lies on the coffee table.

A bakery counter display shows rows of bread rolls and pastries behind glass. A customer points at specific items and the baker uses tongs to place five pieces of bread into a paper bag, counting each one. The customer watches the count. The bakery is small and warm, with more baked goods on shelves behind the counter.

54.word_prompt: A bush bursting with bright yellow forsythia flowers in full bloom. The thin, arching branches are covered end-to-end with small four-petaled yellow blossoms, with hardly any green leaves yet visible. The bush stands beside a park walkway. Sunlight illuminates the vivid yellow against a backdrop of a still-wintry landscape beginning to show signs of spring. Fallen yellow petals scatter on the ground beneath the bush. The scene captures the quintessential early spring flower.
sentences: A hillside covered in bright yellow forsythia bushes in full bloom. The vivid yellow flowers blanket the slope against a backdrop of blue spring sky. A person walks along a path at the base of the hill, looking up at the flowers. Other bare or just-budding trees contrast with the brilliant yellow. Cherry blossoms are faintly visible nearby.

A person stands beside a bush of bright yellow flowers, pointing at the blooms and appearing to identify them to a companion. The companion looks at the flowers and nods. The bush is covered in small, four-petaled yellow blossoms on arching brown branches. A park setting with paths and benches is visible.

A park walkway lined with forsythia bushes in spectacular full bloom. The yellow flowers form a continuous wall of bright color on both sides of the path. A person walks along the path, surrounded by the yellow display. Petals drift in the breeze. The sun shines brightly and the sky is clear spring blue.

A seasonal transition scene: a tree in the background still has bare branches, while a forsythia bush in the foreground erupts with yellow blooms. A robin or small bird perches on a branch. A calendar on a nearby wall or post shows a spring month. The contrast between lingering winter and arriving spring is vivid, with the yellow flowers as the herald.

A close-up of a forsythia branch showing individual four-petaled flowers in vivid, saturated yellow. The petals are delicate and bright against the brown bark. Sunlight backlights the petals, making them glow. No leaves are visible yet — only flowers along the thin branch. The detail of each tiny blossom is clearly rendered.

A residential street with forsythia hedges growing along fences and garden walls. The hedges are covered in yellow blooms, creating streaks of color along the street. A person walking a dog pauses to admire the flowers. Houses and parked cars line the street. The scene captures the everyday beauty of spring in a neighborhood.

A split spring scene: on the left, a bush of bright yellow forsythia flowers; on the right, a bush of pink azalea flowers. Both are in full bloom and growing near each other in a park garden. The yellow and pink create a vivid color contrast. A bench between them offers a viewing spot. Green grass and a pathway are visible.

A person crouches beside a forsythia bush, holding a camera or phone, taking close-up photographs of the yellow blooms. The flowers fill the frame on the device screen. The park setting is sunny with other visitors walking past. The photographer is absorbed in capturing the vibrant yellow details. A camera bag sits on the ground beside them.

A sweeping landscape view of a hillside or park in spring. Large swaths of bright yellow forsythia bushes punctuate the green and brown early-spring terrain. The yellow flowers are widespread across the landscape. A walking trail winds through the scene. People walk in the distance. The profusion of yellow flowers dominates the visual composition.

A person arranges a bouquet of bright yellow forsythia branches in a glass vase on a kitchen table. The branches fan out with their yellow blooms, creating a cheerful arrangement. Scissors and trimmed branch ends lie on the table. The kitchen behind is bright with natural light from a window. The bouquet adds a splash of spring color to the room.

55.word_prompt: A single person stands apart from a crowd or group, their personal space clearly defined. They hold their own items close — a phone, a bag, a notebook — distinguishing their belongings from any shared space. A boundary line or personal desk area emphasizes the individual versus the collective. The person has a composed, self-contained posture. The scene balances individual identity against a broader social backdrop, clearly highlighting the concept of a single person or private individual.
sentences: A person sits at a computer, covering the screen with one hand while typing a password with the other. A lock icon is visible on the screen. The person glances cautiously to the side. A sign or sticker on the monitor says 'Private.' The desk is neat with personal items — a phone, keys, and a wallet — arranged carefully.

A person in a locker room or office places personal items — a wallet, phone, keys, and a water bottle — into a labeled locker or bag. Each item is distinctly their own. Other people's lockers are visible but closed. The person zips the bag securely. A name tag or label is visible on the locker or bag.

A person sits alone in a quiet room — a bedroom or a den — with a book, a cup of tea, and headphones on. A door behind them is closed. The room is their private space, furnished to their taste. A clock shows evening hours. The person's expression is peaceful and content, enjoying solitary time.

An office desk with a person's own mug — distinctively colored or marked with initials — placed beside their keyboard. Other mugs of different styles are in a communal area behind them. The person sips from their personal mug while working. Their desk has a small plant and a personal photo frame. The individualized items stand out from the shared space.

A classroom or workshop with people seated in rows. While the group follows one activity, one person does something slightly different — reading a different book, taking notes in a unique way, or working on a distinct project. The person's individual approach contrasts with the uniform group activity. Their expression is focused and independent.

A person in running clothes jogs alone on a morning trail. They wear earbuds and a fitness tracker on their wrist. No other joggers are nearby. The trail winds through a quiet area with trees and grass. The person's pace is steady and personal — their own routine. A water bottle is clipped to their belt.

A person sits at a computer, creating a new account on a website. The screen shows a registration form with fields for name, email, and password. The person types carefully. A personal ID card or document lies on the desk beside the keyboard. The scene is domestic — a home desk with a lamp and personal items.

A room where a group works at a shared table on a project. One person has separated from the group and sits at their own smaller table, working independently on a different task. They have their own materials — a laptop and a notebook. A divider or gap separates their workspace from the group table. The contrast between individual and group work is clear.

A person stands at a podium or in a meeting, holding up one hand and placing the other on their chest, speaking with conviction. A speech bubble or the person's emphatic gesture indicates they are sharing their own personal view. Other attendees listen with varied expressions. The setting is a conference room or community hall.

A shared office space with a long desk where multiple people work. Each person's section is clearly delineated with personal items — their own plant, their own desk organizer, their own photo frame. One person tidies their specific section, arranging items within their personal boundary. The contrast between the shared desk and the personal zones is visible.

56.word_prompt: A person stands at a moderate distance and points decisively at a specific spot or location ahead of them. Their extended arm and pointed finger direct attention to a particular place — a chair, a table, a building, or a spot on the ground. The indicated location is clearly visible in the scene but at a middle distance, not too close and not too far. The person's gesture is clear and communicative. The setting can be indoors or outdoors with identifiable landmarks.
sentences: A person stands in a room and gestures with an open hand toward an empty chair at a table, indicating where someone should sit. The chair is clearly visible a few steps away. The room has a dining table set for a meal. Another person walks toward the indicated chair. The gesture is inviting and clear.

A person points at a bookshelf across the room where a specific book is visible. The pointed finger is clearly directed at the shelf. The book in question has a distinctive color or position. The person speaks to someone nearby who looks in the direction of the pointing finger. The room is a study or living room with multiple shelves.

A person holds a phone to their ear and looks around the space they are in — a cafe, a park, or a room. Their expression is questioning, as if confirming their location to the caller. Through a window or in the background, identifiable surroundings are visible. The person gestures at the space around them, indicating 'this place.'

A person stands at an intersection and points to the right, giving directions to another person who looks in that direction. The pointed direction is clear — a road turns right and a building or sign is visible along that route. Both people stand at the junction point. The streets and buildings create a navigable scene.

A person on a phone call looks out a window at the sky or the surrounding view. They describe what they see — the weather outside is clearly visible: rain, sun, or clouds. The window frame creates a distinct boundary between the person indoors and the weather outside. The phone conversation is clearly about the conditions 'there.'

Two friends sit together, and one enthusiastically points at a restaurant or shop visible down the street or across the way. The indicated establishment has a visible sign and entrance. The recommending friend's expression is excited. The other friend looks in the indicated direction with interest. The street setting makes the location identifiable.

A person in an office holds a bag or package and points toward a specific spot — a desk corner, a shelf, or the floor near a wall — indicating where to place it. Another person carries the item toward the indicated spot. The office has desks, chairs, and typical furnishings. The pointing gesture is clear and directive.

A person stands at a location — a tourist spot, a park, or a store — and their expression shows recognition. They nod slowly, looking around with a nostalgic half-smile, indicating they have been to this place before. Recognizable features of the location are visible. The person's body language shows familiarity and recollection.

A person looks at a map or a phone navigation screen, then looks up at a road or path stretching into the distance. They check the time on their watch or phone. The destination is not yet visible but the path is long. The person's expression suggests calculation — how long the journey will take. The map or route is visible on the screen.

A person pats the surface of a table, a sofa, or a counter near them, looking at someone else. Their hand pats the surface as if asking 'are my glasses here?' The other person checks the indicated spot and lifts up a pair of glasses that was sitting there. The searcher's expression shifts from questioning to relieved.

57.word_prompt: A wide, busy commercial street lined with shops, cafes, and storefronts on both sides. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. Street lamps and awnings extend from the buildings. The road surface is paved and clean. Trees in planters line the curb. A mix of signs, window displays, and outdoor seating spills onto the sidewalks. The scene captures an active, vibrant urban street environment with foot traffic and commercial energy.
sentences: A lively commercial street with cafes on both sides, each with outdoor seating and colorful awnings. People sit at tables with coffee cups and pastries. Pedestrians walk between the cafes. Shop signs and menu boards are visible. The street is well-maintained and inviting. The overall scene shows a street characterized by its many cafes.

A person strolls down a quiet residential street in the early evening. Street lamps are beginning to glow. The sidewalk is lined with trees casting long shadows. Houses and low buildings line both sides. The person walks at a leisurely pace, hands in pockets, enjoying the evening atmosphere. A cat sits on a wall nearby.

A bustling street food alley with stalls on both sides selling various foods from open counters. Steam rises from grills and pots. Customers stand at the stalls eating from paper containers or skewers. Colorful banners and lights hang overhead. The aromas and activity fill the narrow street. The scene is lively and appetizing.

An extremely crowded pedestrian street on a weekend. People packed shoulder to shoulder move slowly in both directions. Shop entrances are barely visible through the dense crowd. A person in the middle of the crowd looks around with a slightly overwhelmed expression. Neon signs and storefronts glow above the mass of people.

A straight, wide boulevard stretching into the distance. Lane markings are visible on the road. Shops and offices line both sides. A person stands at one end, looking straight down the length of the street, appearing to follow directions. An arrow or clear sightline extends down the road. The perspective creates a vanishing point.

A street decorated for a festival with colorful banners, flags, and lights strung across from building to building. A stage or performance area is set up at one end. People crowd the street, some carrying festival items. The atmosphere is celebratory and lively. A performer or musician is visible on the small stage.

A shopping street with clothing boutiques, accessory shops, and department stores on both sides. Window displays show mannequins in fashionable outfits. People carry shopping bags and browse window displays. The street is bustling with shoppers. Price tags and sale signs are visible in some windows. The overall impression is a premier shopping destination.

A group of people wearing gloves and holding trash bags walks along a street, picking up litter. The street is in the process of being cleaned — half is tidy, the other half has scattered debris. Trash cans and recycling bins are placed along the curb. The volunteers work in coordinated fashion. The cleaned portion of the street looks noticeably better.

A picturesque street with charming architecture — pastel-colored buildings, flower boxes on windowsills, and a cobblestone or brick-paved surface. A person stands in the middle of the street holding a camera, photographing the scene. The street is photogenic with good lighting and symmetry. Other tourists or visitors are visible admiring the streetscape.

A quiet, empty street late at night. Street lamps cast pools of orange light on the pavement. All shops are closed with shutters down. A lone figure walks along the empty sidewalk. The shadows are long and the silence is palpable. The contrast with a daytime bustling street is clear. A distant traffic light changes colors for no one.

58.word_prompt: A spacious, well-furnished living room with a large sofa facing a flat-screen television mounted on the wall. A coffee table sits in the center with a book and a remote control on it. Shelves with decorative items and framed family photos line one wall. A floor lamp casts warm light in the corner. A large window lets natural light pour in. The room is tidy, comfortable, and clearly the main gathering space of a home.
sentences: A wide-angle view of a spacious living room in an apartment. The room has high ceilings, large windows, and a polished floor. A sofa, an armchair, and a coffee table are arranged in the center. The room feels airy and open. A person stands in the doorway with arms spread wide, proudly showing off the generous space.

A person reclines on a sofa in a living room, remote control in hand, watching a television mounted on the opposite wall. The TV screen shows a drama scene. A bowl of snacks sits on the coffee table. The room is dimly lit for comfortable viewing. Cushions and a throw blanket make the sofa look cozy.

A family of four — two adults and two children — sits together on a large sofa in their living room. They are gathered around a board game or puzzle on the coffee table. Everyone is engaged, laughing or concentrating. The living room is warmly lit with a floor lamp. Family photos hang on the wall behind the sofa.

A person stands at the living room entrance, gesturing welcomingly toward the sofa. A guest follows behind, looking around the living room with interest. The sofa has plumped cushions and the coffee table has a tray with cups. The room is tidy and presentable. The host's posture is inviting, guiding the guest inside.

A person pushes a vacuum cleaner across the living room floor. The coffee table and chairs have been moved slightly aside. A spray bottle and a cloth sit on the table. The person works methodically across the floor. The room is bright with morning light from the windows. Half the floor looks freshly cleaned.

A living room interior showing a comfortable three-seat sofa against one wall, facing a TV console on the opposite wall. A bookshelf stands in one corner. Cushions are arranged on the sofa. The coffee table has a potted plant on it. The overall layout is balanced and homey. The sofa is the prominent piece in the room.

A person lies on a sofa in a living room, one arm behind their head, eyes closed in relaxation. They still wear office clothes, tie loosened and shoes kicked off on the floor. A work bag sits by the door. The room is quiet and softly lit by a lamp. The person's expression is one of relief after a long day.

A person places a glass vase of fresh flowers on the living room coffee table. The flowers are colorful — yellow, pink, and white blooms. The living room behind the flowers has a sofa, curtains, and framed artwork on the wall. The flowers brighten the space visibly. The person steps back to admire the arrangement.

A floor plan or interior view showing the living room connected to the kitchen through an open archway or doorway. The living room has a sofa and TV, while the kitchen is visible through the opening with a counter and stove. A person walks from one room to the other. The proximity and adjacency of the two spaces is clear.

A toddler sits on the living room carpet surrounded by colorful building blocks and stuffed animals. The child stacks blocks with concentration. The living room sofa and coffee table are visible in the background. A parent sits nearby on the floor, watching the child play. The scene is domestic, warm, and child-friendly.

59.word_prompt: A rectangular wall mirror with a simple frame hangs on a bright wall. The mirror's reflective surface shows the room behind the viewer — furniture, a window, and part of a person reflected back. A small shelf below the mirror holds a hairbrush and a few toiletries. The mirror's surface is clean and gleaming. The frame is wood or metal with a modest design. The setting is a bedroom or bathroom with good lighting illuminating the mirror.
sentences: A person stands in front of a wall mirror in an entryway, running a comb through their hair. Their reflection shows them adjusting their hairstyle and checking their appearance. A jacket and bag hang on a hook nearby, ready to go. The mirror reflects the hallway behind them. The person's expression is focused on grooming before heading out.

A person leans over a bathroom sink, splashing water on their face. A large mirror above the sink reflects their face with water droplets. A towel hangs on a rack beside the sink. Toiletries — toothbrush, soap, and a cup — sit on the sink edge. The bathroom tiles and overhead light are visible. The morning routine is clearly underway.

A person stands in front of a full-length mirror in a clothing store fitting room. They wear a newly tried-on outfit and turn slightly to check the side view. The mirror reflects the full outfit from head to toe. Tags dangle from the clothing. The person tugs at the hem or adjusts the collar, evaluating the fit.

A person walks through a home furnishing store, pausing to look at a display of mirrors in various shapes and sizes — round, rectangular, and ornate. They hold one oval mirror up, checking the reflection and the frame design. Price stickers are on each mirror. The person appears to be choosing one for their room.

A person sprays glass cleaner on a bathroom mirror and wipes it with a cloth in circular motions. Half the mirror is clean and sparkling while the other half still has water spots and smudges. The contrast between the clean and dirty halves is visible. The person works carefully to remove every streak.

A person stares at their own reflection in a mirror with a contemplative expression. The mirror clearly shows their face and upper body reflected back. They touch their cheek or chin thoughtfully. The room behind them in the reflection is softly lit. The scene is introspective and quiet, focusing on the self-reflection moment.

A person unwraps a small gift box and pulls out a compact handheld mirror with a decorative back. They flip it open and look at their reflection in the small mirror, smiling. Wrapping paper and ribbon lie on the table. The gift giver watches with a pleased expression. The compact mirror is detailed and ornate.

A person sits in a salon chair facing a large mirror. A hairstylist stands behind them, cutting or styling their hair. The mirror reflects both the client and the stylist at work. Scissors, combs, and hair products are on the counter below the mirror. The salon has other chairs and mirrors along the wall.

A person rummages in their bag and pulls out a small compact mirror. They flip it open and check their reflection quickly — adjusting a collar, checking their teeth, or fixing their hair. The compact mirror is small and portable. The setting is an outdoor street, a bus stop, or an office hallway. The person's action is quick and discreet.

A bedroom scene with a standing vanity mirror placed beside a bed. The mirror reflects the window and the bed behind the viewer. A nightstand with a lamp and a glass of water is next to the bed. The mirror is positioned at a practical angle for dressing. The room is neat and personal, with the mirror as a key furnishing.

60.word_prompt: A progress bar on a screen showing approximately 95% completion — the bar is nearly full but not quite. A small gap remains at the end. The percentage text shows a number just below 100. Below the progress bar, a person watches expectantly, tapping their fingers. A clock nearby shows time passing. The concept of 'almost' or 'nearly' is conveyed through the near-complete visual indicator. The scene communicates being very close to finishing but not yet there.
sentences: A student sits at a desk with a stack of homework papers. Most pages are completed and placed in a 'done' pile, with only one or two sheets remaining in the 'to-do' pile. The student writes on the last page, pen moving quickly. A clock on the wall shows a late hour. The nearly empty 'to-do' pile conveys the task is almost finished.

A person looks at an hourglass on a table. Almost all the sand has fallen to the bottom chamber, with only a thin trickle remaining in the top. The person watches the last grains fall with an attentive, slightly tense expression. A deadline or event is implied. The hourglass visually represents time that has almost completely elapsed.

A person opens a refrigerator that is nearly empty. The shelves are bare except for a single lonely bottle and perhaps a small container. The person looks inside with a disappointed expression. The bare, brightly lit interior of the nearly empty fridge is prominently visible. A grocery list magnet is on the fridge door.

A car drives along a road with a destination sign visible ahead showing a decreasing distance — '0.5 km.' The driver peers forward through the windshield. The destination building or landmark is faintly visible in the distance. A passenger points ahead excitedly. The GPS screen on the dashboard shows they are nearly at the destination.

A person walks up the front steps of their house, keys in hand, reaching for the door. The house number and front door are clearly visible. The person's expression shows relief and anticipation of arriving home. A bag on their shoulder suggests they are returning from work or errands. They are just steps from the entrance.

A person sits at a desk with textbooks, flashcards, and notes spread out. Most of the study materials are in a 'reviewed' stack, with only a thin section remaining. The person flips through the last few cards with a focused but confident expression. A test schedule or exam reminder is posted on the wall. Preparation is nearly complete.

A person tilts a water bottle to drink but only a few drops come out. They hold the bottle upside down and shake it. The bottle is visibly almost empty — a tiny amount of water clings to the bottom. The person's expression shows mild disappointment. A trash bin or recycling bin is nearby. The bottle is practically depleted.

A person in workout clothes checks a fitness tracker on their wrist while jogging. The tracker screen shows a daily step count that is just short of the goal — perhaps 9,800 out of 10,000. The person glances at the tracker with determination, still moving. A park path stretches ahead. The close-to-complete goal motivates them to continue.

A laptop screen shows a download progress bar that is nearly complete — approximately 97% filled. The remaining portion is a thin sliver. A file icon waits below the bar. The person sitting in front of the laptop leans forward, watching the bar inch forward. The cursor shows a loading spinner. Completion is imminent.

A person stands outside a shop looking at a 'Closing Soon' sign in the window. A clock visible through the window shows a few minutes before closing time. The shopkeeper inside begins putting items away. The person rushes toward the door. The nearly-closed status of the shop conveys urgency — it is almost time to close.

61.word_prompt: A person sits at a table with a guilty, uncomfortable expression — eyes averted, one hand touching their nose or covering their mouth. Across from them, another person stares with narrowed, suspicious eyes and crossed arms. Between them on the table, a visual cue suggests deception — a shattered speech bubble, a nose growing longer like a fictional character, or a document with contradictory information. The tension of dishonesty permeates the scene. The liar's body language clearly betrays their discomfort.
sentences: An adult crouches to eye level with a young child who looks down at the floor guiltily. The adult points a firm finger and shakes their head disapprovingly. A broken object — a vase or a cookie jar — is on the floor nearby. The child's hands are behind their back and their lower lip trembles. The adult's expression is stern but caring.

Two friends sit at a cafe table. One tells a story with animated hand gestures, but their eyes dart sideways and their smile is forced. The other friend listens with a skeptical expression, arms crossed, one eyebrow raised. A coffee cup sits untouched between them. The lying friend's body language is clearly anxious and evasive.

A person stands facing another person with palms up and an earnest, open expression, urging honesty. The other person averts their gaze, looking down and to the side, clearly reluctant to speak. The first person's body language is encouraging but insistent. The scene is set in a home kitchen or living room with soft lighting.

A person sits in a group setting — a classroom or office — and their face flushes red. Others in the group look at them knowingly, some covering smirks. A whiteboard or document behind the group shows evidence that contradicts what the red-faced person said. The exposed person buries their face in their hands with embarrassment.

A person listens to someone else speak with an increasingly incredulous expression. The listener tilts their head, squints their eyes, and raises one hand in a 'wait' gesture. The speaker's story seems exaggerated — perhaps gesturing wildly about something impossible. The listener's face clearly communicates 'that cannot be true.' The setting is a park bench or office.

A person sits at a desk with arms crossed firmly, face set in a stern, displeased expression. In front of them, a sign or thought emphasizes the concept of dishonesty — perhaps a crossed-out speech bubble or a broken promise symbol. The person's posture and expression convey strong dislike of deception. The setting is clean and serious.

A person holds up a document or a phone screen, showing evidence that confirms something is true. They point at the evidence and nod firmly to another person who examines it closely. The evidence — a receipt, a photo, or a verified message — is clearly legitimate. Both people's expressions show relief or satisfaction that the truth is confirmed.

A teacher or parent stands in front of a small group of children, holding up a storybook with an illustration of a character whose nose has grown long — a visual metaphor for lying. The children look at the illustration attentively. The teacher points at the picture and speaks with an instructive expression. The classroom or room has educational decorations.

A person stands with hands on hips, looking at another person with a mixed expression of disbelief and amusement. The other person tells a story with wide, dramatic gestures. The listener's tilted head and half-smile suggest they are not sure whether to believe the wild tale. The setting is casual — a living room or a park.

A person sits at a table across from colleagues or friends. While others talk, this person sits quietly, calmly, and maintains steady eye contact when speaking. Their posture is open and relaxed — hands visible on the table, no fidgeting. Others listen to them with trust and attention. The person's straightforward demeanor clearly conveys honest reliability.

62.word_prompt: A person sits alone with furrowed brows and hands clasped tightly in front of them, deep in troubled thought. Their posture is hunched, shoulders tense, eyes looking downward. A thought cloud above their head contains vague, swirling dark shapes suggesting unresolved concerns. The setting is a quiet room — a bedroom or a dimly lit study. A clock ticks on the wall. The overall atmosphere is heavy and pensive, capturing the weight of worry and anxiety.
sentences: A student sits at a desk surrounded by open textbooks and notes, biting their nails and staring at a calendar that shows an upcoming exam date circled in red. Their face is tense with anxiety. The books are highlighted and dog-eared from studying. A clock on the wall shows late evening. The student's posture radiates test anxiety.

A person sits beside a friend on a park bench, placing a reassuring hand on the friend's shoulder. The worried friend has their head in their hands. The comforting person speaks with a calm, encouraging expression and gestures openly. A warm afternoon setting with trees and a gentle breeze surrounds them. The consolation is gentle and sincere.

A person stands at a window, looking up at a darkening sky filled with gathering storm clouds. They hold an umbrella and a picnic basket, clearly with outdoor plans. Their expression shows worry and disappointment as they watch the clouds roll in. Rain begins to spot the windowpane. A cancelled or threatened plan is implied.

A person sits in a hospital waiting room, leaning forward with hands clasped tightly together. Their face shows deep concern. A door to the examination rooms is visible ahead. Other people sit in nearby chairs. The person occasionally looks at the door, waiting for news. The clinical setting and their tense posture convey worry about a family member's health.

A person sits on their bed at night, knees drawn up, staring at the ceiling with a troubled, sleepless expression. Multiple thought clouds float around their head, each containing a different concern — money, work, relationships, health. The room is dark except for a bedside lamp. The person looks exhausted from overthinking.

A person sits across from a concerned friend. The friend waves their hand dismissively and shakes their head with a reassuring smile, as if to say 'it is nothing to worry about.' The worried person's tension visibly begins to ease. Both hold coffee cups. The cafe setting is warm and intimate.

A person sits at a desk, staring at a laptop screen showing job listing websites. Their chin rests on one hand and their expression is anxious. A resume document is open beside the laptop. Sticky notes with company names cover the desk edge. The person's furrowed brow and tight jaw convey stress about employment prospects.

A person walks down the street with a visibly lightened step, arms swinging freely, face relaxed and smiling. Behind them, a dark cloud that was hovering over their head dissipates into nothing. The scene transitions from gray and heavy to bright and clear. The contrast before and after worry is resolved is visually clear.

A person lies on a sofa, one arm over their forehead, looking stressed. A friend or family member nearby holds up a hand and gives a cautionary gesture — palm out, signaling 'stop.' The message is that excessive worry is harmful. A book about stress management or wellness sits on the coffee table. The scene conveys a health warning about overthinking.

A young person sits at a desk, gazing out a window at a distant horizon. Their chin rests on their hand, expression distant and pensive. A journal lies open on the desk with scattered writing. The future is symbolized by the open horizon beyond the window. The person's contemplative posture shows they are concerned about what lies ahead.

63.word_prompt: A person paces back and forth in a room, one hand pressed to their forehead, the other clenched at their side. Their face is tightly drawn with anxiety and concern. A phone in their hand shows a missed call or unanswered messages. The room has a clock showing a late hour. The pacing figure's path is worn into the scene — back and forth, back and forth. The whole composition captures the active process of worrying about someone or something.
sentences: A person stands at a window looking out at a dark, empty street. They check their watch repeatedly and glance at their phone screen, which shows unanswered calls or messages. Their expression is tense and anxious. A clock on the wall shows a late hour. The person waits for someone who is late, clearly worried about them.

A person places both hands gently on another person's shoulders, looking them in the eyes with a calm, steady gaze. The worried person's tense posture begins to relax. The comforting person shakes their head gently, as if saying 'do not worry.' The setting is a quiet hallway or a private room. The exchange is supportive and reassuring.

An older couple sits at a kitchen table, both with concerned expressions. In front of them lies a phone, screen lit up. One person points at the phone while the other wrings their hands. A family photo on the wall shows a younger person — their child. The parents' worry is directed toward the absent family member. The kitchen is warm but the mood is tense.

A person sits at a desk staring at an unopened envelope or a computer screen showing 'Results pending.' Their posture is rigid — hands gripping the desk edge, jaw clenched. A pen is bitten or chewed. The desk is otherwise organized but the person's focus is entirely on the awaited results. Tension fills the frame.

A person sits beside a bed where a friend lies under covers, looking pale and unwell. The visitor holds a bag of fruit and a thermos. Their expression is deeply concerned as they lean in to check on their friend. The sick friend gives a weak smile. Medicine and tissues sit on the nightstand. The visitor's worry is evident.

A person stares at a weather forecast on their phone or a television. The forecast shows rain or storms for a specific date. A calendar on the wall has that date circled with 'Trip' written on it. The person bites their lip and looks out the window at the current sky. Travel bags sit packed nearby, ready to go.

A person sits at a kitchen table with bills, receipts, and a calculator spread out. They hold their head in both hands, elbows on the table, staring down at the numbers. A calendar shows the end of the month. A wallet lies open and nearly empty nearby. The financial stress is visible in every element of the scene.

A person who was previously shown worrying now sits relaxed on a sofa, reading peacefully. Their phone on the table shows a message notification. They pick it up and read good news — their face breaks into a relieved smile. The once-tense shoulders drop. A cup of tea steams nearby. The worry has been resolved and peace has returned.

A person stands in a busy airport or train station, looking frantically around. They check their pockets and bag repeatedly, opening zippers and patting jacket pockets. Their face shows rising panic. Around them, other travelers move calmly. A lost item — a bag or wallet — is nowhere to be seen. The worry about the lost possession is intense.

A person sits at a desk with a notepad, writing down worries in a list. Each item has a small checkbox. The person's expression is serious but not panicked — they are a habitual worrier processing their concerns methodically. The list is long. A pen taps against the notepad. The desk is in a quiet study with a lamp.

64.word_prompt: A vibrant, energetic person stretches their arms overhead outdoors in morning sunlight. Their posture is upright, skin glowing, and smile genuine. Around them, visual symbols of health are arranged: a bowl of fresh fruit, a pair of running shoes, a water bottle, and a yoga mat. A heart rate monitor or health chart in the background shows optimal readings. The scene radiates vitality, wellness, and physical well-being. The green, sunlit outdoor environment reinforces the theme of good health.
sentences: Two people meet on the street. One asks about the other's well-being — their expression is warm and inquiring. The other person responds by flexing an arm or patting their chest confidently, indicating they are well. Both smile. The setting is a sidewalk or park. The exchange is brief, warm, and health-focused.

A festive New Year scene with people exchanging greeting cards or bowing to each other. One person presents a card with a wellness symbol — a heart or a running figure. The recipient smiles and bows. Decorative elements suggest the start of a new year — a calendar showing January 1st, banners, or confetti. The wish for health is prominent.

A person stands confidently at the center of a balanced scale or diagram. On one side, icons represent career, money, and achievements. On the other side, a single large heart or health symbol outweighs them all. The person points at the health side with conviction. The visual metaphor clearly communicates that health is the most important value.

A person in athletic clothing jogs in a park, arms pumping, stride confident. Beside the jogging figure, a daily calendar or routine chart shows exercise entries for every day. The person's expression is determined and energized. Trees, a running path, and other joggers create an active setting. The regularity of the exercise habit is emphasized.

A person sits in a doctor's office wearing a hospital gown, while a doctor with a stethoscope examines them. A clipboard with a health checkup form and checkmarks is visible. An eye chart hangs on the wall. Medical instruments are on a nearby tray. The patient sits calmly, cooperating with the annual examination. The scene is clinical but routine.

A person sits at a dining table with a plate of colorful vegetables, salad greens, and a glass of water. They eat with a content, purposeful expression. The meal is clearly health-focused — no fried or processed foods are visible. A small poster or note on the kitchen wall says 'Eat well.' The scene conveys intentional healthy eating.

A person sits in a hospital waiting room, holding their arm or looking unwell. A doctor calls them into the examination room from a doorway. The person stands up slowly and walks toward the door. A reception desk and other patients are visible. The clinical atmosphere and the person's subdued demeanor convey a health-related visit.

A person follows a daily health routine shown as a visual sequence: waking up early, drinking water, stretching, eating a balanced meal, and going to bed on time. Each activity is a small panel surrounding the central figure. The person appears happy and energetic throughout. The sequence communicates dedication to maintaining good health.

A person drops a cigarette into a trash can with a decisive gesture. They dust off their hands and take a deep breath of fresh air. A 'No Smoking' sign or a lung health poster is visible in the background. The person's expression shows determination and relief. The act of quitting is clear and purposeful, motivated by health concerns.

A person sits in a meditation pose on a mat in a quiet room, eyes closed, expression peaceful. Nearby, a candle burns softly and a small plant sits on the windowsill. A journal with wellness notes is open beside the mat. The person's relaxed posture and serene expression suggest they are actively working to reduce stress for their health.

65.word_prompt: A person stands tall and upright with arms stretched wide, chest open, and a radiant, healthy smile. Their complexion is clear and vibrant. They wear comfortable athletic clothing. Behind them, a bright sunrise or a green, open landscape symbolizes vitality. The person's entire bearing — from their strong posture to their glowing expression — communicates robust good health. The scene is optimistic, energetic, and full of life.
sentences: A person finishes a morning run in a park, barely breaking a sweat, stretching coolly at the end of the path. They look energized and refreshed. Their athletic build and easy posture suggest consistent exercise. A fitness tracker on their wrist shows a completed workout. Other joggers who look more tired pass by in the background.

A child runs across a playground, climbing a jungle gym and sliding down a slide with boundless energy. The child's cheeks are rosy and their smile is wide. A parent watches from a bench with a proud, relaxed expression. The playground is colorful and active. The child's vigor and energy clearly indicate healthy growth.

An elderly person walks energetically along a garden path, back straight, step lively. They carry gardening tools and a basket of vegetables from their garden. Despite their age, their movements are fluid and strong. The garden is lush and well-tended. A younger person walking alongside looks impressed by the elder's vitality.

A person sits at a breakfast table with a well-balanced meal — eggs, toast, fruit, and milk. They eat contentedly and appear rested and refreshed. Morning light streams through the window. A neatly made bed is visible in the adjacent room through a doorway. The combination of good food and good rest creates a picture of healthy living.

A sequence showing a person's transformation: on the left, a slightly unfit person on a couch; in the center, the same person beginning to exercise; on the right, the same person standing confidently with improved posture and a glowing expression. A calendar or timeline connects the three stages. The progression from sedentary to healthy through regular exercise is clear.

A person emerges from a hospital or clinic, stepping into sunshine with a relieved, happy expression. They stretch their arms and take a deep breath. A doctor stands at the clinic door, waving them off with a thumbs up. The person looks noticeably healthier and more vibrant than when they went in. The recovery is complete.

Two friends meet at a cafe. One asks about the other's well-being with a questioning gesture. The other responds by rolling up a sleeve to show a muscled arm, or by doing a little jump, grinning broadly to demonstrate their good health. The questioner nods approvingly. Coffee cups sit on the table between them.

A person holds a plate of colorful, nutritious food — grilled fish, steamed vegetables, and brown rice — and takes a bite with a satisfied expression. A health magazine or nutrition book lies open on the table beside them. The meal looks appetizing and wholesome. The person chews contentedly, clearly enjoying food that is both tasty and healthy.

A bedroom scene at dawn. A person wakes up naturally, stretching with a rested, refreshed expression. The alarm clock shows an early hour. They swing their legs out of bed with energy. The bedroom is tidy with curtains drawn open, letting in early light. A glass of water sits on the nightstand. The early-to-bed, early-to-rise routine is evident.

A family portrait in a living room: parents and children all stand together, smiling broadly, looking vibrant and healthy. Everyone has good posture and bright expressions. Active lifestyle elements are visible — a soccer ball by the door, running shoes in a row, fruit in a bowl on the table. The family's collective health and happiness radiate from the image.

66.word_prompt: A person stands at the edge of a crosswalk, about to step off the curb and cross a wide road. The pedestrian traffic signal shows a green walking figure. White crosswalk stripes stretch across the road to the opposite sidewalk. The person takes their first step onto the road, looking both ways. Cars wait behind the stop line. The far side of the road is clearly the destination. The scene captures the full act of crossing from one side to the other.
sentences: A person stands at a crosswalk, watching the pedestrian signal. The signal changes to a green walking figure. The person steps onto the crosswalk, following the white-striped path across the road. Cars are stopped at the traffic light. The other side of the road is visible ahead. The person walks purposefully across, midway through the crossing.

A wide river with a long bridge spanning across it. A person walks across the bridge, approaching the far side. In the distance on the other bank, a train station building and platform are visible. The person looks ahead at the station. The bridge connects the two banks, and the person is crossing from one to the other.

A person stands at a crosswalk intersection with another person who appears to need help or directions. The first person points across the crosswalk to the other side, indicating the way to go. The crosswalk is clearly marked with white stripes. Traffic lights and pedestrian signals are visible. The direction across is unmistakable.

A person dashes across a street in a hurry, mid-stride between the two sidewalks. Their body is leaned forward in a fast walk or light jog. Cars wait on both sides. The person checks their watch while moving. The crosswalk stripes are visible beneath their feet. The urgency of crossing quickly is evident in their posture.

An adult holds the hand of a small child at a crosswalk. Both look left and right, checking for cars. The adult points at the traffic signal and then guides the child forward. Cars are stopped. The crosswalk is wide and clearly marked. The adult's protective stance and the child's trusting grip emphasize safe crossing behavior.

A person walks across a busy intersection. On the far side, a convenience store with illuminated signage is clearly visible. The person heads directly toward it. The intersection has traffic lights, turn lanes, and lane markings. Other pedestrians also cross in various directions. The convenience store is the clear destination after crossing.

A person sits in a small wooden boat, rowing across a river. The near bank is behind them and the far bank is ahead. The water surface is calm with gentle ripples from the oars. Trees line both banks. The rower pulls the oars steadily, making progress toward the other side. The crossing by boat is deliberate and manual.

A person stands at a curb, looking left and right carefully before stepping onto the road. Their head turns both directions. Cars are visible down the road in both directions but at a safe distance. The person then steps forward confidently. A child or companion watches and learns from the careful checking behavior.

A painted crosswalk with pedestrian signals at an intersection. A 'No jaywalking' sign is posted on a pole. A person walks along the sidewalk and approaches the crosswalk, pointedly choosing to cross only at the designated location. Other unmarked sections of the road have no pedestrians. The person's choice to use the proper crossing is deliberate.

A residential area with a school building visible across a wide road. A student with a backpack stands at the crosswalk on one side, waiting for the signal. The school gate is directly across the road. The student crosses when the signal turns green, heading straight for the school entrance. A crossing guard or patrol stands nearby.

67.word_prompt: A person mid-crossing on a wide road, stepping firmly on the white crosswalk stripes. The starting sidewalk is behind them and the destination sidewalk is ahead. The person moves with purpose, eyes fixed forward. Cars idle at the traffic light on both sides. The scene is captured in the middle of the act — the person is between the two sides, actively crossing. The road is wide enough to show the full span of the crossing.
sentences: A person steps onto a crosswalk at a busy intersection, following the green pedestrian signal. Other pedestrians cross alongside them. The crosswalk is broad and well-marked. A teenager sits at a desk in a bedroom surrounded by textbooks, notebooks, and practice exams. They hold their head with both hands, staring at a difficult exam paper with a frustrated, overwhelmed expression. Sticky notes with formulas and key points cover the wall behind the desk. A desk lamp illuminates the study materials. The clock shows a late evening hour.

A group of teenagers in athletic uniforms practices soccer on a school sports field. Some dribble balls while a coach blows a whistle on the sideline. The high school building is visible in the background. Goal nets stand at each end of the field. One player celebrates after scoring, arms raised. The scene captures the energy of an after-school club activity.

A teenager stands at the front door of a house, ready to leave for school in uniform with a backpack. They look at the high school building visible just a short distance down the street. The school gate is clearly close — only a few blocks away. The teenager has a relaxed expression, suggesting the commute is easy and short.

A line of teenagers stands in a school hallway, all wearing identical school uniforms — blazers, ties, and matching trousers or skirts. They look at their reflections in a hallway mirror, adjusting their ties and collars. A notice board behind them shows school rules including a dress code. The uniforms are neat and well-pressed.

A large auditorium filled with rows of teenagers in graduation caps and gowns. A stage at the front has a podium with a microphone. Proud parents sit in the audience behind the graduates. A banner hangs above the stage with congratulatory imagery. One graduate walks across the stage to receive a diploma from a principal. The atmosphere is formal and celebratory.

A teacher stands at the front of a classroom, smiling warmly at a group of attentive teenagers seated at desks. The teacher holds an open textbook and gestures expressively while explaining. Students lean forward with interested expressions. One student raises a hand. The classroom walls have educational posters and a large window lets in natural light. The scene conveys a positive, supportive teaching relationship.

105.word_prompt: A teenager in a crisp school uniform — blazer, white shirt, and tie — stands in a school hallway holding a stack of textbooks against their chest. A backpack hangs from one shoulder.
