The overall impression is a typical high school student during a regular school day.
sentences: A teenager in a school uniform stands facing the viewer with a confident posture. They hold a student ID card in one hand, showing their photo. The school building is visible behind them. Other uniformed students pass by. The teenager points at themselves with their other hand, clearly identifying themselves. The uniform and school setting indicate a high school environment.

A group of teenagers in school uniforms stands in a line, arranged by height. A teacher stands at the end holding a clipboard. Numbers indicating ages — 16, 17, 18 — float above the students' heads as visual indicators. The students look at each other, comparing heights and ages. The school hallway setting and uniforms establish them as high school students.

A teenager in a school uniform stands at a bus fare machine or ticket counter. They hold up a student ID card to the attendant or machine. A display screen shows two different fare amounts — one regular, one discounted — with the lower amount highlighted. The teenager points at the discounted fare. Other commuters wait in line behind them.

A teenager sits at a desk in a bedroom late at night, surrounded by open textbooks, notebooks, and highlighters. The desk lamp casts a warm cone of light. The teenager writes intensely in a notebook, focused and determined. A clock on the wall shows a late hour. Empty snack wrappers and a coffee mug are on the desk corner. The effort and dedication are visible.

A teenager in a school uniform stands in front of a classroom presentation board. On the board, they have drawn or pinned images representing different career paths — a stethoscope for doctor, a rocket for engineer, a paintbrush for artist. The teenager points at one image with an excited, dreamy expression. Classmates watch from their desks.

Several teenagers in school uniforms sit at long tables in a public library. Each has textbooks and notebooks spread open. Some write, others read with concentration. The library shelves tower behind them, filled with books. A librarian walks past in the background. The reading lamps are on at each table. The scene captures studious, focused studying.

A teenager sits at a desk with university brochures, application forms, and a laptop showing a university website. They hold a pen and fill in a form with concentration. A stack of practice exam books sits beside them. A poster on the wall shows a university campus. The teenager has a serious, goal-oriented expression as they prepare for their future.

A teenager in a school uniform stands with a parent at a kitchen counter. The parent hands the teenager some cash or an envelope with money. The teenager accepts it with both hands politely. A school bag sits on the floor nearby. The kitchen is a typical family home setting. The interaction captures the moment of receiving an allowance.

A group of teenagers in school uniforms stands at a bus stop, backpacks on. A city bus approaches with its route number displayed. The students chat casually while waiting. One checks the time on their phone. The bus stop shelter and bench are visible. The morning light suggests an early commute to school.

A teenager sits at a desk during an exam, gripping a pencil tightly. Their brow is furrowed and shoulders are tense. An exam paper with multiple questions is face-up on the desk. The student rubs their temple with one hand. Other students are visible at nearby desks, also writing. The clock on the wall shows time passing. The atmosphere is pressured and stressful.

106.word_prompt: A person stands in front of a display shelf holding multiple options — products, items, or samples — arranged in a row. They extend one hand toward a specific item, index finger pointing decisively at their selection. The other items remain untouched on the shelf. The person's expression is thoughtful and deliberate, having just made a decision. A slight nod of the head accompanies the pointing gesture. The scene captures the moment of making a careful choice among many alternatives.
sentences: A person sits at a restaurant table with an open menu in both hands. The menu shows several dishes with small photos beside each listing. A server stands beside the table with a notepad, pen poised and ready. The person points at one specific dish on the menu with a decisive finger. Other diners are visible at nearby tables. The moment captures the act of selecting a meal.

A person stands in a clothing store surrounded by racks of garments. They hold a hanger in each hand, comparing two different outfits side by side. Other clothes hang on nearby racks. The person tilts their head, examining both options carefully. A full-length mirror reflects them from behind. The scene shows the deliberation of choosing clothing.

A person stands at a gift shop counter holding a neatly wrapped gift box. Behind them, the shop shelves display various gift options — candles, picture frames, scarves, and decorative items. The person places the chosen gift on the counter for purchase. A tag reading 'For You' is attached. The person smiles contentedly, having selected the perfect present for a friend.

A person stands at a fruit stall in an outdoor market, carefully examining individual pieces of fruit. They hold a peach up close to their face, inspecting it for freshness — checking the color, firmness, and smell. Other fruits are arranged in wooden crates on the stall. The vendor watches patiently. The person selects only the best pieces and places them in a bag.

A group of people stands in a circle, and one person in the center points at one member of the group. The selected person steps forward with a surprised but pleased expression. The others look on with anticipation. A clipboard or sign showing team assignments is visible nearby. The scene captures the moment of choosing one person from a group.

A person stands in the aisle of a library, one hand resting on the spine of a book on the shelf while the other hand holds a different book. They pull one book out and examine its cover and back with interest. Tall bookshelves stretch in both directions. The person has a contemplative expression, deciding which book to take home.

A person stands before a display of paint swatches or color samples fanned out on a table. Dozens of colors are arranged in a gradient. The person holds up one specific swatch — a vivid blue — and compares it against a fabric sample in their other hand. Their expression shows satisfaction with the match. Other rejected swatches lie to the side.

A person sits at a computer with a travel booking website on the screen, showing photos of different destinations — a tropical beach, a mountain resort, and a historic city. The person leans forward, hand on chin, comparing the options. A notepad beside the keyboard has pros and cons written for each destination. The person appears deep in deliberation about where to go.

A person sits at a desk in front of a career counselor. Between them on the desk are several pamphlets showing different career paths with illustrations — engineering, medicine, teaching, and business. The counselor gestures at the pamphlets while the person picks one up and examines it with a serious, thoughtful expression. The scene depicts choosing a career direction.

A person stands at a hotel reception desk, looking at a computer screen turned toward them that shows three different room options with photos — a standard room, a deluxe room, and a suite. The person points at one of the options. The receptionist nods and types on the keyboard. A room key card sits on the counter, ready to be assigned.

107.word_prompt: Two people face each other in a formal setting. One person bows politely at the waist while placing both hands together in front of their body, expressing deep, sincere gratitude. The other person stands upright, receiving the thanks with a modest smile. The bowing person's expression is warm and earnest. The setting suggests the end of a meeting or event. A doorway or exit is visible in the background, indicating a parting moment.
sentences: Two people stand at a doorway. One person holds the door open and the other passes through, turning back to bow slightly with a warm, grateful smile. The person who held the door has just finished helping carry boxes, visible stacked inside the room. The grateful person places a hand on their chest. The interaction is formal and sincere. The scene conveys heartfelt appreciation for assistance received.

A group of people stands near the exit of an event venue — a conference hall or community center. One person at the door shakes hands with departing guests, bowing slightly to each. The guests smile and bow back. Decorations from the event are visible inside. The host's expression is warm and deeply appreciative. The scene captures the end of a gathering.

A person sits at a dining table in someone's home, having just finished a meal. The plates are nearly empty. The guest pushes back their chair, stands, and bows toward the host who stands near the kitchen doorway. The guest's hands are clasped together and their expression is genuinely grateful. The host smiles modestly. Serving dishes and a warm home kitchen are visible.

A student stands in front of a teacher in a classroom after the last lesson. The teacher holds a textbook under one arm. The student bows deeply and holds both hands clasped together. The student's expression is full of sincere appreciation. The classroom behind them shows a cleaned whiteboard and empty desks. The scene is a formal farewell at the end of a course.

A person sits on a sofa holding a wrapped gift they have just opened — the wrapping paper is torn and ribbon curls around them. They hold the gift (a scarf or a book) up and look at the gift-giver standing nearby with wide, grateful eyes and a big smile. The person places one hand on their chest. The interaction is warm and heartfelt.

Two people stand at the entrance of a tourist site or nature trail. One person holds a folded map and the other carries a small flag, suggesting they were a tour guide. The traveler bows toward the guide with a grateful expression, one hand extended in thanks. The scenic background — mountains or a historic gate — is visible. The parting is respectful and appreciative.

A person sits comfortably in a guest room of a home, surrounded by clean towels, a prepared bed, and a small tray of snacks on the nightstand. The host stands at the bedroom door, smiling. The guest, seated on the bed, turns toward the host with clasped hands and a deeply appreciative, relaxed expression. The room is tidy and welcoming.

Two colleagues stand in an office near a desk stacked with completed files and project folders. One person gestures toward the finished work on the desk. The other bows slightly with both hands extended, palms together, expressing gratitude for the help. Their expression is earnest and relieved. The office has computers and filing cabinets. The project appears successfully completed.

Two people stand in a hallway or office corridor. One person holds a hand over their heart and bows gently toward the other. The second person waves a hand modestly as if to say it was nothing. The first person's face shows deep, genuine gratitude. The setting is neutral and professional. The body language is formal and respectful, conveying sincere thanks for thoughtful consideration.

Two friends sit together on a park bench as the sun sets behind them. One places a hand on the other's shoulder and smiles warmly. The other person bows their head slightly with a grateful expression. A coffee cup or small memento sits between them. The golden light of the setting sun bathes the scene. The moment captures appreciation for quality time spent together.

108.word_prompt: Two friends in a casual setting — a person reaches out and clasps the other person's hands warmly in both of theirs, eyes meeting directly. The thankful person's face shows genuine warmth and gratitude — eyebrows slightly raised, a soft smile, and an earnest gaze. The setting is informal — a living room, a park bench, or a cafe. The body language is open and heartfelt, less formal than a bow but clearly expressing deep personal thanks.
sentences: Two friends stand together outdoors. One has just helped the other pick up scattered papers from the ground. The papers are now gathered in a neat stack. The person who was helped holds the papers against their chest and smiles broadly at their friend, one hand reaching out to squeeze the helper's arm. The helper smiles back modestly. The gratitude is visible in the person's warm expression.

Two close friends sit side by side on a bench. One leans their head gently toward the other's shoulder. The other person wraps an arm around them. Both have soft, contented smiles. The setting is a quiet park or garden. The person leaning in has a deeply grateful expression, as though appreciating the other's presence. The moment is tender and personal.

A person sits on a sofa holding a small wrapped gift box that was just handed to them. The gift-giver stands nearby, smiling. The recipient looks up at the giver with wide, touched eyes and a grateful grin. They hold the gift close. The living room has a casual, home atmosphere. The recipient's expression conveys heartfelt, informal appreciation.

Two friends sit at a table with plates of food. One has just served a portion from a shared dish onto the other's plate. The recipient holds their chopsticks and looks at the server with a warm, thankful smile, nodding appreciatively. The shared dish sits in the center. The setting is a home kitchen or casual dining area. The gesture is small but meaningful.

Two students sit at a desk together. One has a notebook open showing homework problems, some now completed with corrections in a different color ink. The helper sits beside them with a pencil in hand. The student who received help looks at the other with bright, grateful eyes and clasps their hands together. Textbooks and erasers lie on the desk.

Two people stand at a street corner. One person points down a street, giving clear directions with an extended arm and pointing finger. The other person looks in the indicated direction and then turns back to the direction-giver with a relieved, grateful smile, placing a hand on their chest. A street sign and buildings are visible. The lost person has clearly just received helpful guidance.

A person stands on a stage or in front of a small crowd, having just performed or competed. A friend in the audience holds up a homemade sign of encouragement, clapping enthusiastically. The performer looks directly at the friend from the stage with a moved, grateful expression. The stage lights illuminate the performer. The supporter beams from the audience.

A person stands at a meeting point — a cafe entrance or park bench — checking their watch. Another person approaches from down the street. The waiting person spots them and waves with a patient, understanding smile. The arriving person has a slightly hurried posture but relaxes upon seeing the other's patience. Two people sit across from each other at a table. One leans forward, speaking earnestly with hand gestures. The other listens attentively, nodding. The speaker has a vulnerable expression, and the listener's face shows empathy and compassion. The speaker then pauses and looks at the listener with a deeply grateful expression, as though profoundly thankful to be understood. The setting is a quiet cafe.

Two friends stand together outdoors at a scenic viewpoint. One holds a camera or phone, having just taken a photo. The other person — the photo's subject — looks at the photo on the screen and grins, giving a thumbs-up. The photographer smiles. The scenic landscape stretches behind them. 109.word_prompt: A person stands facing another in a formal or semi-formal setting, bowing from the waist at a moderate angle. A person sits at a table with an open gift box, revealing a beautifully wrapped item inside — a book, a piece of jewelry, or a decorative object. The gift-giver stands beside the table. A host stands at a dining table placing the final dish of a home-cooked meal. A person stands at a street corner, lost and holding a phone with a map app open. A passerby has just pointed them in the correct direction. Two people stand in a hallway. One holds a door open for the other, who carries heavy bags. The person with the bags pauses and bows toward the door-holder with a formal, respectful nod. A person stands in front of a colleague or acquaintance who has just paid them a compliment — the speaker gestures toward the recipient with an approving nod. A person stands at the entrance of a home, having just arrived as a guest. The host holds the door open and gestures them inside. Two people stand at a counter or reception area. One, wearing a professional uniform, has just finished giving a detailed explanation, pointing at a document or brochure. Two people meet for the first time in a lobby or office entryway. Both bow slightly toward each other. One extends a hand for a handshake while the other reciprocates. 110.word_prompt: A family tree diagram drawn on paper or a board, with a highlighted connection showing a woman linked as the sister of the father's side. A simple family tree diagram drawn on a whiteboard or poster. A finger points at a specific position on the tree — the sister of the father. A middle-aged woman sits on a sofa beside a young person, holding the young person's hand and looking at them with a concerned, caring expression. A large family group stands together for a photo in a living room or garden. Adults and children of various ages are arranged in rows. sentences: A middle-aged man sits in a living room armchair, leaning forward to hand a glass of juice to a visiting young family member. The man has a warm, gentle smile. Two people exercise together in a park — a middle-aged man and a younger person jogging side by side on a trail. Both wear athletic clothing and running shoes. A middle-aged man sits behind the steering wheel of a car, looking back over his shoulder with a friendly smile as a young person climbs into the back seat. The car is parked in front of a house. A simple family tree diagram on a whiteboard or poster. A finger points at a position labeled as the husband of the father's sister. A young person sits on a sofa holding a wrapped gift that they have just received. A middle-aged man stands nearby, hands in his pockets, smiling modestly. A middle-aged man and a young person sit across from each other at a dining table with plates of food. Both hold chopsticks and eat contentedly. A home kitchen is visible in the background. A young person sits beside a middle-aged man on a park bench or at a desk. The man speaks thoughtfully, one hand gesturing to emphasize a point. The young person listens attentively, nodding. A young person walks up to the front door of a suburban home, ringing the doorbell. A middle-aged man opens the door with a broad, welcoming smile and steps aside to let them in. 112.word_prompt: A large, modern express coach bus parked at a bus terminal bay. The bus is sleek with tinted windows, luggage compartments open below, and a destination display on the front showing a city name. Passengers line up to board with rolling suitcases and bags. The terminal building is behind the bus with multiple boarding platforms visible. A digital departure board hangs overhead. The bus is long-distance in appearance — larger and more comfortable than a city bus.
sentences: A person sits in a comfortable reclining seat inside a large express bus, looking out the window at a highway stretching through green countryside. The bus interior has plush seats, overhead compartments, and curtained windows. The passenger holds a phone showing a map with a route traced between two distant cities. Rolling hills and mountains are visible through the window. The journey is clearly long-distance.

A person stands at a ticket counter inside a bus terminal. They hand money or a card to the clerk behind the glass partition. The clerk passes back a printed ticket. A departure schedule board is mounted on the wall above. The ticket shows a destination city and departure time. Other travelers wait in line behind. The terminal has the busy atmosphere of an intercity transportation hub.

A split comparison scene. On the left, a large express bus with a price tag showing a lower number. On the right, a bullet train with a price tag showing a higher number. Both vehicles are shown side by side. A person in the middle holds a wallet and looks at the bus with a relieved expression, clearly choosing the more affordable option. The cost difference is visually obvious.

A person sits on a bench inside a bus terminal, looking up at the large departure board that shows bus numbers, destinations, and times. Their suitcase stands upright beside them. Other travelers mill about the terminal. The terminal has a high ceiling, tile floors, and multiple boarding gates visible. The person checks their watch. The atmosphere is that of patient waiting.

A person stands at a bus terminal information desk, pointing at the departure board above and speaking to a staff member. The board shows multiple departure times in rows. A clock on the wall shows the current time. The person holds a ticket and compares it to the board. The staff member points at a specific row on the board. The scene conveys checking departure times.

A person stands outside a bus terminal with a suitcase, looking at a large express bus that has a rural town name displayed on the destination board. The person has a nostalgic, slightly emotional expression, suggesting they are heading to their hometown. Rolling countryside is visible in the far background beyond the terminal parking lot. The bus engine is running, ready to depart.

A person sits inside a moving express bus, checking the time on their phone. A thought bubble or watch display shows the number of hours remaining — perhaps two or three. The window reveals a highway with scenery passing by. The passenger has a patient but slightly restless expression. An overhead display inside the bus shows the estimated arrival time. The journey is underway.

A person sits at a computer at home, viewing a bus reservation website on the screen. The screen shows available seats on a bus diagram, some already occupied and some open. The person clicks on an available seat and fills in their details. A credit card lies on the desk beside the keyboard. A calendar on the screen shows a date two weeks in the future. The interior of a modern express bus showing the aisle, comfortable seats, and a small restroom door at the rear with a bathroom symbol sign. A passenger walks down the aisle toward the restroom. Other passengers sit in their seats reading or sleeping. The bus interior is clean and well-maintained. The restroom sign is clearly visible. The bus has the amenities of a long-distance vehicle.

A person sits on an express bus looking out the window at a rural landscape. They wear a cozy sweater and have a bag of traditional holiday snacks on their lap. Other passengers also carry bags of holiday treats and gifts. The bus destination display shows a rural town name. The atmosphere is warm and festive, suggesting a holiday journey home. 113.word_prompt: A domestic cat sits on a windowsill in a cozy apartment, its tail curled neatly around its paws. The cat has bright, alert eyes and soft fur. Sunlight streams through the window, illuminating the cat's whiskers and fur. A small cat toy — a mouse on a string — lies on the sill beside it. A scratching post stands in the corner of the room. A food bowl is visible on the floor nearby. The cat exudes calm elegance and quiet independence.
sentences: A person sits on a living room floor cross-legged, with a cat curled up in their lap. The person strokes the cat's back gently. A cat bed, a water bowl, and cat toys are scattered on the floor nearby. A bag of cat food sits against the wall. The person looks down at the cat with an affectionate, proud smile. The apartment feels like a shared home for person and pet.

A cat sits on a cushion, looking directly at the viewer with round, wide eyes and a small pink nose. Its fur is fluffy and well-groomed. The cat's paws are tucked under its body. A person in the background holds a camera phone, taking a photo of the cat with an adoring expression. The scene radiates cuteness. The lighting is warm and soft.

Two people sit at a table. One leans forward with an eager expression and holds up a phone showing a photo of a cat. The other person smiles and shrugs, then nods enthusiastically. A cat calendar or cat-themed mug is visible on the table. The conversation clearly revolves around a shared love of cats. The atmosphere is casual and friendly.

A student sits at a desk in their bedroom, school bag hung on the back of the chair. Through the window, the afternoon sky is visible. sentences: A diagram-like scene showing a person pointing to both of their ears with their index fingers. Both ears are clearly visible with hair pushed behind them. A person looks at a travel brochure or website showing a beautiful destination. They point at the screen or brochure with an excited, longing expression. A suitcase sits nearby suggesting travel aspirations. The destination in the images looks appealing with stunning scenery. The person's body language shows strong desire to visit.

Two friends sit at a restaurant table. One friend asks the other about the food quality at another restaurant they know of. The other friend gestures enthusiastically with a thumbs up and a wide smile, clearly recommending the food. A menu sits on the table between them. The recommendation is animated and positive.

A person stands at a scenic overlook or photo, looking at the view with a nostalgic, wistful expression. They hold an old photograph of the same location taken years ago. The scene has changed somewhat but is recognizable. The person clearly wants to return and experience the place again. Memories seem to wash over them.

A person sits indoors looking out the window. Outside, snow falls heavily and trees are bare. The person wraps a scarf around their neck and looks at the cold scene with a shivering expression. The question of whether a distant, separate location is also this cold is implied by their thoughtful, wondering gaze outward.

A person stands outside a restaurant with a long line of customers waiting to get in. The restaurant has a distinctive facade and appealing window displays of food. The person points at the restaurant and tells a companion about its fame. The long queue suggests the restaurant's popularity. Both look at the busy establishment.

181.word_prompt: A wall calendar with one specific date circled prominently in red marker. A thought bubble or dreamy haze surrounds the circled date, suggesting it holds special significance. A person looks at the calendar with a reflective, nostalgic expression. Old photographs and mementos are scattered on the desk below the calendar. The scene conveys looking back at or forward to one particular important day. The emphasis is on a single specific date being remembered or anticipated.
sentences: A person stands beside a calendar pointing at a specific circled date. Nearby, a birthday cake with candles sits on a table alongside wrapped gifts and balloons. The person has an excited, anticipatory expression. Party decorations are visible on the wall. The scene clearly connects the calendar date to a birthday celebration.

A person sits on a park bench looking up at a beautiful clear sky with sunshine and gentle clouds. Trees are in full leaf. The person has a content, reminiscent smile. A warm breeze seems to blow through their hair. The perfect weather creates a pleasant, memorable atmosphere. The scene recalls a particular day with lovely weather.

Two friends sit across from each other at a cafe. One leans forward and asks a question while pointing at a date on a phone calendar. The other friend tilts their head trying to remember, tapping their chin thoughtfully. Both have reflective expressions. The cafe is quiet and comfortable.

A person sits at a desk with an old photo album open. They hold up a specific photograph and point at it with a gentle, asking expression. The photo shows people at an event or gathering. A pen and journal sit beside the album. The person seems to be asking someone to recall the specific occasion.

Two friends walk down a street together, laughing and chatting. One playfully nudges the other. A thought bubble or soft flashback overlay shows them meeting for the first time at this same location. The present-day scene mirrors the past memory. Both friends walk naturally and happily.

A person sits at a home office desk surrounded by papers, a ringing phone, multiple open tabs on a laptop, and sticky notes everywhere. They rub their temples showing stress and exhaustion. A clock shows late hours. The desk is chaotic with work demands. The person recalls a particularly hectic, demanding day.

A person sits on a hillside watching a sunset with a wide, blissful smile. Golden light bathes the scene. They hug their knees and look at the horizon with deep contentment. A picnic blanket is spread beneath them. The moment feels perfect and the person's expression radiates pure happiness. The scene captures a truly wonderful day.

A student walks through a school gate carrying a backpack. Other students stream through the entrance. The school building is visible ahead. A clock near the entrance shows morning time. The student has a routine, matter-of-fact expression. The scene depicts a normal school day from the past.

A person looks at a calendar or planner and counts backward with their finger, trying to determine what day of the week a past date fell on. They have a puzzled, calculating expression. A weekly view of the calendar is visible with days labeled. The person counts and then has an aha moment of realization.

Two people sit together at a coffee shop, both leaning in with warm smiles. A timeline or progression is suggested — they first met at some earlier point, and now they see each other regularly. The warmth and familiarity between them conveys a relationship that grew from a specific starting point. The cafe is their regular meeting spot.

182.word_prompt: A person sits in a relaxed position with a casual, unbothered shrug. Their palms are turned upward in an it is what it is gesture. The expression on their face is nonchalant and easygoing. No particular activity or purpose is evident — they are simply being, without agenda. The background is plain and uncluttered. A couch or chair supports their casual posture. The scene conveys doing something without a specific reason or just letting things be.
sentences: A person stands at a kitchen counter eating a snack directly from a container without sitting down or preparing a plate. They chew casually with a nonchalant expression. No utensils or plate are used. The kitchen is otherwise untouched. The person has a whatever gesture, eating without any particular ceremony or reason.

Two friends sit together. One asks a question with a curious, probing expression and open hands. The other responds with a casual shrug, palms up, and a slight head tilt indicating no real reason. Their expression is relaxed and unbothered. The exchange conveys a simple dismissive because answer.

A person lies on a couch in pajamas surrounded by pillows and a blanket. A remote control, snacks, and a phone lie within reach. The curtains are drawn and the room is dim. The person stares at the ceiling contentedly. No plans for the day are evident. The scene conveys choosing to simply stay home.

A person lies stretched out on a bed or couch with eyes closed and a peaceful expression. They are not sleeping but simply resting, doing nothing. A quiet room surrounds them. No books, phones, or activities are visible. Their body language is completely relaxed. The scene conveys wanting nothing more than simple rest.

A person walks along a sidewalk at a leisurely pace, hands in pockets, with no apparent destination. They are not in a hurry and not heading anywhere specific. The street is quiet. The person's posture is relaxed and unhurried. They simply walk along enjoying the air, choosing to walk rather than take transportation.

A person gestures at an object or situation and says leave it with a casual wave of their hand. The object — a mess, an open book, or a misplaced item — remains undisturbed. The person walks away unbothered. Their dismissive hand wave clearly communicates not wanting to deal with it or change anything.

A person stands in a store browsing merchandise but with their hands behind their back, not picking anything up. A store clerk approaches and asks if they need help. The person waves them off politely with a slight smile, indicating they are just looking and not intending to buy. Their posture is relaxed and casual.

Two people talk at a table. One says something casually and then waves it off immediately, as if it was unimportant. Their expression is nonchalant, minimizing what they just said. The other person listens with mild curiosity. The speaker's gesture of waving it off conveys that the remark was not serious.

A person walks along a sidewalk past a storefront or acquaintance without stopping. They glance briefly but continue walking without pause. Their stride is steady and their gaze moves forward again after the brief glance. The scene conveys passing by without engaging — simply continuing on their way.

A person sits alone, and their face breaks into a soft, spontaneous smile for no apparent reason. Their eyes crinkle warmly. No joke, no phone, no stimulus is visible. They simply smile to themselves in a quiet moment. The scene captures a random, unprompted moment of gentle amusement.

183.word_prompt: Two people meet on a street or at a doorway after what appears to be a long separation. They reach for each other with outstretched arms, smiling broadly. Signs of time having passed are visible — slightly changed appearances, different clothing styles. A clock or calendar in the background subtly shows that weeks or months have elapsed. The reunion is warm and emotional. The scene captures the concept of the time that has passed since they last met.
sentences: Two friends meet at a cafe after a long time apart. They embrace warmly with big smiles. One holds the other at arm's length looking them up and down, noting how they have changed. Both have excited, emotional expressions. Coffee cups sit untouched on the table. The reunion is clearly joyful after a significant time apart.

A before-and-after split scene. On one side, a small seedling in a pot sits on a windowsill. On the other side, the same pot now contains a tall, leafy plant. A person stands beside the grown plant looking surprised at how much it has changed. The contrast emphasizes significant change over a period of time.

A person sits across from a friend at a restaurant table. The person gestures with open hands asking what the friend has been doing. The friend counts activities on their fingers while responding. Both have animated expressions. Drinks sit on the table between them. The conversation is about catching up on the intervening period.

Two friends see each other after a long time and one reaches out to hug the other tightly. Tears of joy glisten in their eyes. One person holds the other's hands. Their expressions show deep emotion and relief at being reunited. The setting is a train station or airport arrivals area suggesting distance was involved.

A person sits at a desk surrounded by textbooks, notebooks with extensive notes, and completed workbooks. The desk shows evidence of sustained study over a long period — worn book covers, many filled notebooks, and bookmarks throughout. A calendar with many days crossed off hangs nearby. The person looks at their progress with quiet satisfaction.

Two friends meet after time apart. One looks the other up and down and smiles approvingly, noting they look well. The other person stands tall with a healthy glow and confident posture. Both appear in good health. They shake hands or embrace. The question about each other's wellbeing during the interval is implied.

A person sits at a desk looking tired but accomplished. Behind them, a wall chart shows a long project timeline with many completed milestones checked off. Papers, drafts, and completed work fill the desk. A clock and calendar suggest many weeks have passed. The person wipes their brow with a sense of accomplishment after sustained effort.

A person sits in a waiting room with a ticket or number in hand. A wall clock shows significant time has passed. The person shifts in their seat impatiently. Other people who were waiting before have already been called. The person checks the clock again. The scene conveys having waited for an extended period.

Two people look at a clock or calendar together. One gestures at how much time has moved forward — many calendar pages or clock positions. Both have slightly surprised expressions at how quickly time has gone by. The scene captures the realization that a notable amount of time has elapsed without them noticing.

A person stands at a podium or meeting table speaking to a small group. They bow slightly with hands together in a grateful gesture. The audience smiles warmly back. Flowers or a small gift sit on the table. The speaker's expression is sincere and appreciative. The scene conveys expressing gratitude for a shared period of time together.

184.word_prompt: A group of three or four people stand together at a moderate distance from the viewer. A person in the foreground points toward the group with an extended arm. The group members interact with each other — talking, laughing, or working together. The pointing person is clearly referring to the entire group as they rather than any single individual. The setting is a public space like a park or office lobby. The distinction between the observer and the group being referenced is clear.
sentences: A group of three people stand together at a park, arms around each other's shoulders, laughing. A person watching from a nearby bench looks at them and smiles. The group clearly appears to be close friends. They interact naturally and comfortably. The observer notes their friendship from a distance.

A group of people sit at a library table with books and laptops open, studying intently. They pass notes to each other and point at textbook passages. The atmosphere is focused and academic. An observer walks past and glances at the studying group. The group is clearly engaged in collaborative learning.

A person meets a friend and points toward a group of people at a distance. The friend looks in the indicated direction with a questioning expression. The group is visible but too far to identify clearly. The person who is pointing has an expression suggesting they recognize or know something about the group.

A group of people walk together on a city street, some carrying shopping bags. The city has tall buildings and busy sidewalks. A person watching from a cafe window sees the group pass by. The group walks together naturally, clearly residents of the area. The city setting frames their daily life.

A group of people and a single person sit together at a long restaurant table enjoying a meal. Everyone has plates of food and drinks. The group laughs and converses animatedly. The single person among them also participates happily. The meal is communal and social. The table is full of shared dishes.

A person sits at a desk with a phone in hand. A thought bubble or screen shows a group of people on the other end of the call. The person speaks into the phone with a casual, friendly expression. The group in the thought bubble or on the screen appears to be the people being contacted.

A meeting room with empty chairs around a table. A clock on the wall shows the meeting time has arrived. One person sits at the table looking at the empty chairs with a waiting expression. The door is visible and still closed. Papers and meeting materials are set at each empty place. The expected attendees have not yet arrived.

Two people stand together. One points at two other people nearby and says their names while the other listens. The two people being identified wave or smile. Name tags or labels are not visible but the introduction gesture is clear. All four people are in a social setting like a party or office event.

A group of people volunteer together at a community event — cleaning a park, serving food, or helping at a shelter. They wear matching t-shirts and work cooperatively. An observer watches them with an appreciative, admiring expression. The group's collaborative effort and good nature are evident. The scene is uplifting and positive.

A person stands at a bus stop or meeting point, checking their watch and looking down the street. Two or three other people are expected to arrive. The person shifts weight from foot to foot impatiently. The meeting spot is specific. The person scans the approaching sidewalk for the expected group.

185.word_prompt: A person sits in a chair looking upward and to the side with a distant, reminiscent expression. A faded, sepia-toned thought bubble shows a past scene — perhaps a younger version of themselves at school, at a playground, or at a family gathering. The present-day person and the memory scene coexist in the image. The contrast between the current moment and the recalled past is clear. The person's expression is wistful and reflective. The scene conveys looking back to a specific moment in the past.
sentences: A person sits at a desk looking at an old school photo of themselves in a student uniform. The photo shows a younger version of the person in a classroom. The present-day person smiles gently at the memory. School supplies and a diploma are visible in the background. The contrast between then and now is visible in their appearance.

Two old friends sit together reminiscing. One holds up a photograph from the past. Both lean in to look at it. The friend holding the photo points at it with a knowing smile and a do you remember expression. The other friend's eyes widen with recognition. The photo shows a past event.

Two friends sit together and one gestures curiously, asking what the other was doing at a particular past time. The other friend pauses and thinks, looking upward trying to recall. Their expression is reflective. Both sit comfortably in a casual setting. The question prompts a search through memory.

Two people sit at a cafe table. Between them, a thought bubble or soft overlay shows the moment they first shook hands or introduced themselves. The current scene shows them as comfortable friends. The contrast between the initial meeting and the current familiarity is evident. Both smile at the shared memory.

A winter scene with heavy snow falling outside a window. A person sits inside looking out at the snowfall with a nostalgic expression. A photograph on the wall shows a similar heavy snowfall from the past. The person remembers that particular snowy day. The current snow triggers the memory of the previous one.

A person sits in a rocking chair or comfortable seat with a warm smile and faraway eyes. A soft golden glow surrounds them suggesting happy memories. The person clasps their hands contentedly. The setting is warm and comfortable. Their expression radiates the warmth of remembering a happy time.

A person stands at a location they visited long ago — a childhood home, a school playground, or a favorite park. They look around with a bittersweet, longing expression. The place may have changed somewhat but is recognizable. The person reaches out as if to touch a familiar landmark. They clearly wish they could return to that earlier time.

A person looks at a birthday photo of themselves as a small child. The photo shows a child with a birthday cake surrounded by family. The person counts on their fingers reaching the number ten. Their expression is warm and amused. The photo is yellowed with age. A current family photo sits nearby for contrast.

Two friends sit together and one gestures broadly, asking where the other was at a specific past time. The other friend points in a direction or describes a location using hand gestures — mountains, a building shape, or a city skyline. Both are engaged in recounting a shared past timeline.

Two people sit side by side on a bench. One puts their arm around the other in a familiar, comfortable gesture. A faded timeline or series of small photos floats above them showing their friendship developing over time — meeting, spending time together, sharing meals. Their current closeness reflects a friendship that started at a specific moment and grew.

186.word_prompt: A person nods their head with a calm, agreeable expression. Their eyes are relaxed and their lips form a slight affirming smile. One hand may be raised in a casual thumbs-up or open-palm gesture of agreement. The person faces another person who appears to have just said something. The body language clearly communicates casual verbal agreement — a friendly yes or yeah. The setting is informal, perhaps a living room or outdoor space.
sentences: Two people stand facing each other in conversation. One has just made a statement and looks at the other for confirmation. The listener nods firmly with a calm, affirming expression and a slight smile. Their head dip and direct eye contact clearly communicate agreement. The setting is casual — a sidewalk or home.

Two friends stand at a doorway. One gestures toward the outside with an inviting arm motion, suggesting they go somewhere together. The other friend grabs their jacket and nods enthusiastically, clearly agreeing to join. Both move toward the door together. The initiating friend smiles at the agreement.

Two people sit at a dining table. One has an empty plate and the other asks a question while pointing at the plate. The person with the empty plate nods calmly and pats their stomach with a satisfied expression, confirming they have eaten. A clean plate and used utensils sit before them.

Two friends sit together. One excitedly shares news — leaning forward with animated gestures. The other leans back with raised eyebrows and a surprised but interested expression, asking for confirmation. The news-sharer nods emphatically. The listener's face shows genuine surprise and curiosity.

Two colleagues stand in a hallway. One explains something while holding a document. The other listens carefully and then nods with a clear, understanding expression. They may tap the side of their head indicating comprehension. The conversation is professional but friendly. Both appear to reach mutual understanding.

Two friends sit together looking at a phone screen showing a movie listing or event schedule. One points at a specific option and looks at the other questioningly. The other person nods and smiles approvingly, agreeing to the selection. The phone screen shows the chosen option highlighted. Both look pleased with the plan.

Two people sit at a table. One shares surprising information — gesturing expressively. The other person's eyes widen and their mouth opens slightly in genuine surprise. They lean forward indicating they had no idea about this information. The surprise is mild but real. The setting is a casual meetup.

Two people discuss a plan at a table with a notepad between them. They have been going back and forth. Finally one nods and taps the notepad decisively, agreeing to proceed with the written plan. The other person looks satisfied. Both appear to have reached consensus. The notepad shows crossed-out alternatives and one circled option.

A person receives a compliment from a friend — perhaps about their outfit, cooking, or work. The recipient nods humbly with a warm, appreciative smile and puts a hand to their chest in a thankful gesture. The compliment-giver has a sincere expression. Both interact warmly.

A person receives encouragement from a friend or mentor who pats them on the shoulder. The person being encouraged clenches their fist in a determined pumping motion and nods firmly. Their expression shifts from uncertain to resolved. The scene conveys accepting motivation and committing to try harder.

187.word_prompt: A visual cause-and-effect sequence shown in two connected panels. The left panel shows a cause — dark rain clouds, a tired face, or an empty wallet. An arrow points from the left panel to the right panel which shows the effect — carrying an umbrella, sleeping in bed, or walking past a store. The arrow connecting the two panels is prominent and represents therefore or so. The person's expression in the second panel shows the logical response to the first panel's situation.
sentences: A two-part scene. In the first part, a person holds their growling stomach with a hungry expression. In the second part, the same person sits at a table eating a bowl of food with satisfaction. The transition between the two moments is clear — hunger led to eating. The person's expression changes from uncomfortable to content.

A two-part scene. First, a person looks out a window at heavy rain falling. Second, the same person sits comfortably on a couch at home reading a book while rain continues outside. The window shows the ongoing rain. The person chose to stay home because of the weather.

A two-part scene. First, a person yawns widely at their desk, eyes drooping, struggling to stay awake. Second, the same person is tucked into bed in darkness, fast asleep. A clock shows an early evening hour. The exhaustion from the first scene led directly to the early bedtime.

A two-part scene. First, a person opens their wallet to find it completely empty, looking dismayed. Second, the same person stands in a store looking at an item they want but walks away from it with a resigned shrug. The empty wallet prevented the purchase.

A two-part scene. First, a person sits in bed looking unwell — thermometer in mouth, tissues nearby, flushed cheeks. Second, the person remains in bed while through the window a school building is visible in the distance. A backpack sits unused by the door. The illness prevented going to school.

A two-part scene. First, a window shows bright sunshine and blue sky. Second, a person walks happily outside in the good weather, passing through a park with trees and flowers. Sunglasses are on and their stride is cheerful. The beautiful weather motivated them to go outside.

A two-part scene. First, a person lies in bed with the alarm blaring, groggily hitting snooze. The clock shows a late hour. Second, the same person rushes into a building looking at a clock on the wall that shows they are past the start time. Their expression is flustered and apologetic.

A two-part scene. First, a person studies at a desk surrounded by books, notes, and flashcards deep into the night. A clock shows late hours. Second, the same person sits at a desk smiling broadly at a test paper marked with a high score. The hard work directly produced the good result.

A two-part scene. First, a person stands at a street intersection looking confused, turning a map in different directions. Second, the same person approaches a friendly stranger and points at the map, asking for directions. The stranger points helpfully down the road.

A two-part scene. First, a person sits alone at a lunch table looking around at empty seats. Second, the same person walks alone through a museum or park, appearing contemplative but independent. The lack of companionship led to going solo.

188.word_prompt: A digital kitchen scale sitting on a countertop with a small item placed on its flat surface. The digital display shows a weight reading in numbers with a g unit symbol. Beside the scale, a measuring cup and small scoops are laid out. Various food items of different weights — fruits, flour, sugar — are arranged nearby waiting to be weighed. The scene clearly depicts precise weight measurement in grams. A recipe card is propped up nearby showing ingredient weights.
sentences: A person holds an apple on a small kitchen scale. The digital display shows 200. The person reads the number and nods. The apple sits centered on the scale platform. A notebook beside the scale has weight measurements written down. Other fruits wait on the counter to be weighed.

A person stands at a butcher counter in a supermarket. The butcher places a cut of meat on a hanging scale. The scale needle or digital display shows 300. The person points at the displayed weight and confirms the amount. The butcher wraps the meat in paper. Other cuts are displayed in the case.

A close-up of a hospital or home scale showing a baby being weighed. The baby lies on the padded scale surface. The digital readout shows 3500. A nurse or parent reads the number and records it on a chart. The baby is calm and tiny. Medical instruments are visible in the background.

A person in a kitchen follows a recipe card propped up on the counter. They scoop flour from a bag onto a scale until the display reaches 100. A mixing bowl, eggs, and other baking ingredients are arranged nearby. The person carefully levels the flour for precision. The baking preparation scene is organized and methodical.

A person stands at a kitchen counter adding sugar from a bag to a small bowl on a scale. The digital display reads 50. A recipe card nearby shows the required amount. The person pours carefully, stopping when the number is reached. Baking ingredients and utensils are spread across the counter.

A person holds a small envelope or letter on a postal scale at a counter. The scale shows 30 on its display. Stamps and a pen sit beside the scale. The person checks the weight to determine postage. A post office counter or home desk is the setting. Mailing supplies are visible.

A person holds a chocolate bar and looks at the packaging. The wrapper shows weight information prominently. The bar sits next to other snack items on a table. The person reads the packaging details with interest. A kitchen scale nearby could be used to verify. The packaging clearly displays the weight.

A person at a market stands before a scale where a vendor places vegetables. The scale display shows 500. The vendor bags the weighed vegetables and hands them to the customer. Other produce is displayed on the market stall. The transaction is straightforward and based on measured weight.

A kitchen counter with a block of butter sitting on a small scale. The digital display shows 200. A knife lies beside the butter ready to cut a portion. A baking recipe card is propped up nearby. Other butter-needing ingredients — flour, sugar, eggs — are also on the counter.

A person at a deli counter points at a wheel of cheese. The deli worker cuts a wedge and places it on a scale. The display shows 150. The worker looks at the customer for confirmation. The customer nods. The deli case behind shows other cheeses and meats on display.

189.word_prompt: A split scene divided by a vertical line or contrast. On the left side, a positive or expected situation — sunshine, a smiling face, or a completed task. On the right side, a contrasting or unexpected outcome — rain, a frown, or an obstacle. A large however or but is implied by the sharp visual contrast between the two halves. The person in the scene appears in both halves, showing how the situation unexpectedly changed or contradicted expectations.
sentences: A two-part scene. First, rain pours heavily outside a window. Second, the same person is shown walking outside with an umbrella in the rain, continuing their journey despite the weather. Their expression is determined. Puddles form on the sidewalk but the person presses on. The rain did not stop them.

A two-part scene. First, a person studies intensely at a desk surrounded by books and notes, clearly putting in maximum effort. Second, the same person sits looking at a test result with a disappointed, defeated expression. The high-effort preparation contrasts sharply with the poor outcome. The person rests their chin in their hand.

A two-part scene. First, a person examines a beautiful item in a store — a coat, bag, or device — with admiration. Second, the person looks at the price tag and winces, putting the item back on the shelf reluctantly. The item is desirable but the cost is prohibitive. The contrast between wanting and affording is clear.

A two-part scene. First, a person looks at an appetizing dish or dessert displayed in a restaurant window with longing. Second, the person walks past the restaurant with empty hands and a wistful backward glance. The desired food was unavailable or sold out. An empty display tray is visible inside.

A two-part scene. First, a person looks at a vacation brochure or website showing a beautiful destination with an eager expression. Second, the same person sits at a desk looking at a packed schedule or calendar with no free days. Their expression shifts from excited to resigned. The desire and the constraint conflict.

A two-part scene. First, a person appears to know the answer to something — they perk up with recognition. Second, the same person opens their mouth to speak but then hesitates, putting a hand over their mouth. They know the information but find it difficult or inappropriate to share. The internal conflict is visible.

A two-part scene. First, a person eats a dish with obvious enjoyment — savoring each bite. Second, the same person pushes the plate away with most of the food still remaining. Their stomach or expression suggests they cannot continue eating despite enjoying the taste. Fullness prevents them from finishing.

A two-part scene. First, a person sits in a waiting area, checking their watch repeatedly. They have been waiting a long time and remain patient. Second, an empty doorway or entrance shows no one has arrived. The person's expression shifts from patient to concerned. The expected person did not come.

A two-part scene. First, a person sits at a desk with open textbooks and study materials showing dedicated effort. Second, the same person looks at a difficult problem or passage and furrows their brow in frustration. Despite studying, the material remains challenging. The gap between effort and understanding persists.

A two-part scene. First, a person examines a product with a very low price tag and looks pleased at the deal. Second, upon closer inspection or use, the person notices the item is poorly made — a seam is loose, paint is chipping, or a part is broken. Their expression changes from pleased to disappointed. The low price came at the cost of quality.

190.word_prompt: A person stands confidently making a logical conclusion gesture — one hand extended, finger pointing outward as if connecting a reason to a result. Behind them, a cause is shown (storm clouds, a clock showing lateness, or a full inbox) and in front of them, an action or conclusion is depicted (grabbing an umbrella, running, or working late). An arrow connects the cause to the effect through the person's gesture. The scene shows logical reasoning — because of this, therefore do that.
sentences: A two-part scene. First, rain falls visibly outside a window with dark clouds. Second, a person grabs an umbrella from a stand near the door and heads out. The person's action of taking the umbrella is a direct logical response to the rain. The connection between weather and preparation is clear and sensible.

A two-part scene. First, a clock on the wall shows a time past the expected hour — they are running late. Second, two people hurry along a sidewalk at a brisk pace, moving quickly. One checks their watch while walking fast. The lateness directly causes the rushed movement. Both look slightly stressed.

A person stands at a whiteboard or table explaining something to another person. They draw lines connecting ideas or use their hands to trace a logical flow from one point to the next. The listener follows along and has an understanding expression. The explainer emphasizes the key point by circling or underlining it.

Two people sit in conversation. One explains something and then sits back with a nod of comprehension. The other leans back too, and both have the relaxed posture of mutual understanding. The connection between the explanation and the understanding is complete. Both appear satisfied with the logical conclusion reached.

A two-part scene. First, an icy, wet sidewalk glistens dangerously. A warning sign or visible ice patches are on the path. Second, a person walks carefully on the icy path, taking small measured steps and holding onto a railing. Their cautious movement is a direct logical response to the slippery conditions.

A two-part scene. First, a clock shows a late hour with minimal time remaining. Second, a person rushes to gather their belongings and heads for the door, moving with urgency. Their fast movements are caused by the time pressure. Papers fly and a bag is hastily grabbed.

A two-part scene. First, a dish on a table has visible red peppers and steam indicating extreme spiciness. A warning expression or chili pepper symbol is near the plate. Second, a person pushes the plate away and waves their hand in a stopping gesture, choosing not to eat it. The spiciness is the clear reason for refusal.

A two-part scene. First, a person yawns widely and their eyes droop with exhaustion. Dark circles are visible under their eyes. Second, the person is shown lying on a couch or bed with a blanket pulled over them, resting. The extreme tiredness directly leads to resting. A clock shows afternoon.

A two-part scene. First, a baby sleeps peacefully in a crib. A pacifier rests near the baby's mouth. Second, a parent nearby puts a finger to their lips in a shushing gesture and tiptoes past the crib. The sleeping baby is the direct reason for being quiet. The parent moves with exaggerated care.

A two-part scene. First, a calendar on the wall shows tomorrow's date circled with an exam label. Textbooks sit on a desk. Second, a person sits at the desk with the books open, actively studying with focused determination. Notes and highlighters surround them. The upcoming exam is the clear motivation for preparing right now.

191.word_prompt: Two people stand facing each other in a casual setting. One has just finished speaking and the other responds with a clear hand gesture, pointing forward or raising a finger as if to say 'in that case.' A thought bubble or visual cue above the second person shows a logical arrow connecting two ideas. The background suggests a crossroads or branching path. One path is marked as the condition, the other as the consequence. The scene conveys cause-and-effect reasoning and conditional decision-making.
sentences: A person stands at a window looking out at heavy rain falling outside. Dark clouds fill the sky and water streams down the glass. Inside, the person has settled comfortably onto a sofa with a blanket, choosing to stay indoors. A pair of shoes and an umbrella sit unused by the front door. The contrast between the stormy weather outside and the cozy interior conveys a decision to remain home.

Two friends stand on a sidewalk near a bus stop, one gesturing invitingly toward the bus with an outstretched arm. The other person nods in agreement, stepping forward to join. Both carry bags and appear ready to travel. Their body language shows mutual agreement and readiness to go together.

A person extends both hands toward a friend who is struggling to carry several heavy boxes. The helper has a willing, supportive expression and reaches for the top box. The friend with the boxes looks relieved and grateful. Moving supplies and tape are scattered nearby, indicating a move or delivery task.

Two people sit across from each other at a cafe table, one holding a phone open to a calendar app. The person with the phone points at the screen and raises an eyebrow questioningly. The other person leans forward to look at the schedule. Two coffee cups sit on the table between them. The interaction suggests they are negotiating a meeting time.

A person stands with arms slightly spread, palms up, looking at another person with a questioning, confused expression. The second person appears to be a mentor or guide, holding a clipboard or instruction sheet. The confused person is clearly asking for direction on what to do next. The setting is a workshop or office with tools or materials around.

A person sits at a kitchen table, head propped on one hand, stomach visibly rumbling as indicated by their hand pressing on their abdomen. A second person nearby gestures toward a steaming pot of food on the stove with a warm, encouraging expression. Bowls and utensils are laid out on the table, ready to serve.

Two people stand at a street intersection. One person holds a simple hand-drawn map and looks uncertain. The other person confidently points to the left with an extended arm. A street sign and buildings are visible at the intersection. The guiding person has a reassuring expression and decisive gesture.

Two people stand at a doorway. One person has just arrived and the other stands inside, waving goodbye but holding up one finger and pointing at a calendar on the wall showing tomorrow highlighted. The departing person nods in understanding, clearly agreeing to return the next day.

Two people are in conversation. One person has just finished explaining something, indicated by an open notebook or document between them. The other person nods with closed eyes and a calm, comprehending expression, one hand raised in a small acknowledgment gesture. The scene conveys understanding and acceptance of what was said.

Two people stand at a whiteboard or table with multiple options or plans sketched out. One person circles a particular option and points to it decisively. The other person tilts their head, considers briefly, then nods in agreement. Papers and notes are spread on the table. The scene shows a decision being reached based on discussion.

192.word_prompt: A person stands pointing at a specific category or type of item among several displayed options. Their finger singles out a particular kind, distinguishing it from others. A shelf or display shows multiple varieties of the same product in different styles. The person has an opinionated expression — either approving or disapproving of the indicated type. The scene conveys the concept of referring to a particular kind or type of thing.
sentences: Two people sit facing each other. One person has a stern, serious expression and holds up a hand in a stopping gesture. The other person looks startled, mouth slightly open, as if caught mid-sentence. The first person clearly disapproves of what was being said. Papers or a phone sit between them on the table.

A person stands in a bag store, pointing at a stylish handbag on display. Their eyes are wide with desire and they lean toward the bag, one hand reaching out to touch it. Several different bag styles are displayed on the wall. The person is clearly drawn to that particular type of bag.

A person sits at a restaurant table with a plate of spicy-looking food in front of them. They take a bite and smile contentedly. Several different dishes are on the table. The person points at the spicy dish specifically, indicating they enjoy that particular type of food. Other diners are in the background.

A crowded street scene with many different people walking in various directions. A person observes the crowd and gestures broadly at several people who share a similar characteristic — perhaps all wearing business suits or all carrying umbrellas. The gesture indicates there are many people of that type.

Two people stand in an office or classroom. One person holds a document showing an unexpected event or result. They point at the document with raised eyebrows and an inquiring expression, asking if this kind of thing is common. The other person considers the question thoughtfully.

A person sits at a desk with a pensive expression, chin resting on their hand. A thought bubble or cleared space around their head suggests they are dismissing certain ideas. They shake their head slightly, eyes focused elsewhere. An open journal or notebook sits in front of them with a pen laid aside.

A person in a fitting room or clothing store holds up a unique, eye-catching outfit and turns to a friend with a curious, admiring expression. They gesture at the clothes and raise their eyebrows in question, clearly asking where to find such an item. Shopping bags and hangers are visible nearby.

A person stands outdoors in grey, drizzly weather, huddled under an umbrella with a dissatisfied, annoyed frown. Puddles form on the ground and the sky is overcast. The person looks up at the clouds with clear displeasure. Their expression and body language convey dislike of this particular type of weather.

Two people sit on a park bench talking. One person leans forward with an animated, questioning expression, hands gesturing as they ask about an experience. The other person tilts their head, thinking about whether they have had a similar experience. A thoughtful pause is visible in the scene.

A person looks at a travel brochure or phone screen showing a beautiful tropical beach with palm trees and crystal-clear water. Their eyes are dreamy and a wistful smile crosses their face. They point at the image with longing. The setting is an ordinary room, contrasting with the paradise in the picture.

193.word_prompt: Two people in mid-conversation, with one person raising a finger to interject or change the subject. The speaker tilts their head and has an expression that signals a topic shift or contrast. A visual divider or contrasting background suggests a transition between two different ideas. One side of the scene represents one topic while the other side shows something entirely different. The overall composition conveys a conversational pivot or unexpected contrast.
sentences: Two friends walk together on a street. One suddenly turns to the other with a curious expression, pointing at nearby restaurants as if changing the subject. The other person looks surprised by the abrupt topic shift. One hand gestures toward food options while the conversation clearly changes direction.

A person takes a bite of a beautifully decorated dessert and initially smiles with delight. However, their expression quickly shifts — they wince slightly and press their lips together, indicating it is overly sweet. The dessert looks elaborate and appealing but the reaction shows mixed feelings.

Two people walk along a path. One person suddenly stops and turns to the other with an inquisitive expression, gesturing in a direction as if asking where the other is heading. The second person is caught off guard by the sudden question, pausing mid-step. The scene shows a spontaneous, redirected conversation.

A person sits at a desk working on a challenging puzzle or math problem. Their initial expression is concentrated and tense. Then their face relaxes into pleasant surprise as they realize the solution is simpler than expected. Papers with calculations are spread on the desk. The transition from struggle to relief is visible.

Two people sit at a lunch table. One person suddenly taps the other on the arm and leans in with a conspiratorial, excited expression, about to share something they just remembered. The other person turns with curious attention. Food trays sit between them. The scene captures a spontaneous recall moment.

Two friends meet on the street. One asks about the other with a warm, checking-in expression. The second person pauses and considers, then responds with a so-so hand gesture and a thoughtful look. The scene captures casual catching-up between acquaintances.

A person sits at a desk surrounded by completed work — papers, a closed laptop, and finished assignments. They look tired but satisfied. Then their expression shifts to one of slight frustration, rubbing their neck. The contrast between accomplishment and exhaustion is clear in their body language.

Two people are in conversation at a table. One person raises a finger politely and leans forward with a hopeful expression, clearly wanting to ask an additional question. The other person pauses, looking receptive. A notebook with notes sits between them. The scene captures a polite interjection.

A person stands in front of a mirror wearing a newly purchased outfit. They check the fit, pulling at the fabric around the waist or sleeves with a dissatisfied expression. A shopping bag and receipt are visible nearby. The clothes look nice but clearly do not fit properly.

Two people are chatting when one suddenly glances at a clock on the wall with a startled expression. They tap their wrist or point at the clock, interrupting the conversation to ask the time. The clock shows a time that might be concerning. The other person also looks up at the clock.

194.word_prompt: A person stands with one hand slightly raised, palm open, as if concluding a discussion and moving to the next step. Their expression is decisive and ready, suggesting they have processed information and are now ready to act. A doorway or starting line is visible ahead, symbolizing the next step forward. The scene conveys transitional agreement — wrapping up a discussion and beginning action.
sentences: Two friends stand at the edge of a sidewalk. One gestures forward with enthusiasm, inviting the other to walk alongside them. The second person steps forward to join. Both have friendly, agreeable expressions. The street ahead stretches out before them, ready for their shared journey.

Two people check their phones at a cafe. One person types a message and shows the screen to the other, pointing at a date — tomorrow. Both nod in agreement. A calendar notification is visible on the phone screen. Their expressions are satisfied and settled, having made definite plans.

A person responds to a question with a broad, confident smile and a firm, definitive nod. Their eyes are bright and certain. One hand makes an emphatic affirming gesture. The other person asking the question looks relieved and reassured by the absolute certainty of the response.

A group of people sit around a meeting table with papers and devices spread out. One person clasps their hands together and looks around the group with a readiness expression, clearly suggesting it is time to begin. Others look up attentively. The scene captures the moment just before a meeting or project starts.

Two people stand at a doorway or gate. One is about to leave and turns back with a warm wave and smile. The other stands at the door, waving back. Both have friendly, parting expressions. The scene captures a casual goodbye with the implicit promise to see each other again soon.

Two people stand near a whiteboard with multiple options written or drawn on it. One person circles an option and taps it with the marker. The other person considers for a moment, then nods in agreement. Both look satisfied with the chosen approach. The whiteboard shows the selected plan highlighted.

Two people face each other across a table. One makes a suggestion and the other immediately smiles, giving a thumbs up. Their expression is genuinely pleased. A project folder or plan document sits on the table between them. The accepting person leans back contentedly.

Two people stand together looking at a map or screen showing options. One person shrugs with a questioning expression, hands open, clearly asking what to do. The other person points at a specific option and raises an eyebrow. Both appear engaged in finding the best course of action.

A person stands near a group of friends who are heading out. The person grabs their jacket and bag, stepping forward to join the departing group. They have a spontaneous, eager expression. The friends ahead turn and wave them along. The scene captures a quick decision to join in.

A person sits at a desk, closes a laptop, and pushes back their chair. They stretch and look satisfied. A clock on the wall shows late afternoon. Papers are neatly stacked. The person clearly wraps up their task for the day, standing to leave with a contented expression.

195.word_prompt: A person demonstrates a specific method or technique to another person, who then copies the exact same motion. An instructor shows a precise hand position or body stance, and beside them the learner mirrors it perfectly. Arrows or visual indicators connect the original method to the imitation. The scene conveys 'in that manner' or 'to that degree' — the concept of doing something a specific, demonstrated way.
sentences: An instructor stands beside a student at a workbench. The instructor has just completed a step — perhaps folding paper or assembling a piece. They gesture at the completed step and nod approvingly. The student looks at their own matching result with satisfaction. The scene conveys that the method shown is correct.

A customer at a service counter points at a specific arrangement or setup and nods approvingly. A worker behind the counter adjusts an item to match the customer request precisely. The customer watches carefully and gives a confirming gesture. The interaction shows a request to do something in a particular way.

A person sits at a dining table covered with many empty plates and bowls. Their stomach is visibly full and they lean back, patting their abdomen. Another person at the table looks at the pile of empty dishes with wide-eyed surprise, astonished at the quantity consumed.

A teacher or supervisor shakes their head firmly while watching a student perform a task incorrectly. The student holds tools or materials in the wrong position. The teacher holds up a hand in a stopping gesture and points at the incorrect technique. The scene clearly shows disapproval of the method being used.

A person sits at a desk with an open textbook. They flip through pages casually, expression relaxed and unbothered. A friend sitting nearby with the same book looks stressed. The relaxed person shrugs and smiles, indicating the material is not as challenging as expected. The contrast between the two reactions is clear.

Two people stand side by side at a cooking station. The first person performs a specific chopping technique, then gestures for the second to copy. The second person carefully mimics the exact same hand motion on their own cutting board. Both have vegetables and knives. The scene shows imitation of a demonstrated method.

Two people sit across from each other in discussion. One person makes a statement and the other nods vigorously, pointing at them and then at themselves, clearly indicating shared agreement. Both have earnest, engaged expressions. Papers or notes between them show they are discussing the same topic.

A person sits across from another who has just said something hurtful. The listener holds up a hand and has a pained or displeased expression, clearly asking the speaker not to speak in that manner. The speaker looks taken aback. The emotional tension in the scene is visible.
