A person looks at a vision board or set of goals pinned on a wall. They clasp their hands together in a hopeful gesture, eyes bright and optimistic. The board shows positive outcomes — a graduation cap, a happy family, a new home. The person clearly wishes for things to turn out as depicted.

A person walks very quickly down a corridor or street, almost running. Another person watches them rush past with a surprised, wide-eyed expression. The fast walker carries a bag and their stride is long and hurried. The observer gestures in amazement at the speed.

196.word_prompt: A person sits listening to someone explain something, and their expression shifts from confusion to understanding — eyebrows lifting, a small nod, and a look of realization crossing their face. A metaphorical light bulb appears to illuminate above them. The listener is clearly receiving new information and processing it. The overall scene captures the moment of comprehension and acknowledgment.
sentences: A person listens to a friend explain something, eyes widening as they hear new information. They tilt their head back slightly with raised eyebrows and an expression of mild surprise. Their lips form a small 'oh.' A previously unknown fact has just been revealed. The listener did not know this before and their expression shows genuine discovery.

A student sits in class as a teacher finishes an explanation at the whiteboard. The student nods slowly, expression brightening as understanding dawns. They straighten up in their chair and their previously furrowed brow relaxes. An open textbook and notes sit on the desk. The transition from confusion to clarity is visible on their face.

A person sits at a table listening to another explain a situation. As the explanation continues, the listener nods thoughtfully and their eyes widen with an 'aha' moment — they now understand the cause behind something. The explainer uses hand gestures. The listener leans back with a look of sudden comprehension.

Two friends sit on a bench. One tells a personal story with a tired, strained expression. The other listens intently and their face softens with empathy and understanding. They lean slightly toward their friend and place a comforting hand on their arm. The scene conveys sympathetic acknowledgment of hardship.

Two people are in conversation. One shares a surprising piece of news. The listener initially reacts with wide eyes and a look of realization, then leans forward with a skeptical, questioning expression as if to confirm what they just heard. The contrast between surprise and seeking confirmation is clear.

A person listens to an explanation from a colleague who points at a chart or diagram. The listener nods slowly, their expression transitioning from puzzlement to understanding. They raise a finger as if to say they now see the underlying reason. The chart shows data or a flow that explains a cause.

Two friends meet. One asks why the other missed a recent gathering. The absent friend explains with apologetic gestures. The questioning friend nods slowly in understanding, their expression shifting from curiosity to comprehension as they now understand the reason for the absence.

A person reads a book or article with growing interest. They pause, look up from the page with raised eyebrows, and tilt their head as if processing a newly learned piece of information. A finger marks their place on the page. Their expression shows fresh discovery and intellectual curiosity.

A teacher finishes drawing a diagram on a whiteboard. A student in the front row watches the final step, then their expression suddenly clears — mouth opening slightly, eyes brightening, posture straightening. They put down their pen and nod firmly, clearly having grasped the concept fully.

A person listens as another describes an unusual hobby or scientific fact. The listener tilts their head with fascination, eyes wide and mouth slightly parted. They lean forward with genuine interest and curiosity. The speaker has an animated, enthusiastic posture. The scene captures wonder and fascination at learning something new.

197.word_prompt: Two people face each other in conversation. One person nods firmly and holds up a hand in a confirming gesture, clearly affirming something the other has said. A checkmark or affirmative visual element hovers in the scene. The affirming person has a calm, certain expression. The overall composition conveys agreement and confirmation of a stated fact.
sentences: A person stands straight and nods firmly with a composed, serious expression. They make direct eye contact and give a single decisive nod. Their posture is upright and confident. The setting is somewhat formal — an office or meeting room. The person clearly confirms a fact with certainty.

Two people sit across a table. One has just finished explaining something, hands open. The other person nods thoughtfully, eyes slightly narrowed in comprehension, one hand resting on the table palm-down. Their expression conveys conditional understanding — if that is the case, they grasp the implications.

Two colleagues stand near a whiteboard with ideas written on it. One person points at a particular statement and the other nods in agreement, arms crossed but with an approving tilt of the head. Both clearly share the same assessment. The whiteboard content links their discussion.

A person shakes their head slowly but firmly from side to side, hands up in a gentle denial gesture. Their expression is calm but definitive. The other person in the conversation looks slightly surprised. The setting is neutral — a cafe or living room. The scene clearly conveys a polite denial or negation.

A person sits across from another and leans forward with a probing, incredulous expression. Eyebrows are raised and they gesture with one hand, clearly asking for confirmation of something surprising. The other person maintains a composed look, neither confirming nor denying yet.

A person at a podium or front of a room nods emphatically and taps the podium once. Their expression is firm and authoritative. An audience member or colleague nearby also nods along. The scene conveys double confirmation — reinforcing that something is correct.

Two friends sit on a sofa. One makes a thoughtful statement and the other nods, pointing at the friend and then at themselves, indicating they share the exact same view. Their body language is aligned and harmonious. Both look contemplative but in agreement.

A person sits with a puzzled expression, one hand on their chin, eyes looking upward. They tilt their head and shrug slightly, indicating uncertainty. A question mark seems to float above them. Papers or a phone screen in front of them shows ambiguous information.

Two people in conversation. One raises their eyebrows expectantly and gives a small nod, clearly seeking agreement from the other. Their expression says 'right?' The other person begins to nod back. The exchange is brief and affirming.

Two colleagues stand together. One person tilts their head and extends a hand, palm up, in a seeking gesture. They nod repeatedly and look at the other for validation. The second person mirrors the nod. Both clearly seek and receive mutual agreement.

198.word_prompt: A person in formal or professional attire stands at attention or in a polished stance. They give a respectful, measured nod of affirmation. Their posture is straight and their hands are clasped in front or at their sides. The setting is formal — a conference room, office, or official ceremony. A microphone or lectern is nearby. The person communicates a polished, formal confirmation.
sentences: A person in professional attire stands before a seated audience or interviewer. They nod firmly and respectfully, chin slightly elevated. Their posture is straight and dignified. A table or podium is in front of them. The setting is a formal meeting room. The response is clearly a polite, formal affirmation.

A student or young person sits attentively across from a teacher or elder. The teacher has just made a statement. The young person nods respectfully and gestures toward the teacher, acknowledging the correctness of what was said. Books and papers are on the table between them.

A person in business attire stands at a lectern. They nod firmly and tap the lectern once. A presentation screen behind them shows a confirmed point. The audience watches attentively. The speaker doubles down on the affirmation — confirming with emphasis that something is correct.

A person in a meeting nods and also raises a finger, indicating they too were already aware of the confirmed fact. Their expression is knowing and agreeable. A colleague across the table shares the affirmation. Documents are spread between them.

A well-dressed receptionist or service person stands behind a counter and nods with a warm, professional smile. They bow slightly. A customer stands on the other side looking pleased. The exchange is polite and the scene conveys formal courtesy and agreement.

A presenter at the front of a classroom or boardroom points at the correct answer displayed on a screen or board. They nod and smile, confirming the answer. Students or audience members look satisfied. The correct option is highlighted or circled on the display.

A uniformed guide or receptionist stands in a hallway and gestures with one hand in a welcoming direction, nodding. The gesture clearly invites someone to follow in a specific direction. The setting is formal — a hotel, hospital, or office building. The guide has a polite, affirming demeanor.

Two people in business attire shake hands. One smiles and nods approvingly at the other, impressed by their knowledge. The person receiving the compliment looks modestly pleased. A conference table or office background is visible. The scene conveys mutual respect and acknowledgment of expertise.

A person stands at an information counter or kiosk. Behind them are directional signs pointing various ways. They confirm the correct direction by pointing firmly and nodding. A visitor stands in front of them, looking relieved at the guidance. A map or floor plan is visible on the counter.

A person in professional attire stands confidently in a reception area or meeting setting. When someone approaches and identifies them, they step forward with a composed nod and a slight bow, confirming their identity. A name badge is visible on their lapel. Their demeanor is poised and self-assured.

199.word_prompt: A person stands at a crossroads or fork in the road. One direction is marked with a positive symbol and the other with a contrasting negative one. The person faces the difficult direction determinedly despite the easier path being visible. Their expression shows resolve against adversity. The composition conveys the concept of 'however' or 'nevertheless' — acknowledging one fact but proceeding with a contrasting action.
sentences: A person sits at a desk looking exhausted — dark circles under their eyes, shoulders slumped, papers piled high. Despite the visible fatigue, they square their shoulders, pick up a pen, and lean forward with renewed determination. Their jaw is set and eyes focused. The scene conveys pushing through difficulty.

A person stands in a boutique holding up a beautiful dress or jacket on a hanger. They admire it with one hand touching the fabric. Then they flip the price tag and their expression changes — they wince at the cost. The garment is lovely but the price is shocking. The contrast between admiration and sticker shock is clear.

A person sits at a dining table staring longingly at a slice of cake or delicious dessert. They reach toward it, then pull their hand back reluctantly. A diet plan or health chart is visible nearby. Their expression shows desire conflicting with restraint. The untouched dessert remains on the plate.

A person sits on the edge of a bed looking drained and weary, rubbing their eyes. An alarm clock or phone shows an early hour. Despite their exhaustion, they stand up and begin putting on their work clothes or uniform. Their movements are reluctant but determined. A work bag sits by the door.

A person holds up a tiny, cute item — a small bag, toy, or figurine. They smile at it appreciatively but then look at it with slight disappointment, holding it next to a much larger version of the same item. The small size is a drawback despite the appeal.

A person sits at a desk with a complex textbook or problem set. They nod, indicating they understand the concept, but then furrow their brow and scratch their head as they attempt to apply it. The gap between theoretical knowledge and practical difficulty is visible in their expression.

A dark street scene at night. A person checks the time on their phone — it shows a late hour. Despite the lateness, the person walks purposefully toward a building, pushing through a door. Their determination to arrive despite being late is evident.

A person sits at an office desk surrounded by work — stacked files, ringing phone, and a crowded email inbox on their computer screen. A friend or colleague stands at the desk asking for help. Despite the obvious workload, the person turns from their screen and nods willingly, pushing papers aside to assist.

A person stands before a complicated machine, appliance, or coding screen, looking uncertain. They raise their hands in a slight shrug of confusion but then lean forward, roll up their sleeves, and begin attempting the task. Their face shows determination despite not knowing the answer.

A person stands at a window or doorway looking out at a snowy, freezing winter scene. They shiver and wrap their arms around themselves. Despite the bitter cold, they put on a thick coat, scarf, and hat, and step outside into the snow. Their breath forms clouds in the frigid air.

200.word_prompt: A ceramic bowl sits on a wooden table, viewed from slightly above. The bowl is round with a smooth glazed interior. Inside, steamed white rice is mounded neatly. A pair of chopsticks rests across the bowl rim. Beside it, a smaller sauce dish holds dark liquid. Additional bowls of various sizes are stacked on a shelf in the background. The scene is a simple Korean dining setup with clean dishware.
sentences: A person stands at a kitchen counter scooping steamed white rice from a rice cooker into a round ceramic bowl using a rice paddle. Steam rises from the rice. The bowl is placed on a wooden cutting board. Other empty bowls wait on the counter nearby. The person carefully portions the rice.

A person stands at a kitchen sink with rubber gloves on, scrubbing a bowl under running water with a sponge. Soap suds cover the bowl surface. A dish rack beside the sink holds already-washed plates and cups. The clean bowl gleams where the sponge has scrubbed. Clean water rinses away the suds.

A person stands in a kitchenware store holding a newly purchased ceramic bowl, examining it closely. The bowl is smooth and new with a price sticker on the bottom. A shopping bag from the store is on the counter. Other bowls in various patterns are displayed on shelves around the store.

A kitchen floor with pieces of a broken ceramic bowl scattered on the tiles. The fragments are white with a blue pattern. A person stands nearby with a startled, dismayed expression, hands raised. A broom and dustpan lean against the wall nearby. Small pieces and chips lie around the largest fragment.

A person stands at a stove holding a ladle full of soup over a large pot. They carefully pour the hot soup into a waiting bowl on the counter. Steam rises from both the pot and the bowl. Side dishes in small plates are arranged nearby on the counter. The person ladles with careful attention.

A kitchen counter or table showing exactly two ceramic bowls side by side. One is slightly larger than the other. Both are empty and clean, matching in pattern. A person stands behind the counter counting or pointing at the bowls. Other kitchen items — a teapot, cutting board — are visible in the background.

A person holds up an unusually large serving bowl, comparing it to a regular-sized bowl sitting on the table. The large bowl is clearly oversized. The person raises their eyebrows and shakes their head, indicating the bowl is too big. The size difference between the two bowls is dramatic and obvious.

A person sets a bowl carefully down on a dining table that is being set for a meal. A placemat or tablecloth is under the bowl. Chopsticks and a spoon are laid beside it. Other place settings are partially arranged around the table. The person adjusts the bowl position precisely.

A person places washed fruit — apples, grapes, and oranges — into a large decorative bowl on a kitchen counter. The bowl is wide and shallow. The colorful fruit fills the bowl attractively. A cutting board and knife sit beside the bowl. The arranged fruit bowl looks like a kitchen centerpiece.

A person stands in a kitchen opening cabinet doors and looking inside, searching for something. They check upper shelves and lower drawers. Their expression is mildly puzzled. Plates, cups, and other dishes are visible in the cabinet but the specific item they seek — a bowl — is not immediately found.

201.word_prompt: Two distinct items or activities are placed side by side, connected by a visual link — a plus sign, an arrow, or a joining line. One side shows one item and the other side shows a second, additional item. Both elements are equally prominent. The overall composition conveys the concept of addition — one thing AND another. The background is clean and the two connected items are the focus.
sentences: A person sits at a dining table with two dishes in front of them. On the left is a bowl of steamed white rice. On the right is a small dish of spicy fermented vegetables. The person holds chopsticks and alternates between both dishes, enjoying each equally. Both dishes are prominently displayed on the table.

A person in a home stands with cleaning supplies. Behind them, a freshly vacuumed living room is visible. In their hands, they carry a basket of freshly folded laundry. Both completed chores are evident — the clean room and the done laundry. The person looks satisfied with a productive day.

A family portrait setting showing a father standing on one side and a mother standing on the other. A person in the center gestures toward each parent in turn, introducing them. Both parents smile warmly. The family group stands in a living room or photo studio setting.

A person stands at a checkout counter with a grocery bag. Inside the bag, apples are visible on one side and bananas on the other. The person lifts both fruits to show their purchases. A receipt sits on the counter. The scene shows two separate items purchased together.

A student walks through a school gate carrying a backpack in the morning. Later in the same scene (or a split scene), the same student sits at a desk with an open textbook, studying. Both activities — going to school and studying — are represented. The school building and classroom are both visible.

Two people stand side by side. One is notably tall and the other gestures at the tall person, then holds a hand over their heart in a warm gesture, indicating the tall person is also kind. The tall person smiles gently. Both qualities — height and kindness — are conveyed.

An outdoor scene with bright sunshine and a clear blue sky. A person stands with arms outstretched, feeling the warmth. A thermometer or visual indicator shows warm temperature. Trees have full green leaves and flowers bloom. The scene clearly depicts a day that is both sunny and warm.

A customer sits at a cafe table. A waiter approaches with a tray carrying a cup of coffee and a slice of cake. The customer points at both items on the tray, having ordered them together. The cafe counter is visible in the background. Both items are equally prominent on the tray.

A split-style scene: on one side, a person jogs in a park wearing athletic clothes. On the other side, the same person sits at a cafe with a friend, chatting and laughing. A calendar shows these are weekend plans. Both activities are presented as equal priorities.

A person sits in a cozy reading chair with an open book in one hand and headphones around their neck. A bookshelf and a music speaker are both visible. The person is clearly someone who enjoys both reading and listening to music. Both hobbies are represented in the scene.

202.word_prompt: A person sits at an art table with a pencil in hand, actively drawing on a large white sheet of paper. Their hand moves the pencil in careful strokes. A partially completed sketch of a subject — an animal, landscape, or object — is visible on the paper. Art supplies surround them: colored pencils, an eraser, and a palette. The person looks focused and absorbed in the creative process.
sentences: A student sits at an art desk with a completed drawing of a detailed flower on the paper in front of them. Colored pencils and an eraser are scattered around. The flower has petals, a stem, and leaves carefully rendered. The student holds up the finished drawing with a proud expression.

A young child lies on the floor on their stomach, crayons spread around them. They draw a simple house with a triangular roof, square windows, and a door on a large sheet of paper. The child holds a red crayon and is coloring the roof. The drawing is charming and childlike.

A teacher stands at a blackboard drawing a simple map with colored chalk. Countries or regions are outlined. Students sit at desks watching the teacher draw, some copying the map into their notebooks. The blackboard shows the map taking shape with borders and labels.

A person sits at a desk with a sheet of white paper. They carefully draw a cat with a pencil — the outline of the cat body, ears, and tail are visible on the paper. The person holds the pencil delicately and peers at a reference photo of a cat propped beside the paper.

A person sits in a sunny studio surrounded by canvases and art supplies. They hold a sketchbook open, showing multiple drawings — landscapes, faces, animals. Their expression is content and passionate. An easel with a work in progress stands behind them. The scene conveys a love of drawing as a hobby.

A student sits at a desk with a homework sheet. They are drawing a detailed tree with branches and leaves using colored pencils. The tree grows from the bottom of the paper, branches spreading across the page. A textbook with a tree illustration is open beside them for reference.

A person sits on a park bench with a sketchbook on their lap. They hold a pencil and draw the scenic view in front of them — a pond, trees, and a small bridge. The real scenery is visible behind the sketchbook. The partially completed sketch captures the park landscape.

Two friends sit at a table. One holds out a pencil to the other and taps a blank sheet of paper, making a request. A reference photo of a cat is placed beside the paper. The friend takes the pencil and begins sketching. The scene shows a friendly creative favor.

A person sits looking nostalgic, surrounded by childhood drawings pinned on a wall or spread on a table. The drawings are simple and childlike — stick figures, houses with chimneys, bright suns. The person smiles warmly at the old artwork. Crayons and old art supplies are scattered among the drawings.

A person sits at a table with a set of colored pencils laid out in a rainbow arc. On the paper in front of them, a vibrant rainbow stretches across the page in colored pencil strokes. Each color band is distinct and bright. The person adds the final violet band with careful strokes.

203.word_prompt: A framed painting hangs on a white gallery wall, illuminated by a small overhead spotlight. The painting shows a colorful landscape — rolling hills, a blue sky, and a winding river. Below the frame, a small placard describes the artwork. Beside it on the wall, other framed artworks of different sizes and styles are visible. An easel with a fresh canvas stands in the corner of the room. Art supplies — brushes in a cup, a palette — are nearby.
sentences: A cozy bedroom with a beautiful framed painting hanging above the bed. The painting shows a peaceful nature scene — flowers and meadows. The room is tidy and the painting is the focal point on the wall. Soft lighting illuminates the artwork. A person looks at the painting with an appreciating expression.

A person walks through an art gallery, pausing before a large painting on the wall. The painting shows a dramatic landscape. Other framed works line the gallery walls. The person leans in to study the brushstrokes. A small descriptive placard is mounted beside the painting. Gallery lighting highlights the artwork.

A person wraps a small painting in decorative paper and ribbon, preparing it as a gift. The painting is a watercolor of a scenic view. Gift wrapping materials — tape, scissors, ribbon — are spread on the table. A gift tag sits ready to be attached. The person wraps carefully, clearly preparing a thoughtful present.

A person sits at a table with art supplies spread out — brushes, watercolors, a cup of rinse water. They paint with a focused, happy expression. A partially completed painting of a sunset sits on the easel beside them. Their smock has paint stains. The scene conveys enjoyment of the painting hobby.

A person stands on a chair or step ladder, holding a framed painting against a wall. A hammer and nail sit on a nearby table. The wall has a hook already in place. The person carefully aligns the painting frame with the hook. The painting shows an abstract or floral design.

A young child sits at a small table, finishing a colorful drawing with crayons. The drawing shows their family — stick figures of different heights holding hands under a bright sun. The child holds up the completed artwork triumphantly. Crayons are scattered across the table.

An open illustrated children book lies on a table, pages spread wide. The book is full of colorful illustrations — animals, trees, and characters on every page. A child flips through the pages, eyes wide with delight at each new picture. Many pictures are visible across the open spread.

A person stands in a gallery or living room, gazing at a painting with a pleased, admiring smile. They tilt their head and cross their arms lightly, clearly fond of the artwork. The painting shows a serene scene. A warm glow from the overhead light bathes the painting. The person appears personally connected to the piece.

A painting of a majestic mountain landscape hangs in a prominent position in a room. Snow-capped peaks, pine trees, and a clear sky fill the canvas. A person points at the painting and explains what it depicts. The mountain scene is vivid and detailed.

A student sits at a desk completing a homework assignment that includes drawing a picture. Art supplies are spread on the desk. The student carefully colors a drawing with colored pencils. A completed assignment paper with instructions sits beside the artwork. The student concentrates on getting the details right.

204.word_prompt: A person holds up both hands in a firm stopping gesture, palms out, clearly signaling that an activity must cease immediately. Their expression is resolute and decisive. In front of them, an activity is in progress — something being done, consumed, or played. The stopping gesture interrupts the flow of action. The scene conveys an authoritative command to halt or the concept of 'enough.'
sentences: A parent sits at a dinner table across from a child whose plate is empty and stomach visibly rounded. The child reaches for more food but the parent holds up a gentle hand and shakes their head. The child pats their full belly. Empty dishes and crumbs cover the table.

A person sits in a dark room illuminated only by a bright game screen. A clock on the wall shows very late at night. Another person stands in the doorway, pointing at a bed visible in the next room and then at the clock. The standing person clearly instructs the gamer to stop and sleep.

Two people face each other with angry, heated expressions. A third person stands between them with both arms outstretched, physically separating the two. The peacemaker has a firm, commanding expression. The two arguing people are leaning toward each other aggressively. The intervener clearly demands they stop.

A person sits at an office desk with papers and a computer. A clock on the wall shows late evening. The person begins closing files and shutting down the computer. A colleague stands nearby with their coat on, gesturing toward the door. Both look ready to wrap up the day.

An adult kneels beside a crying child, gently holding the child's shoulders and looking into their face with a warm, reassuring expression. Tears stream down the child's face. The adult hands the child a tissue and pats their back soothingly. The scene conveys comforting a child and encouraging them to stop crying.

A person sits on a sofa watching television. Another person stands nearby holding a textbook and pointing at a desk with study materials. The standing person gestures firmly from the TV to the desk. The viewer on the sofa looks reluctant but begins to stand up.

Two people sit at a table deep in conversation. One person yawns and rubs their eyes tiredly. They hold up a hand to pause the conversation and gesture at their watch. Their expression shows they are too tired to continue talking. The other person nods understandingly.

A person stands in a shopping mall carrying many shopping bags — four or five from different stores. Another person beside them holds an empty wallet open, showing no money inside. They point at the bags and shake their head. The shopper looks disappointed but stops reaching for more items.

Two people are in a room. One person plays loud music on a speaker. The other person covers their ears and makes an exaggerated pained expression. They gesture firmly at the speaker, asking for the music to be turned off. The volume indicator on the speaker shows it is very high.

Two people are outdoors. One person bends over, hands on knees, breathing heavily after running. They wave their hand in a stopping gesture. Sweat drips from their forehead. The other person also slows to a walk. A park path stretches behind them. The exhausted runner clearly cannot continue.

205.word_prompt: A younger person stands respectfully, gesturing with both hands toward an older, distinguished individual who is slightly in the distance or shown in a thought bubble. The referenced person is clearly someone of status or respect — a teacher, doctor, or elder — dressed formally. The younger person bows slightly or speaks with a formal posture. The scene conveys honorific reference to a respected individual.
sentences: A classroom with a teacher standing at the front near a chalkboard. A student in the hallway outside points through the doorway window at the teacher and speaks to a companion with a respectful expression. The teacher inside wears professional attire and holds a book. The student referencing the teacher has a formal, admiring tone in their posture.

A person describes someone to a friend, gesturing with open hands and smiling warmly. The described person is shown or implied to be a kind elder — perhaps a grandmother figure visible in a framed photo on a table nearby. The speaker's expression is affectionate and respectful.

Two people stand in conversation. One holds a photo or points at someone across a room and turns to the other with a questioning expression, clearly asking about the person's identity. The referenced person is partially visible in the distance, distinguished in appearance. The questioner is polite and curious.

Two people look at a map or city directory. One points at a neighborhood or address and asks about someone who lives there. A house or apartment building is referenced on the map. The question is about someone specific. The tone of the conversation appears respectful and formal.

A hospital corridor. A person in professional medical attire — white coat, stethoscope — walks past. Another person watches them pass and turns to a companion, gesturing toward the doctor with an informing expression. The doctor appears competent and respected. The scene clearly identifies the referenced person as a medical professional.

Two people are in conversation. One holds up fingers as if counting or estimating an age, looking curious. They gesture toward someone who is out of frame. The question about the person's age is posed respectfully. The conversation takes place in a polite, formal setting.

A person stands looking at a portrait or photo of a distinguished individual — a community leader, teacher, or mentor — hanging on a wall. They place a hand over their heart and have an expression of deep respect and admiration. The portrait shows a dignified, composed individual.

Two friends sit at a cafe. One asks about a mutual acquaintance, leaning forward with interest. The other considers, then nods, indicating they see that person frequently. Both have engaged, conversational expressions. A coffee cup and pastry sit between them.

An office building entrance. A person in business attire — suit and briefcase — walks through the revolving door. Another person nearby turns to a companion and indicates the office worker, providing information about their profession. The office worker looks professional and purposeful.

Two people stand in a social setting. One points discreetly toward a person across the room and turns to the other with a questioning expression, asking if they recognize or know that individual. The referenced person mingles in the background. The question is asked with polite curiosity.

206.word_prompt: A wall calendar with today's date circled. Two days before today is highlighted or marked differently, clearly indicating the day before yesterday. A small timeline or sequence shows three days — the marked day, yesterday, and today — with the earliest day emphasized. The concept of two days ago is visually represented through calendar markings and temporal sequence.
sentences: Two friends sit at a cafe. One person describes a recent meeting, gesturing with both hands. A thought bubble or calendar shows a date two days prior. The person smiles warmly while recounting the encounter. Coffee cups and a pastry sit on the table.

A person looks out a window at a sunny sky. Behind them, a memory or thought shows rain falling heavily — puddles on streets, people with umbrellas. A calendar on the wall shows the rainy day was two days ago. The contrast between past rain and present sunshine is visible.

A person sits at a table looking satisfied, patting their stomach. A thought bubble shows a Korean barbecue restaurant scene — sizzling meat on a grill, side dishes arranged around it. A small calendar indicates this meal happened two days ago. The person still savors the memory.

A person sits on a sofa recalling a movie they watched. A thought bubble shows a movie theater with a big screen. Ticket stubs sit on the coffee table in front of them. A calendar or phone screen shows the movie was seen two days ago. The person looks entertained by the memory.

A person carries a shopping bag and recalls a visit to a busy outdoor market. A thought bubble shows market stalls with vendors and produce. A calendar marks the market visit as two days prior. The person sorts through items they purchased at the market.

A person sits at a desk with a completed handwritten letter in an envelope. They recall writing it — a thought shows them sitting at the same desk with pen and paper. A calendar marks the writing day as two days ago. Stamps and envelopes are on the desk.

A person sits at a desk with a foreign language textbook open. They recall starting their studies — a thought shows them first opening the book with excitement. A calendar marks the start date as two days ago. Vocabulary notes are already filling a notebook.

A person holds a wrapped gift box with a ribbon, smiling. They recall receiving it — a thought shows someone handing them the gift with a bow. A calendar marks the gift-giving occasion as two days ago. The person examines the gift contentedly.

A person sits holding a phone. They recall a phone conversation — a thought shows them talking animatedly on the phone with a warm expression. A calendar marks the call as two days ago. The person looks at their phone as if considering calling again.

A person sits in a waiting room, holding a medical appointment card. They recall visiting a hospital — a thought shows them in a doctor's office with a physician. A calendar marks the visit as two days ago. Medical paperwork is in their hands.

207.word_prompt: A display of many similar items spread out on a table or in a case. One item among the group is highlighted, circled, or spotlighted — standing out from the rest. A person's finger points at the selected item. The surrounding items remain in the background while the chosen one is elevated or brought forward. The scene conveys the concept of selecting one from among many.
sentences: A table covered with a variety of fruits — apples, bananas, oranges, grapes, watermelon. A person picks up an apple and holds it up with a delighted expression, clearly preferring it above all the others. The other fruits remain on the table. The person takes a bite of the apple with enjoyment.

A group of friends stands together in a park. One person has their arm around a particular friend, clearly showing they are especially close. The group is large — six or more people. The pair of close friends stands slightly forward from the rest, their bond visually emphasized.

A person stands in a bookshop in front of a towering wall of books. They pull one specific book from the shelf and examine it with interest, opening to read a page. Many other books remain on the shelves. The person is drawn to this particular one among the many options.

A buffet or food spread shows many different dishes arranged on a long table. A person stands at the table, serving themselves one particular dish — a colorful mixed rice bowl. They smile as they scoop it onto their plate, clearly choosing it as their favorite among the array.

A person stands in a clothing store in front of a rack of many outfits. They pull one outfit off the rack and hold it up against themselves in front of a mirror. The chosen outfit stands out. Other clothes hang on the rack behind them. The person smiles approvingly at their selection.

A classroom with many students seated at desks. One student, noticeably younger than the others, sits in the front row. The teacher gestures toward this student. The young student is clearly the youngest person in the entire group. The age difference between this student and classmates is visible.

A world map or globe sits on a table. A person traces their finger across multiple countries, then taps on one specific country — a peninsula in East Asia. They smile and nod with affection for that particular place. A small flag or marker highlights the chosen country among many.

A paint palette or color wheel shows many different colors arranged in a spectrum. A person points at one specific color — blue — and nods appreciatively. The blue stands out or is circled. Other colors surround it but the person's preference is clearly for that one.

A pet shop or zoo scene with many different animals visible — dogs, birds, fish, rabbits. A person kneels down to pet a small cat and smiles, clearly finding the cat the cutest among all the animals. The cat nuzzles the person's hand. Other animals are visible in the background.

Four distinct seasonal scenes are shown — cherry blossoms for spring, bright sun for summer, orange leaves for autumn, snow for winter. A person points specifically at the spring scene with a preferring expression, clearly choosing it as their favorite season among the four.

208.word_prompt: A person stands in a hallway or open space, pointing with an extended arm in a specific direction — toward one side of the room or down a corridor. Their gesture is clear and directional. A doorway, sign, or landmark is visible in the direction they point. The person's expression is helpful and informative. Directional arrows or a floor plan may be visible in the scene. The concept of 'that side' or 'over there' is communicated through the pointing gesture.
sentences: A person in a building lobby points down a corridor toward a restroom sign. The bathroom door is visible at the end of the hallway. A person receiving directions looks in the indicated direction. The pointing gesture is clear and specific. The hallway has doors on both sides.

A person stands at an intersection and points down one street. In that direction, a brightly lit convenience store is visible with its sign glowing. The person explains the route to someone who follows the gesture with their gaze. The street stretches ahead with the store visible.

Two people meet for the first time in a formal setting. One person asks a polite question about the other's background. The questioned person gestures vaguely behind them, indicating where they came from. Both stand with formal, courteous posture.

A person points at a chair on the far side of a room. A bag sits on top of the chair. Another person follows the pointing gesture with their eyes, locating the bag. The chair is clearly on one particular side of the room. Other furniture fills the space.

A host in a restaurant or meeting room gestures toward a specific seat at a table, smiling warmly. A guest walks toward the indicated seat. The chair is pulled out slightly, welcoming. Other empty seats are at the table but the host specifically indicates one.

Inside a restaurant, a person points at a table positioned next to a large window. The window seat has a view of the street outside. The person turns to their dining companion with a questioning, hopeful expression, suggesting they sit at that particular spot. The window table is attractive and well-lit.

A person holds a phone to their ear while standing near a window. They look outside at the weather — perhaps rain or sunshine. The person on the phone asks about conditions in the other location. Their gaze through the window contrasts with wherever the caller might be.

Two people at a social event. One extends a hand for a handshake and tilts their head inquiringly, asking the other person's name. The second person is about to respond. Both are dressed for the occasion. Name tags or event decorations are visible in the background.

A person gestures toward a specific side of a table or counter, indicating where to place an object. Another person carries a box or item and follows the direction, setting it down on the indicated spot. The gesture is clear — pointing at a particular location.

A person stands in a building near multiple exits. They point firmly toward one specific exit door with an illuminated exit sign above it. A person looking for the way out follows the gesture. The indicated direction is clear and decisive.

209.word_prompt: A dramatic sky transitioning from a heavy downpour on the left to clear, calm skies on the right. Rain falls intensely on one side while the other side shows sunshine breaking through parting clouds. A puddle on the ground reflects the changing sky. A person closes an umbrella as the rain tapers off. The overall scene captures the moment a storm ceases — the concept of stopping or ending naturally.
sentences: A person stands at a window looking outside. The scene through the window shows wet streets and puddles but the rain has clearly just stopped — no drops fall from the now-brightening sky. The person smiles and reaches for a jacket to go outside. A folded umbrella leans against the wall, no longer needed.

An outdoor scene showing a landscape that was recently covered in falling snow. The ground is white but the sky has cleared — no snowflakes fall from the now-calm sky. Tree branches hold fresh snow. A person stands outside looking up at the peaceful, quiet post-snowfall sky.

A room that was previously noisy is now completely silent. A speaker or radio sits powered off. A person sits in the quiet room, looking around at the stillness. The contrast between expected noise and complete silence is evident. The person cocks their head, noticing the sudden absence of sound.

A young child sits on a parent's lap, face still wet with tears but no longer crying. The child sniffles and wipes their eyes with a small fist. The parent holds them gently. A toy or treat offered by the parent sits nearby. The child has calmed down, tears ceasing.

An outdoor scene showing still trees — not a single leaf moves. The air appears perfectly calm after a previous windstorm — broken twigs on the ground suggest past wind. A person stands peacefully, hair and clothes completely still. The silence and calmness are palpable.

A person stands at a window watching rain, holding an umbrella. They look at the sky impatiently, checking for any sign the rain will end. Dark clouds still cover the sky but perhaps a lighter patch is visible at the edge. The person's expression shows hopeful anticipation.

A room where music was recently playing. Speakers sit on a shelf. A person looks up suddenly from their book, startled by the unexpected silence when the music stopped abruptly. Their expression shows surprise at the sudden cessation. The room is now completely quiet.

A person sits in bed, previously coughing. A glass of water and medicine bottle are on the nightstand. The person takes a deep, clear breath and smiles with relief — the coughing has stopped. They lean back against the pillows, looking much more comfortable.

A neighborhood street previously disrupted by construction. Heavy machinery sits idle. Workers have stopped for the day. The street is now quiet and peaceful. A resident looks out their window with relief at the silence. Construction barriers and equipment are still present but inactive.

A morning scene showing wet streets and puddles from earlier rain. The sky has cleared to blue with remnant clouds. A person steps outside, looking up at the dry, brightening sky. They leave their umbrella at the door. The evidence of past rain is on the ground but none falls now.

210.word_prompt: The exterior of a cinema building with a large marquee sign displaying movie titles and showtimes. Movie posters in glass cases line the entrance. The ticket booth is visible with a small window. A crowd of moviegoers gathers near the entrance doors. Inside, rows of plush red seats face a massive white screen. The lobby has a popcorn counter with a popcorn machine and drink dispensers. The scene captures a busy movie theater ready for showtime.
sentences: A person looks at a calendar showing the weekend circled. In the foreground, they hold up two movie tickets and smile excitedly. A cinema building with its marquee is visible through a window. The person clearly anticipates their weekend movie plan.

Inside a dark movie theater, a person sits in a plush seat watching a large screen. The screen shows a dramatic scene with vivid colors. Popcorn sits in a bucket on the armrest. Other moviegoers fill adjacent seats. The person is absorbed in the film, eyes fixed on the screen.

A person stands on a street corner looking around, slightly lost. They hold a phone showing a map with a cinema location marked. They scan building signs and facades, searching for the theater. Buildings line the street but the theater is not immediately visible.

Two friends stand in front of a cinema entrance with its marquee above. They greet each other warmly with a wave and smile. Movie posters and showtimes are displayed behind them. Both have arrived at the agreed meeting point. The theater facade is prominently visible.

A person stands at a cinema ticket window, wallet in hand. A cashier behind the glass hands tickets through the small opening. Movie posters for current films are displayed beside the window. The person takes the tickets and tucks them safely into their pocket.

A person walks along a sidewalk toward a cinema building visible in the distance. Their stride is casual and unhurried. The cinema marquee grows larger as they approach. The walk is clearly on foot. No vehicle is involved. The street and surrounding buildings are visible.

A cinema interior showing rows of comfortable seats facing a large screen. Popcorn and drinks are available at a concession counter visible through a doorway. A sign above reads the screening times. The space clearly serves the purpose of showing movies to an audience.

A person stands on a commercial street, looking around at nearby buildings. They approach a passerby and gesture questioningly, clearly asking if there is a cinema nearby. The commercial area has shops and restaurants but no theater is immediately visible.

A person stands at a cinema entrance looking at the building with wide eyes and an excited expression. They hold a ticket in one hand. A companion or parent stands beside them. The person's demeanor suggests this is a new, first-time experience at a movie theater.

Two people check their phones, comparing time and movie schedules. One person points at the phone showing a movie starting time. A cinema building is visible in the background. They discuss when to leave. The conversation centers on timing their arrival at the theater.

211.word_prompt: A bird's-eye view of a neighborhood showing a central location — marked with a pin or circle — and several nearby establishments within a short radius: a restaurant, park, shop, and station. Dotted lines or short paths connect the central point to each nearby place. All destinations are visibly close. The map-like view emphasizes proximity and the concept of 'nearby' or 'in the vicinity.'
sentences: A person stands on a sidewalk looking at their phone map. They scan the immediate surroundings — a row of shops and buildings. Nearby, a restaurant with a visible sign and outdoor seating is just a short walk away. The person's expression is searching and hopeful.

A residential house or apartment building is shown. Just beyond the property boundary, a green park with trees, a playground, and walking paths is clearly visible. The distance between the house and park is minimal. A person stands at their window looking at the park.

A school building is visible on one side of a street. Directly across or just down the block, a small convenience store with its bright sign is open. Students in uniforms walk between the two locations. The proximity is obvious — both are on the same block.

A person stands on a city street looking at their phone map app, searching for a hospital. They ask a passerby for directions. The passerby points just around the corner where a hospital building with a medical cross sign is barely visible. The hospital is very close but not immediately obvious.

A cozy neighborhood street with a small cafe just steps from other shops. The cafe has outdoor chairs and a chalkboard menu. A person strolls past and notices the cafe, pausing with interest. The establishment is clearly nearby and convenient.

A person stands at the entrance of a subway station. Behind them, their apartment building is visible just a short walk away. The subway entrance with its sign and stairs is very close to their home. The proximity is ideal for commuting.

A person exits a supermarket carrying bags of groceries, including visible fruit. The supermarket is clearly in their neighborhood — their apartment building or house is visible nearby. The person walks the short distance home, bags in hand.

A school building sits on one side of a small street. Just next to it or across the road, a bakery with a display window full of bread and pastries is visible. Students look at the bakery window as they pass by. Both the school and bakery are in the same immediate area.

A person stands on a residential sidewalk, leaning against a wall near a house. They check their phone occasionally, clearly waiting for someone. The house they stand near is their friend's home. The neighborhood is quiet and residential.

Two people stand on a sidewalk, looking at nearby restaurant options. Several small eateries are visible on the same block. One person points at the nearest one. Both look ready to make a quick, convenient choice. The dining options are all within easy walking distance.

212.word_prompt: A close-up of handwritten text on lined paper. Neat cursive or printed letters fill the page. A pen rests on the paper beside the writing. The text occupies most of the page in organized paragraphs. Nearby, an open book shows printed text in columns. A notebook, a letter, and a printed article represent different forms of written text. The scene focuses on the concept of writing and written words.
sentences: A student sits at a desk writing a short essay or composition in a notebook. The notebook shows a paragraph of handwriting. A homework sheet with instructions sits beside it. The student concentrates, pen moving carefully across the paper. A textbook is open nearby for reference.

A person sits at a desk with a book open, reading intently. The book pages show text in a foreign script. The person follows along with a finger, lips moving slightly as they read. A dictionary sits beside the book for reference. A notebook with vocabulary notes is also open.

A person sits at a desk in a quiet room, writing in a journal or diary. The diary has dated entries. The person pauses thoughtfully, pen in hand, considering what to write next. Previous entries fill earlier pages. The scene is peaceful and reflective, a daily writing ritual.

A person sits at a computer desk scrolling through a website or blog. The screen shows an article with text and images. The person leans forward with interest, absorbed in reading. Their hand rests on the mouse. The article on screen is clearly engaging and well-written.

A person sits at a desk with a blank notebook and pen, practicing handwriting. Rows of carefully written letters fill the top of the page. The person writes the next line, concentrating on forming each character properly. An example sheet with model handwriting sits beside the notebook.

A person sits in a comfortable chair holding an open book. They furrow their brow and squint at the text, clearly finding it challenging to understand. The book appears to be academic or technical. A highlighted passage shows particularly difficult content. The reader's expression shows effort and concentration.

A person sits at a desk writing a letter by hand. An envelope and postage stamps are ready beside the paper. The letter is half-written, showing neat handwriting. The person pauses to think, then continues writing. A photo of the friend they are writing to is propped on the desk.

A person stands at a desk writing a quick note on a sticky pad or small memo paper. The note is brief — just a few lines. They peel it off and stick it to a computer monitor or refrigerator. The short message is visible on the memo. Other notes are nearby.

A person stands at a podium or desk with papers arranged in front of them. They rehearse or review a written presentation, lips moving as they read through the text. Notes and highlighted sections are visible on the papers. A laptop showing a presentation slide is nearby.

A person sits in a cafe or library reading a short piece of writing — an article, essay, or story — on a tablet or printed page. They smile and nod while reading, clearly finding the content enjoyable. A coffee cup sits beside them. The reader is engaged and entertained.

213.word_prompt: A person stands with head tilted to one side, eyes looking upward or sideways in thought. One hand touches their chin or cheek. Their expression is uncertain, noncommittal — neither a clear yes nor a clear no. A question mark hovers symbolically nearby. The person is clearly hesitating, unsure of how to answer a question. The overall mood is one of genuine uncertainty and contemplation.
sentences: Two people stand outside a restaurant. One person points at the restaurant and asks a question with an expectant expression. The other person tilts their head, touches their chin, and shrugs slightly with an uncertain expression. They clearly do not know if the restaurant is good.

A person looks out the window at a partly cloudy sky. Another person nearby asks if it will rain. The first person looks at the sky, scrunches their nose, and makes an ambiguous hand gesture — a wavering, unsure motion. The sky gives no clear indication of rain.

Two people look at a document or test result. One points at an answer and asks if it is correct. The other person squints at the answer, tilts their head back and forth, and suggests they check again. Their expression is genuinely uncertain about the correctness.

A person holds a phone showing a calendar. Another person asks if they are free on a specific day. The first person looks at the calendar, makes a thinking face, and winces slightly, suggesting they might be busy. Their response is noncommittal and hesitant.

Two people sit at a restaurant table looking at menus. One asks the other for a recommendation. The asked person scans the menu with a thoughtful expression, then shrugs and gestures broadly at the menu, indicating everything is fine but they have no strong preference.

A person looks at a clock on the wall. Another person asks when something will end. The first person looks at the clock, then back at the questioner, and shrugs with a puzzled expression. They clearly have no definite answer about the timing.

Two people stand at a crossroads looking at a map. One asks which direction to go. The other looks at the map, rotates it, and looks up at the road signs with an uncertain expression. They do not yet know the answer.

Two people are at a social gathering. One person points at someone across the room and asks who they are. The other person squints at the indicated person, thinks for a moment, and shakes their head slightly — they do not recognize or know the person.

A person stands bundled in a coat, looking at a thermometer or weather app. Another person asks if it is cold outside. The first person wobbles their hand in a so-so gesture, indicating it is somewhat cold but not extreme.

Two friends stand outside a movie theater looking at the poster for a film. One asks the other if the movie is good. The friend makes a noncommittal face — a slight shrug and a flat hand wave — indicating the movie is just average, neither great nor terrible.

214.word_prompt: A clock or timer showing a very brief elapsed time — seconds or minutes. An action happens at lightning speed: a task is completed almost instantly, or a person has just arrived with the clock barely having moved. Speed lines or a blur of motion suggest rapid completion. The scene conveys immediacy — something happening 'just now' or 'very soon' with minimal time passing.
sentences: A person waves to someone waiting and holds up a finger indicating 'one moment.' They grab their jacket and rush toward the door. Their stride is quick and purposeful. The waiting person stands patiently at the other end. The scene conveys a promise to return very quickly.

A person pushes back from a dining table, patting their stomach. The table still has recently used dishes — steam still rises faintly from the food. The meal is very freshly finished. The person looks satisfied. A clock on the wall shows barely any time has passed since they sat down.

A person works at a task — writing, assembling, or fixing something. They are nearly done, holding up the last piece or writing the final line. A clock nearby shows only a few minutes have passed. The person looks confident that completion is imminent.

A person stands at a doorway, still wearing their outdoor jacket and shoes, dropping their bag. They have clearly just walked in the door moments ago. The door behind them is still closing. They look like they literally just stepped inside.

A person sits at a desk, cracking their knuckles or flexing their hands, looking at a task in front of them. Their expression is confident and unhesitant. A stopwatch or clock is visible nearby. The person clearly feels capable of completing the task quickly.

A waiter in a restaurant apron carries a tray of food from the kitchen toward a table where customers wait. The waiter moves briskly with the food. The customers look up expectantly. The scene suggests prompt, immediate service — the food is arriving right away.

A person hangs up a phone call, immediately dials again, and holds the phone to their ear. The transition between calls is nearly instantaneous. A clock on the wall confirms minimal time passage. The person's expression is urgent but composed.

A person walks past an item — a phone, book, or set of keys — on a table and does a double-take. They point at it and turn to a companion, indicating they just noticed it moments ago. The discovery is fresh and immediate.

A person stands at a bus stop or meeting point. Their phone buzzes with a message. They look down the street and see their friend approaching in the distance, waving. The friend's arrival is imminent — they are just moments away. The waiting person's expression brightens.

A student closes a textbook and puts down their pen with a satisfied expression. A homework sheet in front of them is fully completed. A clock shows that only a short time has passed since they began. The quick completion impresses even the student themselves.

215.word_prompt: A prominent circular sign with a red border and red diagonal line crossing over a cigarette icon — the universal no smoking symbol. The surrounding area is clean and smoke-free. The scene clearly conveys prohibition of smoking in this location.
sentences: A person walks through a public building lobby. On the wall, a prominent no-smoking sign is displayed — a cigarette with a red circle and line through it. The person glances at the sign while walking. The lobby is clean and smoke-free. Other visitors pass through the well-maintained space.

A hospital entrance with automatic glass doors. A no-smoking sign is prominently posted near the entrance. A person approaches the hospital and notices the sign. The building is clean and clinical. No smoking occurs anywhere near the entrance. The prohibition is clearly displayed.

The exterior of a modern building with a no-smoking sign posted at the entrance. The area around the entrance is clean — no ashtrays or cigarette litter. A person enters the building, passing under the sign. The smoke-free policy is evident throughout.

A person stands in a designated area and notices a no-smoking sign on the wall. They hold an unlit cigarette and look at the sign, then reluctantly put the cigarette back in its pack. The sign is clear and authoritative. The area has no ashtrays.

Inside a restaurant, tables are set with napkins and cutlery. A small no-smoking sign sits on each table or is posted on the wall. Diners eat comfortably in the clean, smoke-free environment. No one is smoking. The air appears fresh and clean.

Inside a public bus, a no-smoking sticker is visible on the window or wall. Passengers sit comfortably in their seats. The bus interior is clean and well-maintained. No smoking occurs on board. The sign is part of the standard bus rules displayed.

A person stands near a friend who is about to light a cigarette. The first person points at a nearby no-smoking sign on the wall and shakes their head. The friend looks at the sign and puts the cigarette away. The sign clearly marks the area as smoke-free.

A park entrance with a sign indicating the park is a smoke-free zone. Green trees, walking paths, and benches are visible. People walk dogs and jog in the clean environment. No one smokes. The park atmosphere is fresh and healthy. The no-smoking sign is posted at the gate.

216.word_prompt: A weekly calendar or planner with Friday highlighted in a bright color or circled prominently. The days of the week are listed and Friday stands out as the fifth weekday. A person next to the calendar has an upbeat, excited expression — it is almost the weekend. The calendar shows Monday through Sunday with Friday clearly emphasized. A small celebration element — a smile, raised fists — conveys the anticipation associated with Friday.
sentences: A person stands in front of a wall calendar, pointing at today's date which falls on a Friday. The day is circled or highlighted. A clock on the wall confirms it is the current day. The person has a neutral, informative expression, simply noting the day of the week.

Two people check their phones, comparing calendars. Both phones show Friday highlighted. They smile and nod, making plans to meet. One person types a message confirming the date. The scene shows a friendly arrangement being made for Friday.

A classroom with a teacher at the front and students at desks. The teacher points at a schedule on the board showing a language class listed under Friday. Students have textbooks open. The day of the week is prominently displayed on the schedule.

A student sits at a desk surrounded by textbooks and study materials. A calendar on the wall shows Friday circled with an exam notation. The student looks focused and perhaps slightly anxious, preparing for the test. Notes and flashcards are spread out.

A room decorated for a party — balloons, streamers, and a table with snacks and drinks. A banner or invitation shows the event is on a Friday evening. Guests arrive at the door. Music plays from a speaker. The festive atmosphere fills the room.

217.word_prompt: A person sits at a social table where others hold wine glasses or beer mugs. The person in focus has a glass of water or juice instead, politely declining alcohol. The dual meaning is represented — both abstaining from alcohol and the current week.
sentences: A group of friends sits at a dinner table. Wine and beer glasses are being passed around. One person holds up their hand and shakes their head, declining a drink. Their glass contains water or juice instead. Their expression is firm but friendly. A small health icon or timer nearby suggests they are on a break from alcohol.

A person sits in a doctor's office. The doctor points at a health chart showing liver function or heart health. The person nods seriously. A visual or poster on the wall shows a crossed-out alcohol bottle. The person clearly commits to avoiding alcohol for health reasons.

A person looks at a calendar on the wall showing the current week highlighted. They point at a specific day this week and check their phone for plans. A friend's name or location is noted on that day. The person smiles, looking forward to meeting their friend this week.

A student sits at a desk with textbooks open. A weekly calendar shows the current week with an exam day marked. The student looks focused and determined. Study materials are spread out. The exam notation is clearly within this week's schedule.

A group sits at a bar or restaurant. A drink is offered to one person who waves it away apologetically with both hands. A glass of sparkling water sits in front of them instead. The person's expression is polite but definite — they are not drinking alcohol.

A public park or venue with a sign showing a crossed-out alcohol bottle — a no-drinking zone. People sit on benches and enjoy the space without any alcoholic beverages. The sign is clearly posted. The environment is family-friendly and alcohol-free.

A person sits at a desk reviewing a packed weekly schedule. Every day has appointments and tasks filled in. They look slightly overwhelmed but determined. A coffee cup sits beside them. The planner shows a very busy current week.

218.word_prompt: A vertical chart or ranking system showing numbered levels from 1 at the bottom to higher numbers at the top. Each level is distinct — colored differently or separated by lines. A person stands beside the chart with a certificate or badge indicating their current level. Medals or belt colors may represent different levels. The scene conveys the concept of ranked levels, grades, or proficiency tiers.
sentences: A person holds up a certificate or test result showing 'Level 1' prominently. Their expression is proud but aware there is room to grow. A proficiency scale chart is visible nearby showing levels 1 through 6. The person points at level 1 on the chart. Books or study materials are on a desk.

A person stands at a swimming pool in swim gear. A coach holds up a card showing a level or grade number — 3. The swimmer looks satisfied with their placement. Lane dividers and pool equipment are visible. Other swimmers practice in the background.

A person in a martial arts uniform — a white dobok — stands in a training hall. An instructor hands them a certificate or belt indicating a specific grade. The student bows respectfully. Other students train in the background. Belt colors of different levels hang on a wall display.

A classroom with a teacher and students. The teacher points at a curriculum level chart on the wall showing beginner level. Students at desks have workbooks matching that level. The classroom is clearly for entry-level study. The level designation is prominent.

A person sits at a desk looking at a test score or placement result. The paper shows they have been placed at level 2. They look at a chart showing the progression from level 1 to higher levels. Their expression is determined to keep advancing. Study materials are nearby.

Two people compare their proficiency certificates or badges. One asks the other about their current level. Both hold up their results. The numbers or levels are visible on the documents. They compare with friendly curiosity.

219.word_prompt: A person in mid-rush — hair slightly disheveled, one arm carrying items while the other hand checks a watch with a panicked expression. Their stride is long and hurried. A clock on the wall behind them shows a time that is dangerously close to a deadline. Papers or belongings trail slightly in their wake. The scene conveys extreme urgency, time pressure, and haste.
sentences: A person rushes through a doorway, checking their watch with a stressed expression. Their hair is slightly messy and they carry a bag over one shoulder. Their stride is fast and urgent. A clock on the wall shows a time that is clearly pressing. The person is obviously in a hurry.

A person checks their phone for the time, then looks at a clock on the wall with alarm. They grab their coat and bag, heading for the door at a near-run. An appointment reminder notification is visible on the phone screen. Their hurried movements show the pressure of being late.

A person sits at a desk when their phone rings with an urgent notification. They stand up abruptly, eyes wide, and begin gathering items quickly. The notification shows an exclamation mark or urgent label. Papers scatter slightly as they rush. The sudden emergency is palpable.

A person speaks quickly on a phone, making a cutting gesture with their free hand. They glance at a clock showing a pressing time. Their expression is apologetic but clearly time-pressed. They are wrapping up the call hurriedly. The phone conversation is being cut short.

A person sits at a dining table eating very quickly, barely pausing between bites. A clock on the wall shows they are short on time. A work bag and coat wait by the door. The person shovels food rapidly, trying to finish the meal as fast as possible.

The overall visual shows a defined span of time with clear beginning and end points. A calendar or planner beside it reinforces the concept of a measured duration.
