A person sits in a living room looking at their phone. On the screen is a message or photo showing travel plans — an airplane ticket confirmation or a beach destination photo. The person's face lights up with excitement. They sit forward eagerly. A suitcase or travel bag is visible in the corner of the room, ready to be packed.

A family group stands together in an airport arrivals hall or a home doorway. A person rushes toward the group with arms open wide. The family members smile and reach out to welcome them. Everyone's expressions show warm happiness at being together. Luggage sits nearby on the floor. The reunion scene radiates mutual joy.

A student sits at a desk looking at a report card or grade sheet. The paper shows high marks. The student raises both hands in celebration, pushing back from the desk. Their chair rolls slightly backward. Their face shows elation — eyes wide, mouth open in a shout of joy. Textbooks and study materials are spread across the desk.

226.word_prompt: A person stands with hands clasped together at chest level, eyes gently closed, and a warm, contented smile on their face. Soft golden light surrounds them. Their posture is upright and relaxed, radiating inner happiness. Small details — a slight tilt of the head, the gentle curve of the lips — communicate a deep, quiet sense of gladness. The background is soft and warm-toned, enhancing the emotional warmth of the scene.
sentences: A person sits across from a friend at a table. The friend slides a beautifully wrapped gift box across the table. The person picks it up, eyes shining with gratitude. They press the gift to their chest and smile warmly at the friend. The wrapping is elegant with a ribbon on top. The person's expression shows sincere happiness at the kind gesture.

A person holds an official-looking document with a stamped seal or a certificate. They read the paper and a wide smile spreads across their face. Their posture straightens with pride. They hold the paper up slightly as if to display it. A study desk with scattered notes and books is visible behind them. The relief and happiness on their face are clear.

Two people meet in a park or on a quiet street. They have not seen each other in a long time — one looks slightly older, hair grayer. They grasp each other's hands warmly, both faces showing deep happiness. Their eyes crinkle with genuine smiles. The setting sun casts golden light across the scene. The reunion is clearly joyful.

A person sits at a kitchen table reading a letter or looking at a phone notification. Their expression transforms from neutral to joyful as they read the content. One hand covers their mouth in happy surprise. The message clearly contains positive news. A cup of tea sits untouched beside them as they focus entirely on the good news.

A person sits at the head of a table decorated for a birthday celebration. A cake with lit candles sits in front of them. Friends and family surround the table, clapping and smiling. The birthday person wears a small party hat and beams with happiness. Balloons and streamers decorate the room. The person's expression shows pure birthday joy.

A person sits on their bed the night before a trip, a packed suitcase beside them. They look at travel tickets or a boarding pass spread on the bed. Their face shows excited anticipation — eyes bright, smile eager. A travel guidebook and a camera sit on the nightstand. The person's posture is animated and forward-leaning with excitement.

A family of four sits together on a sofa in a living room — parents and two children. Everyone looks healthy and smiles warmly. The parents sit in the middle with arms around the children. Family photos hang on the wall behind them. The scene is peaceful and happy. The overall atmosphere communicates the quiet gladness of having a healthy family.

A person sits at a restaurant table with their favorite dish placed in front of them — a steaming plate of their preferred cuisine. Their eyes widen and their mouth curves into a delighted smile as they look at the food. They pick up utensils eagerly. The plate is beautifully presented. The person's expression shows pure culinary happiness.

A person walks out of a clothing store carrying a shopping bag with a new outfit visible at the top. They hold the bag close and glance down at the purchase with a satisfied smile. The store window behind them displays fashionable clothing. The person's stride is light and happy. The new clothes clearly bring them joy.

A student stands beside a teacher in a classroom. The teacher places a hand on the student's shoulder and speaks with an approving, encouraging expression. The student's face glows with pride and happiness at the praise. A graded paper with a high score is visible on the desk. Other students watch from their seats. The student stands taller with the teacher's recognition.

227.word_prompt: A folded newspaper lies open on a desk, a specific article circled or highlighted with a marker. Beside the newspaper, a laptop screen shows an online news page with a headline and photo. In the background, a professional driver in a uniform and cap stands beside a vehicle. The dual scene represents both meanings of the word — a written news article and a professional driver. Reading glasses rest on the newspaper.
sentences: A person sits at a breakfast table with a large broadsheet newspaper spread open in front of them. They hold the paper with both hands and lean in to read a particular article closely. A cup of coffee and a plate of toast sit beside the paper. Their expression shows interest and engagement with the content. The headline of the article is prominent on the page.

A person sits at a desk in front of a computer monitor. The screen displays a weather news website with a weather map, temperature charts, and a forecast article. The person reads the screen with one hand on the mouse, scrolling through the article. A window beside them shows the actual weather outside — overcast or sunny — contrasting with the forecast on screen.

A passenger sits in the back seat of a taxi. They lean forward slightly and point through the windshield toward a school building visible in the distance. The driver, wearing a cap, looks in the rearview mirror and nods. The taxi meter is visible on the dashboard. The interior of the cab is clean and the seatbelt is buckled.

A city bus interior viewed from the passenger area. The bus driver sits at the wheel, wearing a uniform and a friendly expression. The driver turns slightly to greet a boarding passenger with a warm smile and a nod. A fare card reader is beside the driver. Passengers sit in seats behind. The driver's kind demeanor is clearly visible.

A person sits at a desk, holding a smartphone. The screen shows a news article with a headline and photo. The person's thumb hovers over a share or send button. A messaging app notification is visible. The person is in the process of forwarding the article to someone. The article content is clearly visible on the phone screen.

A person sits in a comfortable chair flipping through a glossy magazine. The pages show well-designed article layouts with photographs, pull quotes, and columns of text. The person has the magazine open to a spread with a compelling article. Several other magazines are stacked on a side table. The person reads with interested engagement.

A person sits at a desk with a laptop open, typing a search query into a search engine. The results page shows several article links but none match what they are looking for. The person frowns slightly and adjusts their search terms. A notepad with written keywords sits beside the laptop. The expression shows mild frustration at not finding a specific article.

A professional driver stands outside a black sedan or van in a parking area. They wear a neat uniform with a cap and hold the rear passenger door open. They gesture welcomingly toward the open door, inviting someone to enter the vehicle. The car is polished and the driver's posture is attentive and professional.

A person sits on a couch in the evening, holding a tablet or phone. They scroll through a news app, pausing on an article with an intriguing headline and photo. Their eyebrows are slightly raised with interest. A lamp illuminates the room softly. The person's relaxed posture indicates casual evening reading of an interesting news piece.

A person sits at a desk with a physical newspaper, scissors, and a glue stick. They carefully cut out a specific article from the newspaper page. A scrapbook or folder lies open beside them, with other previously clipped articles pasted inside. The person handles the scissors precisely, preserving the article's content. The desk has neat piles of old newspapers.

228.word_prompt: A multi-story brick building on a university campus with rows of identical windows, each showing a desk lamp or curtain. The building entrance has a set of double doors with a small reception desk visible inside. Students walk in and out carrying backpacks and bags. A bulletin board near the entrance shows posted notices. Trees line the walkway leading to the building. The architecture is institutional but welcoming, clearly a student residential hall.
sentences: A student sits on a single bed in a compact room with a desk, bookshelf, and small wardrobe. A backpack leans against the desk chair. Textbooks are stacked on the desk. The window shows a campus view with academic buildings and trees. The room is modest but functional. A small lamp is on the desk. The student looks comfortable in their dormitory room.

A person stands at a reception desk inside a residential building, speaking to a staff member behind the counter. The staff member checks a computer screen or a ledger. The person leans forward with a hopeful, questioning expression. Keys hang on a board behind the counter. The lobby has a notice board and a seating area. The person is inquiring about room availability.

Two people sit at a table — a student and an administrative staff member. Between them is a form or document showing cost figures and payment details. The student looks at the numbers with a thoughtful expression. A calculator sits on the table. The staff member points to specific line items. The conversation is clearly about fees and expenses for housing.

A bird's-eye view or map-like illustration of a university campus. A residential building is positioned clearly within the campus grounds, surrounded by academic halls, a library, and green spaces. Pathways connect the buildings. Students walk between them. The dormitory building is distinctly labeled by its architecture — multiple floors with uniform windows, set among the academic buildings.

A compact dormitory room with two single beds on opposite sides. Two students sit at their respective desks, each studying. Personal items — photos, posters, and small decorations — distinguish each half of the room. A shared shelf sits between the desks. Both students appear comfortable, occasionally turning to chat. The scene shows the shared living arrangement of roommates.

A dormitory hallway at night. A clock on the wall shows 11:00 PM. A student hurries through the entrance door, slightly out of breath. A resident advisor or security guard sits at a desk near the entrance, checking the time. A posted notice on the wall shows rules and curfew times. The student has just made it back in time.

A communal dining hall inside a student residential building. Students sit at long tables eating breakfast — bowls of rice, soup, and side dishes are on trays. A serving counter with food warmers is visible at one end. A student carries their tray to an empty seat. Morning light comes through large windows. The atmosphere is casual and busy.

A person sits at a desk filling out an application form. The form has fields for personal information, room preferences, and dates. A pen is in their hand and they write carefully. A brochure showing dormitory room photos and amenities sits beside the form. The person's expression is focused and determined. A university campus map is pinned to the wall behind them.

A student kneels on the floor of a dormitory room, wiping the floor with a cloth. A bucket of soapy water and cleaning spray sit nearby. The desk surface is already wiped clean and organized. The bed is freshly made. The room is in the process of being thoroughly cleaned, half sparkling and half still needing attention.

A student stands in a dormitory room surrounded by packed cardboard boxes and suitcases. The desk and shelves are bare — personal items have been removed. The bed is stripped of sheets. The student carries a box toward the door. A calendar on the wall shows the current month with a date circled. The scene clearly depicts moving out.

229.word_prompt: A person sits in a quiet room, eyes gazing upward and to the side as if searching through memories. A thought bubble or dreamy overlay above their head shows faded, sepia-toned images — a childhood home, a school building, faces of old friends. The person touches their temple with one finger. Photo albums and old letters lie open on the table beside them. The scene visually represents the act of recalling and remembering past events.
sentences: A person sits in an armchair holding an old photo album open on their lap. The photos show scenes from their childhood — a small house, children playing, a birthday party. The person looks at the photos with a soft, nostalgic smile. Their eyes are slightly distant, lost in memory. The room is quiet and warmly lit.

Two people sit at a cafe table. One person holds up a small calendar or planner and points to a date marked for tomorrow. They look directly at the other person with a firm, reminding expression. The second person nods and raises a hand in acknowledgment. The calendar entry is circled or highlighted prominently.

A person stands at a social gathering or party, facing someone who has just introduced themselves. The person squints slightly and scratches their head, trying to recall the other person's name. Their expression shows effort and slight embarrassment. The other person waits expectantly. Name tags are on some guests but the one in question has none.

A student sits at a desk surrounded by vocabulary flashcards and open textbooks. They hold a flashcard and stare at it with a strained, concentrating expression. One hand presses against their forehead. Several flashcards have been set aside in a discard pile. The effort of memorization is clearly difficult and visible on the student's face.

A person walks confidently along a familiar neighborhood street. They pass recognizable landmarks — a specific tree, a painted fence, a corner shop — without hesitation. They do not check a map or phone. Their stride is sure and their gaze forward. The route clearly leads toward a school building visible in the distance. The person knows this path by heart.

A person sits on a park bench, looking at their phone contact list. They scroll to a specific name and the phone number is displayed. The person smiles, confirming they know the number. They do not need to look it up elsewhere. The phone screen shows the contact details clearly. The person's expression shows confident familiarity.

Two people sit across from each other in a warm living room. One person holds an old photograph showing the two of them together years ago — both looking younger. They point at the photo and smile. The other person leans in to look, eyes brightening with recognition. A calendar or date is somehow referenced in the old photo — perhaps dated on the back.

A student stands in a school hallway facing a classmate. The classmate holds a notebook and points to a date written inside. The student raises their eyebrows in thought, then nods with recognition. A school bulletin board behind them shows assignment deadlines. The interaction is about recalling when something is due.

A person sits in a classroom with other students. The teacher stands at the front near a whiteboard. The person holds a pen and notebook, having written down key points. They look at their notes with a confident nod, clearly recalling what was taught. The whiteboard still shows some written content from the lesson.

A person sits alone listening to music through earphones. Their eyes are closed and a gentle, wistful smile crosses their face. A faint overlay or dreamy background shows a rural landscape — green fields, a small farmhouse, a winding road — representing their hometown. The music triggers a vivid memory. The person's expression is one of longing and fond remembrance.

230.word_prompt: A large outdoor thermometer mounted on a wall displays a high reading. The mercury column is visibly high in the glass tube. Beside the thermometer, a weather forecast display shows temperature numbers and a sun icon. In the background, heat waves shimmer above a concrete sidewalk on a hot day. A person fans themselves nearby. The scene centers on the concept of measured air temperature.
sentences: A bright, intense summer day. A person stands outdoors wiping sweat from their forehead. A large public thermometer on a nearby building wall shows a very high reading. The sun blazes overhead in a cloudless sky. Heat shimmer is visible above the pavement. Other people seek shade under trees and awnings. The extreme heat is palpable.

A winter scene with snow covering the ground and bare tree branches. A person walks bundled in a thick coat, scarf, and gloves. Their breath is visible as vapor in the cold air. A thermometer mounted on a fence post shows a very low reading. Icicles hang from a nearby roof edge. The cold temperature is visually evident everywhere.

A person sits on a couch watching a weather forecast on television. The TV screen shows a weather map with upward-pointing arrows and rising temperature numbers for the next day. A sun icon appears on the forecast graphic. The person looks at the screen with interest. A warm sweater draped over the couch arm suggests they are looking forward to warmer weather.

A person stands in a bedroom in front of an open wardrobe. They hold up a thick winter coat and put it on. A scarf and gloves lie on the bed ready to be worn. Through the window behind them, a frost-covered landscape is visible. A weather app on a phone on the dresser shows a low temperature reading. The person dresses warmly for the cold.

A scorching summer street scene. People walk with umbrellas used as parasols. A digital temperature display on a building facade shows 35 degrees. The pavement appears to radiate heat. A person dabs their face with a handkerchief. Ice cream and cold drink vendors have long lines. The entire scene conveys extreme high temperature.

An early morning scene. A person steps out their front door into the cold dawn air, pulling a jacket tighter around themselves. Their breath forms visible clouds. Dew or frost coats the grass and car windshields. A porch thermometer shows a very low early morning reading. The sky is pale and the sun is barely above the horizon.

A pleasant spring scene. Cherry blossom trees bloom along a park path. People walk in light jackets or sweaters, some with sleeves rolled up. The sun shines warmly but gently. A thermometer or weather display shows a comfortable, moderate temperature. Birds sing in the flowering trees. The overall atmosphere is mild and inviting.

A person sits at home watching television news. The weather segment is on screen, showing a map with a dramatic downward arrow and plummeting temperature numbers. The forecaster on TV gestures at the sharp drop. The person looks concerned and glances toward a closet or coat rack. The sudden temperature change is the focus of the broadcast.

A person sits at a computer desk, looking at a travel website. The screen shows a destination country with climate information — temperature charts and weather averages. The person holds a printed travel itinerary beside the screen, comparing dates and expected temperatures. A suitcase sits on the floor nearby, ready to be packed appropriately for the climate.

A person stands outdoors in early autumn, looking confused at the weather. They wear a t-shirt but hug their arms for warmth, suggesting the temperature is unusually different from what they expected. Leaves are turning colors on trees. A smartphone weather app in their hand shows a temperature reading that seems abnormal. Other people nearby also seem surprised by the unusual conditions.

231.word_prompt: A reporter stands in a city street holding a microphone, speaking into a television camera operated by a cameraperson. The reporter wears a press badge on a lanyard. Behind them, the scene of a news event is visible. A notepad and pen protrude from their jacket pocket. The reporter has a professional, focused expression. The camera has a station logo on it. The scene clearly depicts a working journalist on assignment.
sentences: A person sits at a desk in a newspaper office, typing rapidly on a computer keyboard. Stacks of newspapers and reference materials cover the desk. A press ID badge hangs from a lanyard around their neck. A nameplate on the desk identifies them. Framed front-page articles hang on the wall behind them. The person is clearly a working newspaper journalist.

A reporter stands outdoors on a busy street, holding a microphone and speaking into a television camera. They gesture toward a scene behind them — a building, an event, or a crowd. A camera operator films them. The reporter has a press pass visible. A live broadcast indicator appears on the camera. The reporter delivers news from the location.

A reporter sits across from an athlete in a post-game interview setting. The reporter holds a microphone toward the athlete and looks at a notepad with prepared questions. The athlete, still in sports gear, answers while looking at the reporter. Camera operators and other media are visible in the background. The press conference table has microphones lined up.

A young person sits at a desk in their bedroom, surrounded by newspapers, magazines, and a laptop showing a news website. They hold a pen and notepad, practicing writing. A vision board or poster on the wall shows images of famous journalists and news anchors. The person's expression is dreamy and determined, aspiring to a career in journalism.

A reporter crouches behind a line of caution tape at the scene of an incident — a closed road, an overturned vehicle, or a building with emergency vehicles. They hold a notepad and take notes rapidly. A camera hangs from their neck. Police and emergency workers are in the background. The reporter observes and documents the scene professionally.

A reporter stands on a city sidewalk, holding a microphone toward a passerby. The microphone has a station logo on it. The passerby speaks while the reporter listens attentively, occasionally nodding. A camera operator stands nearby filming the interaction. Other pedestrians walk past. The scene depicts a street interview or public opinion segment.

A large open-plan office filled with rows of desks, each occupied by a journalist working at a computer. Monitors display news feeds and article drafts. Papers, coffee cups, and phones cover the desks. Phones ring and people type rapidly. A large screen on the wall shows a live news broadcast. The newsroom buzzes with activity.

A large press conference room. Rows of reporters sit in chairs facing a podium where a government official stands at a lectern with multiple microphones. Several reporters raise their hands to ask questions. Cameras flash. Notepads and recording devices are held up. The scene depicts a formal press conference with many journalists present.

A person sits at a simple desk with a computer, notepad, and pen. They type an article, eyes focused on the screen. A newspaper clipping pinned to a corkboard shows their byline. The desk has a coffee mug and reference books. The person works with concentrated focus. The scene illustrates the daily work of writing and reporting news.

A reporter stands at a news event — an awards ceremony or a public gathering. Other journalists and photographers crowd around. A bystander points at the reporter and comments to a companion, clearly recognizing the well-known journalist. The reporter carries themselves with professional confidence. Their face is recognizable and their press badge is prominent.

232.word_prompt: A long passenger train with multiple carriages stands at a platform in a large train station. The locomotive is at the front, and the carriages stretch back along the track. The station has a vaulted ceiling with iron beams. Passengers board through open doors along the platform. A departure board overhead displays times and destinations. Platform numbers are posted on pillars. The train gleams under station lighting.
sentences: A person stands on a train platform with a rolling suitcase, looking at a departure board overhead. The board shows a coastal city as the destination. The train waits at the platform with doors open. The person moves toward the nearest carriage door. Other travelers board with luggage. The station has a high arched roof and platform numbers displayed clearly.

A split comparison: on the left, a train moves quickly along tracks through countryside. On the right, a bus drives on a road beside the same tracks. The train is clearly ahead, moving faster. Speed lines or a blurred background emphasize the train's greater velocity. Clocks or time indicators show the train arriving sooner than the bus.

A person stands at a ticket counter in a train station. They hold up two fingers, indicating the number of tickets desired. The clerk behind the glass partition processes the purchase. Two printed tickets emerge from a slot. A wallet is open in the person's other hand. The station has a schedule board and a queue of other ticket buyers behind.

A person stands on a train platform looking at a digital display board that shows a train arriving in five minutes. The countdown is visible. The tracks stretch into the distance. Other passengers stand along the platform edge. The person checks their watch, which matches the time on the board. The train has not yet appeared but arrival is imminent.

A train station platform with a person standing and scanning the crowd of arriving passengers. They hold a small sign or wave a hand. Other passengers exit a train in the background, walking along the platform. The waiting person rises on their toes to see over the crowd. The station clock and a destination sign are visible overhead.

The interior of a moving train carriage. A person sits in a comfortable seat beside a large window. Outside, a countryside landscape blurs past — green fields, distant mountains. The person holds an open book, reading peacefully. The seat tray is folded down with a water bottle on it. Other passengers are seated in nearby rows, some sleeping.

A person stands at a train station information board, looking at a schedule of departures. They run their finger along the listed times, searching for a specific departure. Columns show times, destinations, and platform numbers. The person's expression is questioning. A clock on the wall shows the current time for reference.

A person stands at the open door of a train carriage, one foot on the step, looking back at the platform with wonder and excitement. It is clearly their first experience boarding a train. Their eyes are wide and their expression shows a mixture of nervousness and thrill. A companion stands on the platform gesturing encouragingly.

The interior of a train carriage showing a person reclined in a wide, cushioned seat. The seat has armrests, a fold-down tray, and a reading light overhead. The person stretches their legs comfortably. The window beside them shows a scenic view. They look relaxed and content with the comfortable seating. Other empty seats are visible in the clean carriage.

A person sits at a table comparing travel options on their phone or computer. The screen shows a price comparison between a train ticket and an airplane ticket for the same destination. The train fare is notably lower. The person points at the train price with a satisfied expression. A calculator and wallet sit on the table beside them.

233.word_prompt: A person stands hunched forward slightly, one hand covering their mouth, in the middle of a forceful cough. Their chest contracts visibly and their eyes are squeezed shut from the effort. A tissue box sits on a nearby table. A scarf is wrapped around their neck and their nose is slightly red. Medicine bottles and a glass of water are on the table. The scene clearly depicts someone dealing with a persistent cough.
sentences: A person sits on a couch wrapped in a blanket, coughing into their elbow. A box of tissues sits on the couch beside them. Their nose is red and eyes are watery. A thermometer lies on the coffee table. Used tissues are scattered around. The person looks miserable with cold symptoms. A cup of warm tea steams on the table.

A person sits in a doctor's examination room on the patient table. They cough repeatedly, hand over mouth. The doctor stands nearby with a stethoscope, listening to their chest. A medical chart is clipped to a board on the wall. The patient's expression shows discomfort. The clinical setting — sterile walls, medical equipment — is clearly a hospital or clinic.

A person stands at a pharmacy counter, pointing at their throat and miming a cough. The pharmacist behind the counter reaches for a box of cough syrup on the shelf behind them. Various medicine boxes are displayed on the shelves. The customer's expression shows discomfort. A small paper prescription or note is on the counter.

A student sits in a classroom full of other students. The student covers their mouth with one hand and coughs, trying to be quiet. Nearby students glance over. The teacher at the front pauses briefly. The coughing student looks embarrassed and reaches for a water bottle on their desk. Open textbooks and notebooks are visible.

A person stands on a crowded subway or bus, wearing a medical face mask. They cough behind the mask, turning their head away from nearby passengers. Other commuters maintain a slight distance. The person holds onto a handrail with one hand and holds a tissue in the other. The mask is clearly worn as a precaution while coughing.

A person sits at their work desk in an office, coughing repeatedly. A large pile of used tissues fills a small wastebasket beside the desk. A cup of warm honey-lemon drink sits nearby. The person's expression is tired and worn. Colleagues in the background glance over with concern. The persistent cough has clearly been ongoing.

A person coughs into the crook of their elbow in a public setting — a bus or a waiting room. Their other hand is slightly raised as a secondary barrier. The people beside them nod in appreciation of the etiquette. The person's posture shows proper cough-covering technique — bent arm raised, face turned into the elbow.

A person sits on a bed in pajamas, holding a thermometer that shows an elevated reading. They cough into a tissue and then touch their forehead, which appears flushed. A fever is visible from their reddened cheeks and glassy eyes. Medicine bottles, a water glass, and tissues are arranged on the nightstand. Both fever and cough symptoms are present.

A parent sits on the edge of a child's bed at night. The child lies under the covers, coughing repeatedly. The parent looks worried and feels the child's forehead. A nightlight illuminates the room. A humidifier or vaporizer runs on the nightstand. Cough medicine and a spoon are on the nightstand. The clock shows a late nighttime hour.

A person sits up in bed looking noticeably better than before. They take a spoonful of medicine from a bottle on the nightstand. Their expression is relieved — the coughing has clearly subsided. A trash can full of used tissues sits nearby, evidence of their recent illness. The person takes a deep breath without coughing and smiles faintly. Color has returned to their face.

234.word_prompt: An acoustic guitar rests propped against a wooden chair in a music room. The guitar's body shows a warm, polished wood grain with a dark sound hole. Guitar picks and a tuner sit on a nearby table. Sheet music is spread open on a music stand beside the chair. A guitar case lies open on the floor. The scene captures both the instrument and the concept of music-making.
sentences: A person sits on a stool, holding an acoustic guitar on their lap. Their left hand presses strings on the fretboard while their right hand strums across the sound hole. Their posture shows practiced comfort with the instrument. A music stand with sheet music is in front of them. The room is a quiet practice space.

A person sits in a living room with a guitar on their lap, strumming casually. Around them are other hobby items — but the guitar is clearly the favorite. They smile as they play, eyes on their fingers. A small amplifier sits nearby. The scene is relaxed and informal, showing a personal hobby being enjoyed.

A person stands in a grocery store produce section, placing apples and bananas into a shopping bag. The bag already contains several types of fruit — oranges, grapes, pears, and other assorted items. Multiple fruit varieties fill the display bins around them. The person selects broadly from the available options, choosing a wide assortment.

A person sits in a music school classroom, holding a guitar for the first time. A music teacher sits across from them demonstrating finger placement on a guitar neck. The student watches intently and tries to copy the position. Beginner guitar instruction books are open on a table. The student's expression shows eager determination to learn.

A performer stands on a small stage under spotlight, playing an electric guitar with energetic body language. An audience watches from below. Amplifiers and speakers are stacked at the sides of the stage. The performer leans into the music, eyes closed. The crowd watches with appreciation. A microphone stand is nearby.

A person sits at a desk filling out a form or survey. They reach the final section at the bottom of the page which has an open text field for additional comments. The person holds a pen and writes a note in the blank space. The form has mostly checkboxes and pre-filled sections above the open comment area.

A person stands in a music store, holding a brand-new guitar with the price tag still attached. They examine it from different angles — the body, the neck, the tuning pegs. A sales associate stands nearby. Display racks hold multiple guitars of different styles and colors. The person appears pleased with their selection and ready to purchase.

A classroom setting with a music teacher at the front demonstrating guitar chords on a whiteboard. Students sit in chairs, each holding a guitar. Some strum along while others look at chord diagrams. The atmosphere is engaged and fun. The teacher plays a chord and the students repeat it. Music stands hold instruction sheets.

A person stands in an office supply store, collecting various items into a shopping basket — pencils, erasers, notebooks, rulers, and other stationery supplies. The basket is getting full with an assortment of different supplies. The shelves around them display a wide range of stationery products. The person checks a written list in their hand.

A person sits alone in a quiet room, practicing guitar. A timer or clock on the wall shows 30 minutes. The person plays scales methodically, fingers moving across the fretboard with concentration. Sheet music and a metronome sit on the table beside them. The daily practice routine is evident from the disciplined setup and focused expression.

235.word_prompt: A person stands backstage, peeking through a curtain at a large audience. Their hands tremble slightly and they grip the curtain edge tightly. Beads of sweat are visible on their forehead. Their face shows wide, anxious eyes and pressed-together lips. They clutch note cards in one hand. The backstage area is dim compared to the bright stage lights beyond the curtain. The scene captures the physical manifestation of nervousness.
sentences: A person stands at a podium in front of a room full of seated people. They grip the podium edges with both hands, knuckles white. Notes are spread in front of them but their eyes dart nervously over the audience. Their posture is stiff and their mouth is set in a tense line. Beads of sweat appear on their forehead. The audience watches expectantly.

A student sits at a desk in an examination hall, staring at the face-down test paper. Other students around them are already writing. The student's pencil hovers over the paper but they hesitate. Their jaw is clenched and their foot taps rapidly under the desk. A wall clock shows the exam has just begun. The atmosphere is tense and quiet.

Two people sit across from each other at a cafe table, meeting for the first time. One person fidgets with their coffee cup, avoiding prolonged eye contact. Their posture is slightly rigid and their smile is nervous rather than relaxed. The other person tries to make conversation. The nervous person's hands are slightly clasped or restless.

A performer stands at the edge of a stage, guitar in hand, looking out at a seated audience. The spotlight is about to shift to them. Their grip on the guitar neck is tight and their breathing appears shallow. The expression on their face shows apprehension. Other performers have already played and left the stage. The moment before performing is clearly anxiety-inducing.

A person sits in a waiting room outside an office labeled with a sign suggesting a formal interview. They wear professional clothing and hold a folder of documents on their lap. Their leg bounces up and down nervously. They straighten their tie or smooth their clothes repeatedly. Other candidates sit nearby, also looking anxious. The door to the interview room is closed.

The person's frozen, startled posture and facial expression capture the instant of sudden surprise.
sentences: A person walks along a garden path when a cat suddenly leaps out of a bush right in front of them. The person recoils backward, one hand flying to their chest, eyes wide with shock. A person sits in a quiet room reading a book when a sudden loud noise — a door slamming or a clap of thunder — occurs. The person flinches violently, the book flying from their hands. A person opens a plain cardboard box on a table, not expecting anything special. Inside is a beautifully wrapped gift — jewelry, a gadget, or a personal item they wanted. A person lies in bed at night in a dark room. A sudden noise comes from outside — a dog barking, a branch cracking, or a door creaking.
